Peter, OR-05 is under attack!

Radical Portland Liberals are after _**OUR**_ House seat.

They are fighting to bring their extreme agenda to our doorstep.

_**Prioritizing reckless spending, burdensome regulations, and an agenda that is out of touch with the needs and values of our hard working citizens.
**_
_But I refuse to let them succeed...
_
I have fought tirelessly to represent you, working to create jobs, support local businesses, and champion common-sense solutions that benefit our district.

I have stood up against the radical left's attempts to defund the police, dismantle our economy, and impose their radical ideologies on our communities.

But I can't do this alone, Peter.

I need your immediate support if we are going to stand against their well-funded campaign.

clean_body: | | | | Our seat is in jeopardy Peter, OR-05 is under attack! Radical Portland Liberals are after OUR House seat. They are fighting to bring their extreme agenda to our doorstep. Prioritizing reckless spending, burdensome regulations, and an agenda that is out of touch with the needs and values of our hard working citizens. But I refuse to let them succeed... I have fought tirelessly to represent you, working to create jobs, support local businesses, and champion common-sense solutions that benefit our district. I have stood up against the radical left's attempts to defund the police, dismantle our economy, and impose their radical ideologies on our communities. But I can't do this alone, Peter. I need your immediate support if we are going to stand against their well-funded campaign. | | Every dollar you donate will go directly toward saving our house seat. Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086

name: Mike Pompeo

Our official DLCC members are the heart of our operation – we can’t secure wins for state Democrats across the country without the help from our consistent, dedicated supporters. You are what makes all of this work possible. We’re asking you to activate your membership today because state Democrats are facing a slew of must-win special elections in key states – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November! President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders in statehouses across the country is critical to building a better future in states like yours.That’s why we rely on grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and help ensure we elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. But that only happens when folks like you step up and chip in what they can. body:
Our chance to defeat Ted Cruz >>
| _A BOMBSHELL new poll just dropped in the Texas Senate race:_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47981?t=6&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS) [We can overtake MAGA Ted Cruz in the polls and BOOST Democrats like Colin Allred to victory with your help! PLEASE, rush $7 towards our $15,000 Save the Senate Fund by MIDNIGHT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47981?t=7&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS) | [**FLIP TEXAS BLUE: CHIP IN $7 TO SEND REPUBLICANS LIKE TED CRUZ PACKING! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47981?t=8&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS)
---
**REMEMBER:** Ted Cruz won his last election by just _2.5 points._ He’s more vulnerable than ever — and his seat was just ranked one of the most flippable in the country!
[Defeating MAGA Ted Cruz is the KEY to saving and expanding our fragile one-seat Senate majority, so we can’t let this momentum go to waste! Rush $7 NOW to elect Democrats like Colin Allred »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/47981?t=9&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Together we can win,

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8578%2E878179%2E73u2lS).**

Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America. name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Recidivist Violence.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bartonfordesoto/recidivist-violence?e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| |
---
| We see national headlines nearly every day of violent offenders who commit new crimes while out on bond for previous violent acts. Messiah Nantwi in New York, Kirkland Warren in Washington State, Enrique Toledo in Florida, William McKay in California; from sea to shining sea, there are violent criminals committing acts of violence while out on bail.

And this insidious behavior is no longer just a metropolitan problem. It has quickly infiltrated the rural communities across America. Last September, much of DeSoto County was on edge as Ezekiel Kelly brutalized Memphis, choosing victims at random, killing three and shooting three others. Kelly, previously accused in Memphis of two attempted murders in 2020, was allowed to plea guilty to aggravated assault. He received a three-year sentence, but he was released in March 2022, 11 months into that three-year sentence — a mere six months prior to his rampage. **DeSoto County is not immune to this type of recidivist violence. ** Fast forward nine months ...

Olive Branch Police arrested two men, Brandon Brinkley and Marco Gentry, for an armed robbery and attempted murder that happened June 14, 2023. The sad part is both shooters should have still been in jail. One shooter (Gentry) was out on bond for attempted murder in DeSoto County stemming from a Horn Lake shooting in November 2022. The other shooter (Brinkley) had a previous DeSoto County shooting charge dropped by the DA’s office a mere 35 days before the June 14th shooting in Olive Branch. The police officers that work hard to protect us, often times risking their own safety, should not have to catch the same violent offenders over and over again. The current criminal justice reforms are not working because they have allowed repeat offenders to go free. They have allowed especially violent offenders an opportunity for release via bail bonds. It is time to tighten restrictions for pretrial release of violent offenders. For the offenders that are convicted, it is time for honest sentencing, where violent and repeat offenders actually serve their time.
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton
_Sent from my iPhone_

PS: _If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - [you can click here to unsubscribe](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=15308d2a1a&e=3c5d31b5ad)[.](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=9828185a3f&e=3c5d31b5ad)_

Deciding when and how much to invest for retirement is one of most important financial decisions people will make in their lifetime. However, it can also be one of the most complex and challenging ones with several tax rules, fund types and investment plans to utilize. One such plan, available to members of the uniformed services and federal government employees, is the Thrift Savings Plan (TSP).
[See It Here](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zole4uml90g6261rfnug46of8bni99t765prcqu0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr2d9j6kprct9jmkrncst66uqrf8j0c9j6f833cui69pt4mepjfcjlmgon9dtjmgorb8rk6mg7fc9m6gr72td1mkq32djlktqb2d9lk9q37dpkmerjb89kmpr3atjmeirr7dd7meqq6d9h6kp78cdlksrr6t9ieeqracthepqq4t9heip7addl6eonb83hmgprf8h1k8gn48n24hhm1pr2c5g61pj0s8iv0)

name: Al Canata
subject: The Founding Fathers would be shocked at our taxes!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.)
Hello Fellow American,

With the utmost respect for the principles set forth by our Founding Fathers, we turn to you today to advocate for the preservation of your hard-earned money.

As James Madison once eloquently stated,
_"I cannot undertake to lay my finger on that article of the Constitution which granted a right to Congress of expending, on objects of benevolence, the money of their constituents."_
These timeless words from one of our nation's esteemed architects serve as a reminder of the importance of fiscal responsibility and the protection of taxpayer rights.

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU).

At NTU, we are steadfast in our commitment to championing these principles, defending your financial freedom, and holding our elected representatives accountable. NTU has played a major role in signature taxpayer victories over the past five decades. We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s, culminating in the Taxpayer First Act of 2019. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform, and now we’re working to make the benefits from that law permanent.

**However, our work is far from complete, and we need your support now more than ever!**

The challenges facing taxpayers have become increasingly complex, with the government continuously expanding its reach into our wallets. Excessive spending, wasteful programs, and burdensome regulations threaten our economic stability and erode the very fabric of our democratic values.

NTU is working to persuade Congress to support debt reduction and reduce spending so that tomorrow’s generation won’t face crushing tax burdens or lower living standards. The recent bipartisan “debt ceiling deal” to rein in the growth of part of the federal budget is only the beginning of what needs to be done.

[By contributing to the NTU, you can help us continue our vital mission to promote limited government and fiscal responsibility. Will you click here and send an urgent donation of $100, $35, or even $10 today to support our mission >>](http://trk.readactnews.)

The federal budget is out of control. We have reached the statutory debt limit of $31.4 trillion and have nearly exhausted all extraordinary measures to continue funding our responsibilities. Our fiscal trajectory must be changed.

A continuation of our reckless fiscal policies would mean more debt, fewer jobs, higher interest rates, and a less prosperous America.

We can't allow that to happen.

With your generous support, we will:
1. **Advocate for Lower Taxes:** We will tirelessly fight against unnecessary tax hikes, advocating for tax policies that foster economic growth, job creation, and individual prosperity.

2. **Combat Government Waste:** We will hold elected officials accountable for their stewardship of taxpayer dollars, identifying and exposing wasteful spending and inefficiencies at every level of government.

3. **Promote Transparency:** We will push for greater transparency and accountability in government budgets, ensuring that your tax dollars are used efficiently and responsibly.

4. **Empower Taxpayers:** We will provide you with the tools, resources, and information necessary to make informed decisions about your personal finances and engage with policymakers effectively.

Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a tangible difference in our fight to protect your hard-earned money. We rely on the generosity of individuals like you to fund critical research, launch advocacy campaigns, and amplify our voices in the halls of power.

[Please make an urgent donation to help NTU advocate for taxpayers. _Click here to donate today_ _._](http://trk.readactnews.)

We’re known on Capitol Hill as **“Voice of America’s Taxpayers”** because we have been behind every major taxpayer victory in the last five decades. But until we make sure that Congress is fiscally responsible toward every part of the federal budget and that the well-being – _**the rights**_ – of taxpayers always come first, our mission remains as important as ever!

Your urgent donation can make a lasting impact and secure a brighter financial future for all Americans.

Please join us in preserving the vision of our Founding Fathers and ensuring that future generations inherit a government that respects the rights and prosperity of taxpayers.

To make your donation to the National Taxpayers Union today, please click any button below. Every dollar counts and brings us one step closer to achieving our shared goals.

Please support NTU’s fight in Congress by donating any amount you can generously send today.
[Donate $10 >>](http://trk.readactnews.__68YeZhWeYgtsmg)

[Donate $35 >>](http://trk.readactnews.)

[Donate $50 >>](http://trk.readactnews.-oUrr1m_J5Cw)

[Donate $100 >>](http://trk.readactnews._Jw)

[Donate $250 >>](http://trk.readactnews.-eA9A)

[Donate $500 >>](http://trk.readactnews.)

[Donate $1,000 >>](http://trk.readactnews.)

[Donate Any Amount >>](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNzEtMzhmZDE3MGI1OGRiNDBkM2IzZDlmMmY3OWU5NmFhY2UiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL25hdGlvbmFsLXRheHBheWVycy11bmlvbi9hZS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX3Rlcm09UkFOTzA2MjAyMDIzIn0/190lqCEwqf8kSgqKCMnVww)
With your support, we can protect the rights of taxpayers across the nation.

Thank you for being a stalwart defender of fiscal responsibility and limited government.

Al Canata
Vice President of Strategic Partnerships
National Taxpayers Union

_NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels._
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNzEtMzhmZDE3MGI1OGRiNDBkM2IzZDlmMmY3OWU5NmFhY2UiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/cNbSpG5z1k24ga6ROTwTtw) to unsubscribe.

name: Caleb Max
subject: Vote in Today's Primary
body:
Polling Stations Open 6 am to 7 pm
| | |
---
| Please Support Bill Woolf for State Senate and Jeanine Lawson for Chair of Prince William County Board
---
|
---
| |
---
| Friends,
As many of you know, today is election day in Virginia. We have many great candidates facing off in elections for State Senate, House of Delegates, as well as local races such as Supervisor.
I am taking a minute to implore you to exercise your civic duty and vote for those individuals who you believe will best represent your values, as well as be able to win against Democrats in key elections this Fall.
As many of you know, Governor Youngkin's agenda is on the line this November and we must take back our State Senate. To that end, I would ask that you support my friend Bill Woolf in Senate District 30. He has been in public service his whole life first as a police officer, then standing up for victims in the U.S. Department of Justice, and most recently running a non-profit that works to end human trafficking. The trafficking of humans happens in Virginia on a level, which would shock most people. Bill Woolf is a strong voice we need in the Virginia Senate. Please vote and donate for him. His website is: [https://secure.winred.com/woolf-for-senate/donate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Zi_RvUI0HNOrXiMJfF6E9sCUOgjiXlp99bE_HD6VD4sEEsqYLzFqv2aGjrVyOoRrbrnCAoI1JLMY4bofqpTLkSMsTyfw_kxI0XG7r0ZqxRvXxAd267qXkEQGXRYVnv43JPFeXKRKRRQZcLE9R_yXS6Oc6eG4G_AMHQismUwXLvOl0kvjLgwNA==&c=bt-EEwZ3fQJKsbt66CZIj3m5pQ76jGHItENSHQ8qfmQsc6vM8rRPZA==&ch=GU94h1HB84hSt3Ht6ufnGWiuByTrQilWMkd8ozmFydozJqUwod2faA==)
Also, my friend and former primary opponent Jeanine Lawson has a primary today. Jeanine has been a champion for the people of her Brentsville District, as well as all of Prince William County. From fighting data centers to advocating to save the Manassas Battlefield, Jeanine has always answered the call of duty. Under Chair Ann Wheeler Prince William County crime has increased 70% and taxpayers in Prince William have seen average increases of $2,200 per household in the last four years. We need Jeanine Lawson as Chairwoman. Find her website here: [https://jeaninelawson.com/](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Zi_RvUI0HNOrXiMJfF6E9sCUOgjiXlp99bE_HD6VD4sEEsqYLzFqv2aGjrVyOoRTokow62gzvHUlxod9hXQfeqAjmbNviDzmDstboJAn3sv0cC7fGNqrhIcsQff3pDQ1gdkTM7WFeI7irVhza1JGA==&c=bt-EEwZ3fQJKsbt66CZIj3m5pQ76jGHItENSHQ8qfmQsc6vM8rRPZA==&ch=GU94h1HB84hSt3Ht6ufnGWiuByTrQilWMkd8ozmFydozJqUwod2faA==)
I have heard many people making strategic decisions to vote in Democratic party processes. While this can be an effective method of taking out Democrats we do not like, I would urge caution playing party politics versus working hard for, donating to, and rallying around the best Conservative candidates.
I look forward to continuing to work with these candidates and all the great conservative activists across the Commonwealth to win the November 2023 elections.
God Bless, Caleb
---
| |
---
| | [LEARN MORE ABOUT BILL'S CAMPAIGN HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Zi_RvUI0HNOrXiMJfF6E9sCUOgjiXlp99bE_HD6VD4sEEsqYLzFqv2aGjrVyOoRSb7UHrA_c67mj4kgOr3eFXBGizwlm0kwq60ZUhee_hiriMMSsbMpHYT6_o_de2ip4BvZ4uecGU-I_omdvI_8Gg==&c=bt-EEwZ3fQJKsbt66CZIj3m5pQ76jGHItENSHQ8qfmQsc6vM8rRPZA==&ch=GU94h1HB84hSt3Ht6ufnGWiuByTrQilWMkd8ozmFydozJqUwod2faA==)

clean_body: Polling Stations Open 6 am to 7 pm | | | | Please Support Bill Woolf for State Senate and Jeanine Lawson for Chair of Prince William County Board | | | | Friends, As many of you know, today is election day in Virginia. We have many great candidates facing off in elections for State Senate, House of Delegates, as well as local races such as Supervisor. I am taking a minute to implore you to exercise your civic duty and vote for those individuals who you believe will best represent your values, as well as be able to win against Democrats in key elections this Fall. As many of you know, Governor Youngkin's agenda is on the line this November and we must take back our State Senate. To that end, I would ask that you support my friend Bill Woolf in Senate District 30. He has been in public service his whole life first as a police officer, then standing up for victims in the U.S. Department of Justice, and most recently running a non-profit that works to end human trafficking. The trafficking of humans happens in Virginia on a level, which would shock most people. Bill Woolf is a strong voice we need in the Virginia Senate. Please vote and donate for him. His website is: == Also, my friend and former primary opponent Jeanine Lawson has a primary today. Jeanine has been a champion for the people of her Brentsville District, as well as all of Prince William County. From fighting data centers to advocating to save the Manassas Battlefield, Jeanine has always answered the call of duty. Under Chair Ann Wheeler Prince William County crime has increased 70% and taxpayers in Prince William have seen average increases of $2,200 per household in the last four years. We need Jeanine Lawson as Chairwoman. Find her website here: == I have heard many people making strategic decisions to vote in Democratic party processes. While this can be an effective method of taking out Democrats we do not like, I would urge caution playing party politics versus working hard for, donating to, and rallying around the best Conservative candidates. I look forward to continuing to work with these candidates and all the great conservative activists across the Commonwealth to win the November 2023 elections. God Bless, Caleb | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | Caleb Max | PO Box 404, Herndon, VA 20170 | | Sent by mailto:maxforcongress@gmail.com in collaboration with

name: American Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669711%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qp5sd4FIeZjYjRrkG8TNuQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669712%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7I%2flyzqeNNYNDHcz1AE1lg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669713%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QBwZC9HzU6hAuauQ9B%2fNlA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf6tq59kmanl7n2u12ak0eetbksgj97lbclgogn0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imeo34cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsb9c63a4hvpgnr2augi8f8qb5p1p0jjcuqvoc5g_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imeo34cdh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaug24uk8flipo2pacspv71acob71ikat007eoeg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imeo34cdh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1kl9o117o3v43hd4bc5e58ri60e4g7fr88igsso_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imeo34cdh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

name: Shahid Buttar
subject: Juneteenth remains aspirational
body:
Listen now (10 min) | America celebrates a holiday commemorating a supposed victory for human rights that our nation, in fact, has yet to secure
| |
---|---|---
| | | [Open in app](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/juneteenth-remains-aspirational?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store) or [online](https://substack..0bkK2asJT_CEDA_851A2vKcYH6Sy1ZiZS-AuSCW-zzs?)
---
[](https://substack..0bkK2asJT_CEDA_851A2vKcYH6Sy1ZiZS-AuSCW-zzs?)
---
---
| |
Jun 20
---
[Juneteenth remains aspirational](https://substack..0bkK2asJT_CEDA_851A2vKcYH6Sy1ZiZS-AuSCW-zzs?)
America celebrates a holiday commemorating a supposed victory for human rights that our nation, in fact, has yet to secure
| | [Listen to preview](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129552550&utm_source=podcast-email&play_audio=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NTUyNTUwLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcyNDMyNzgsImV4cCI6MTY4OTgzNTI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mfkzg15keHr2AhazBkXBf1folOw2fo9mL8AeInbpSGM&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email#play)|
---|---|---
---
---
[](https://substack.com/profile/15484941-shahid-buttar)| | Shahid Buttar| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129552550&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NTUyNTUwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTY4NzI0MzI3OCwiZXhwIjoxNjg5ODM1Mjc4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.34pegojMaKIOAZH8AZx8skpnYIMcjGZeqSQQJruU6yY&utm_medium=email&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129552550&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NTUyNTUwLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcyNDMyNzgsImV4cCI6MTY4OTgzNTI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mfkzg15keHr2AhazBkXBf1folOw2fo9mL8AeInbpSGM&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129552550&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NTUyNTUwLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcyNDMyNzgsImV4cCI6MTY4OTgzNTI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mfkzg15keHr2AhazBkXBf1folOw2fo9mL8AeInbpSGM)
Described by the Smithsonian as "our nation's second Independence Day," [Juneteenth](https://substack.cc/redirect/b5165f77-ad82-4cd1-962d-c849c2c5ba70?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is the most recent federal holiday to gain formal recognition. It commemorates the approximate date--more than two years after President Lincoln declared the [Emancipation Proclamation](https://substack.cc/redirect/0381931f-2d57-4236-8073-31bc54bbc5e2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--when enslaved people in Texas were notified by Union soldiers that they were free.
The Emancipation Proclamation was more aspirational than meaningful when it was issued, and Juneteenth remains that way today. Most Americans cling to feel-good versions of history, however, rather than acknowledge the reality that remains all too visible under our noses.
By all means, celebrate Juneteenth. But don't pretend that slavery ever ended in the United States.
### Then and Now
The Emancipation Proclamation purported to free only Black Americans enslaved in rebel states that rejected Washington's jurisdiction. Because Lincoln explicitly declined to free slaves who lived in states that remained in the Union, it was legally meaningless when issued (although it attained tremendous significance in areas later liberated by the Union army).
Some have argued that Lincoln's legal authority to liberate enslaved Black Americans did not extend into Union, since he issued the proclamation under his authority as Commander-in-Chief rather than through any legislative process necessary to compel an interference with property rights recognized by states. To pretend that a president's power is weaker at home than it is in warring states, however, is farcically foolish.
150 years later, Juneteenth was adopted as a national holiday in 2021, continuing Joe Biden's habit of highlighting acts of political theater while doing more or less nothing to guard or advance civil rights in practice. Ultimately, Biden's adoption of Juneteenth as a federal holiday was even more performative than Lincoln's statement setting free slaves in territories that rejected his authority.
While Juneteenth went on to attain tremendous significance during the [all-too-brief Reconstruction period](https://substack.cc/redirect/9938d1e8-defe-42d5-ab82-bb98b794875f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it is widely described today as celebrating an achievement that the United States has, in fact, never embraced: the end of slavery.
Juneteenth is as good a day as any to remember that in 2023, more Americans remain legally enslaved than were held in bondage at the height of the Antebellum South. The 13th Amendment purported to end forced servitude, but notably [preserved it](https://substack.cc/redirect/0d26d520-55c7-46ee-9edd-cfb628f7427e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a condition of punishment.
And the United States imprisons, by far, more people than any country in the world. Despite representing just 2% of the global population, our "land of the free" imprisons 20%--[1 out of 5](https://substack.cc/redirect/1bc726ad-83ef-4d1e-9077-e48547b9d303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--of its prisoners.
| [](https://substack.cc/redirect/6b3edba7-3db1-49eb-879c-a6df3d6cc375?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Original at https://www.prisonpolicy.org/blog/2020/01/16/percent-incarcerated/
The notion that Biden would claim any credit for enshrining Juneteenth as a national holiday is frankly grotesque when considered in light of his policy record as a Senator before [weaseling](https://substack.cc/redirect/16cca036-5d3e-4481-a232-467fbbea213b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his way into the White House. He was the author of the 1993 crime bill that notoriously [swelled](https://substack.cc/redirect/34fcf4e8-958f-4f9b-9685-c09c8ff74aad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the ranks of our nation's prisons, as well as the [quarterback](https://substack.cc/redirect/3ad22cab-ac8a-405f-8c2a-891ea3743288?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the process that put Clarence Thomas on the Supreme Court--reflecting yet again Biden's long history of theatrical nods to the concerns of Black communities while ignoring their needs and interests in practice.
Know anyone else who might appreciate this analysis? Share it!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=129552550&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTI5NTUyNTUwLCJpYXQiOjE2ODcyNDMyNzgsImV4cCI6MTY4OTgzNTI3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mfkzg15keHr2AhazBkXBf1folOw2fo9mL8AeInbpSGM)
### Mass incarceration as labor strategy
Beyond its legally perverse historical origins, mass incarceration is even more disturbing when considered from the standpoint of contemporary economics. Seen through that lens, it is not only a grave abuse of human rights, but also an [industrial labor strategy](https://substack.cc/redirect/0d26d520-55c7-46ee-9edd-cfb628f7427e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with terrifying implications.
America's prison system did not fall from the sky. It is the product of policy choices constructing a network of institutions (including perverse private [prisons-for-profit](https://substack.cc/redirect/d5da4e3b-e690-4aa5-ad04-e1bfacf8cc39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) filled by millions of people who work without the benefit of any labor protections. Many of them were railroaded by [coercive plea bargains](https://substack.cc/redirect/2321e6c7-cfb5-4448-9c61-7fa38e498649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), rather than allowed opportunities to exercise their constitutional rights to an impartial trial and the presumption of innocence.
When Americans wring their hands in the face of Washington's contemporary fascism and cling to the distinction that "we don't have death camps," they might be overlooking that the concentration camps built by Nazi Germany were as much [slave labor camps](https://substack.cc/redirect/86143c5f-6735-4d5c-bfbd-9f187de6157c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as they were death camps. They also conveniently forget that the Nazis found America's "one drop" rule too vicious to replicate, and crafted their genocidal strategy targeting Jews [based on](https://substack.cc/redirect/2cc3af42-8afb-411b-90cb-56acba1f4e29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the genocide of Native Americans by the United States.
Today's slavery-via-penitentiary is at least multiracial.
Those are meager scraps for which too many settle.
By all means, celebrate Juneteenth. But don't pretend that slavery ever ended in the United States.
Want to keep learning? Subscribe for free!
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..WuI3QlknL-kYDqLP0lWCP2ZOkJyvlRqpTlFxKPW0JgQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=129552550)
Paid subscribers can access an audio recording and the lyrics of an electronic dance track that I wrote & co-produced in the wake of the 2014 Ferguson uprising to explain the international connections between policing, arbitrary state violence, and bipartisan U.S. foreign policy.
Thanks for listening!...

name: American Defense News
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6gjc775d8mboaonmi4u218a82uplqt0ctt96cu0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imep72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk4ah1tn782jt6bjv4omfr4bekhat3uhlni7qdo8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9imep72c5h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:

name: American Action News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgm0vqmb7pcq6r24mrefullvjruakip92tglsma0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9im1o76c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

name: Al Canata
subject: The Founding Fathers would be shocked at our taxes!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTcxLWUyYjBlNjc3ZWNlNjRiMmQ5NmQyZGRjMjE0YjgwYThmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL25hdGlvbmFsLXRheHBheWVycy11bmlvbi9hZS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX3Rlcm09RkZPMDYyMDIwMjMifQ/4EnEiRgS-o8TpikohWv0LQ)
Hello Fellow American,

With the utmost respect for the principles set forth by our Founding Fathers, we turn to you today to advocate for the preservation of your hard-earned money.

As James Madison once eloquently stated,
_"I cannot undertake to lay my finger on that article of the Constitution which granted a right to Congress of expending, on objects of benevolence, the money of their constituents."_
These timeless words from one of our nation's esteemed architects serve as a reminder of the importance of fiscal responsibility and the protection of taxpayer rights.

I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU).

At NTU, we are steadfast in our commitment to championing these principles, defending your financial freedom, and holding our elected representatives accountable. NTU has played a major role in signature taxpayer victories over the past five decades. We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s, culminating in the Taxpayer First Act of 2019. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform, and now we’re working to make the benefits from that law permanent.

**However, our work is far from complete, and we need your support now more than ever!**

The challenges facing taxpayers have become increasingly complex, with the government continuously expanding its reach into our wallets. Excessive spending, wasteful programs, and burdensome regulations threaten our economic stability and erode the very fabric of our democratic values.

NTU is working to persuade Congress to support debt reduction and reduce spending so that tomorrow’s generation won’t face crushing tax burdens or lower living standards. The recent bipartisan “debt ceiling deal” to rein in the growth of part of the federal budget is only the beginning of what needs to be done.

[By contributing to the NTU, you can help us continue our vital mission to promote limited government and fiscal responsibility. Will you click here and send an urgent donation of $100, $35, or even $10 today to support our mission >>](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTcxLWUyYjBlNjc3ZWNlNjRiMmQ5NmQyZGRjMjE0YjgwYThmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZS5hbmVkb3QuY29tL25hdGlvbmFsLXRheHBheWVycy11bmlvbi9hZS1hY3Rpb24_dXRtX3Rlcm09RkZPMDYyMDIwMjMifQ/qujD_2tk7BeaA9LQLhDW1Q)

The federal budget is out of control. We have reached the statutory debt limit of $31.4 trillion and have nearly exhausted all extraordinary measures to continue funding our responsibilities. Our fiscal trajectory must be changed.

A continuation of our reckless fiscal policies would mean more debt, fewer jobs, higher interest rates, and a less prosperous America.

We can't allow that to happen.

With your generous support, we will:
1. **Advocate for Lower Taxes:** We will tirelessly fight against unnecessary tax hikes, advocating for tax policies that foster economic growth, job creation, and individual prosperity.

2. **Combat Government Waste:** We will hold elected officials accountable for their stewardship of taxpayer dollars, identifying and exposing wasteful spending and inefficiencies at every level of government.

3. **Promote Transparency:** We will push for greater transparency and accountability in government budgets, ensuring that your tax dollars are used efficiently and responsibly.

4. **Empower Taxpayers:** We will provide you with the tools, resources, and information necessary to make informed decisions about your personal finances and engage with policymakers effectively.

Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a tangible difference in our fight to protect your hard-earned money. We rely on the generosity of individuals like you to fund critical research, launch advocacy campaigns, and amplify our voices in the halls of power.

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. Hello Fellow American, With the utmost respect for the principles set forth by our Founding Fathers, we turn to you today to advocate for the preservation of your hard-earned money. As James Madison once eloquently stated, "I cannot undertake to lay my finger on that article of the Constitution which granted a right to Congress of expending, on objects of benevolence, the money of their constituents." These timeless words from one of our nation's esteemed architects serve as a reminder of the importance of fiscal responsibility and the protection of taxpayer rights. I am Al Canata, Vice President of Strategic Partnerships at the National Taxpayers Union (NTU). At NTU, we are steadfast in our commitment to championing these principles, defending your financial freedom, and holding our elected representatives accountable. NTU has played a major role in signature taxpayer victories over the past five decades. We helped overhaul the federal tax code under President Reagan in 1986. We championed the cause for a “Taxpayer Bill of Rights” in the late 80s and 90s, culminating in the Taxpayer First Act of 2019. In 2017, NTU was the driving force behind the successful push for comprehensive tax reform, and now we’re working to make the benefits from that law permanent. However, our work is far from complete, and we need your support now more than ever! The challenges facing taxpayers have become increasingly complex, with the government continuously expanding its reach into our wallets. Excessive spending, wasteful programs, and burdensome regulations threaten our economic stability and erode the very fabric of our democratic values. NTU is working to persuade Congress to support debt reduction and reduce spending so that tomorrow’s generation won’t face crushing tax burdens or lower living standards. The recent bipartisan “debt ceiling deal” to rein in the growth of part of the federal budget is only the beginning of what needs to be done. The federal budget is out of control. We have reached the statutory debt limit of $31.4 trillion and have nearly exhausted all extraordinary measures to continue funding our responsibilities. Our fiscal trajectory must be changed. A continuation of our reckless fiscal policies would mean more debt, fewer jobs, higher interest rates, and a less prosperous America. We can't allow that to happen. With your generous support, we will: 1. Advocate for Lower Taxes: We will tirelessly fight against unnecessary tax hikes, advocating for tax policies that foster economic growth, job creation, and individual prosperity. 2. Combat Government Waste: We will hold elected officials accountable for their stewardship of taxpayer dollars, identifying and exposing wasteful spending and inefficiencies at every level of government. 3. Promote Transparency: We will push for greater transparency and accountability in government budgets, ensuring that your tax dollars are used efficiently and responsibly. 4. Empower Taxpayers: We will provide you with the tools, resources, and information necessary to make informed decisions about your personal finances and engage with policymakers effectively. Your contribution, no matter the size, makes a tangible difference in our fight to protect your hard-earned money. We rely on the generosity of individuals like you to fund critical research, launch advocacy campaigns, and amplify our voices in the halls of power. We’re known on Capitol Hill as “Voice of America’s Taxpayers” because we have been behind every major taxpayer victory in the last five decades. But until we make sure that Congress is fiscally responsible toward every part of the federal budget and that the well-being – the rights – of taxpayers always come first, our mission remains as important as ever! Your urgent donation can make a lasting impact and secure a brighter financial future for all Americans. Please join us in preserving the vision of our Founding Fathers and ensuring that future generations inherit a government that respects the rights and prosperity of taxpayers. To make your donation to the National Taxpayers Union today, please click any button below. Every dollar counts and brings us one step closer to achieving our shared goals. Please support NTU’s fight in Congress by donating any amount you can generously send today. With your support, we can protect the rights of taxpayers across the nation. Thank you for being a stalwart defender of fiscal responsibility and limited government. Al Canata Vice President of Strategic Partnerships National Taxpayers Union NTU is a 501(c)(4) nonprofit, nonpartisan citizen group whose members work every day for lower taxes and smaller government at all levels. name: Shift WA
subject: FWD: An important announcement
body:
Did you get a chance to read our previous email regarding our summer hiatus and the candidate questionnaire survey?
Starting today, we will be taking a short break to recharge and gear up for the upcoming November elections (and beyond). During this time, we will still be sharing a few items, but our Daily Briefing will be temporarily paused until the entire team returns on July 10th.
If you haven't already, we ask you to participate in our candidate questionnaire survey. Your opinion matters to us, and your insights will play a crucial role in guiding our work moving forward.
To participate in the survey and share the questions you would like to see candidates answer in future voters guides, simply **_[click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940724:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r)_**!
We look forward to resuming our regular work on July 10th!
Thank you,
The Shift WA team
We want to extend another an opportunity for valuable readers like you to participate in shaping our future content. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940725:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We have some important news to share with you! Tomorrow, we will be going on a summer hiatus, taking a short break to recharge and prepare to take on the far Left and mainstream media establishment types leading up to the 2023 November elections (and beyond). We will still be posting a few items, but our Daily Briefing will be temporarily paused until our entire team's return on July 10th. While we are gone, we want to extend another an opportunity for valuable readers like you to participate in shaping our future content. We appreciate your opinion. **_[So- if you have not already - please participate in our candidate questionnaire survey.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940726:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r)_** Simply **_[click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940726:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r)_** to provide us with your input on the questions you would like to see candidates answer in a future voter's guide questionnaires. **[Taking our survey only takes a few minutes of your time, but the insights you provide will have a lasting impact on our work moving forward!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940726:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r)** We look forward to reviewing the survey responses and resuming our regular work on July 10th. Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61940727:WIMBhzDUN:m:1:2610672541:E0AF5E9D472073D44C818C1D05928DFD:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14229718&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWIMBhzDUN).
---

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: This is a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help!
body:
House seat pickup
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teddeb8ba-14d9-45e6-a35b-4e2438402bae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, I got a favor to ask you. [My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just weeks away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e4d422b-d9ae-4412-a6af-1dd2d54cc8e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff367756-778a-404f-a74a-5729bf943322/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc6046ea3-6ca3-40e8-8d85-35fff6bd4d87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. [Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T03b157f8-1206-4fc9-9902-1d5e2b5cf438/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Al **[PS - As you may know, I always end with a P.S. that’s just an excuse for another ask. This is a super important deadline, so please chip in what you can!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T965e6758-d54e-4ace-b2f0-761ffb4a540e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc915aa80-dee4-4776-9786-8a4c6f72432c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/alfrankenforjoshriley1stquarter3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3b4b181f-4c34-43a4-97f7-204472c2cd47&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=3b4b181f-4c34-43a4-97f7-204472c2cd47&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bafbf3eaad4a42c48e96b77727b01ad8&_e=tx5_RUYImh-iETzpMBvnYdPv43BXqFzk7K57L4eZIPlBaVZV1HwHrTm0af8tY9jj9Go7YdbWakoNgDtXgdeZgOwD2Gvx3w4hqWtokhi3e_2BwlS6pvZfNYqgv4qq78NM9M9Sz7w_6riAVvnN4za76bV35CIYBwhr6rK2sJExpC5eLO99HOFUyM7KA9UbgC3JLwZ1xyGLnG8t3obQVou2fcpfuSUZ7RI6OGNozZyKAdphni0SyMDxnuF0Beavn_Bv) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bafbf3eaad4a42c48e96b77727b01ad8&_e=tx5_RUYImh-iETzpMBvnYdPv43BXqFzk7K57L4eZIPlBaVZV1HwHrTm0af8tY9jj9Go7YdbWakoNgDtXgdeZgOwD2Gvx3w4hqWtokhi3e_2vndlTchN96Sd7UCjIUWW72x2LFCDRuxxqcRfyItAHelPPzJeZOO0-iJD2wAPjp4FRohQEViP_HIRWEgcaQt-jBG8VwcVBqV2xuH3x7Hpoq8Zy1JKbs-btGxIstzNWDDI_fn3g8Skz4P8W5-fO-viq) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bafbf3eaad4a42c48e96b77727b01ad8&_e=tx5_RUYImh-iETzpMBvnYdPv43BXqFzk7K57L4eZIPlBaVZV1HwHrTm0af8tY9jj9Go7YdbWakoNgDtXgdeZgOwD2Gvx3w4hqWtokhi3e_3hE8XA3EqFNlEZn1A-7gFmyPhOrfBwsJm5OdOt7lhy3dtYkUpeQ2StV1_Sx2pLSrt6g4VlxldMtHRX33TvIgmoUHbqMt9ZweZa_qbtxAmwwTvmOJrdCmIhF_gQmOlCVxb6ffdf3xeRr_ZgVaBvvIu1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bafbf3eaad4a42c48e96b77727b01ad8&_e=tx5_RUYImh-iETzpMBvnYdPv43BXqFzk7K57L4eZIPlBaVZV1HwHrTm0af8tY9jj9Go7YdbWakoNgDtXgdeZgOwD2Gvx3w4hqWtokhi3e_0rCQ4BFkD0V3CLbkkzE3q-NN5y2vtTizEg6ay4tBfl3a0XhflS3tcBsZNoR_a7wHpU-kL2Al_PSoPf7SrHA8Cf9f4Oh5HpgS_4Mg-T9Us3G-TJIkaEWydqTZfaGd-D-LeetcxcwARVdl4XVM-uojpo)
---

BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln's secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d9f01dd2b3c4bdc992ac243c0e24c00&_e=bO2cMYWSdMUkP0rfO_jgqrcis-d4ovJzNBn--tUfoLL0jTuS99az6cMu4lvfizkRSZulJWCx5xYuwq8gFyKnSQP60lmh1ku1oiXvfEGLodYhTg4dbY3ziGPFRYMygc9mMSSutMOaJSJVmL22lIilzR0PfPTGBJsf2UfPOHr-bTs6CapTeafuvKDVXlxSoGMinyXjgJ3iA0YMiNFH7fg_lhtebYEcdaBWNXp4JQtw96GZJprwzY_kNMghjTDgmJ6hFPOPFKTH-pT_hVJPRYWzOLBgbaTtdQMGHgvvY8dVRxxZ9vm_xcBqNKoTOyXCLy2BjefQ1rWJ6CFGhXn8yShUbyRdZOqBOlmr7HG_YM7xV6vfM_n1eoMcp5rGH70R4wV68iF6U3-x_BLH0VAI7xwuHD0o48vHQtEvegpHQ4lVtJw%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **" Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d9f01dd2b3c4bdc992ac243c0e24c00&_e=bO2cMYWSdMUkP0rfO_jgqrcis-d4ovJzNBn--tUfoLL0jTuS99az6cMu4lvfizkRSZulJWCx5xYuwq8gFyKnSQP60lmh1ku1oiXvfEGLodYhTg4dbY3ziGPFRYMygc9mMSSutMOaJSJVmL22lIilzR0PfPTGBJsf2UfPOHr-bTs6CapTeafuvKDVXlxSoGMinyXjgJ3iA0YMiNFH7fg_lhtebYEcdaBWNXp4JQtw96GZJprwzY_kNMghjTDgmJ6hwel9N8LgCMJnYfolPU2jjg6B3ZxEWz5MpkZ_jz_mCeYu2cG4oMT0lyfzErFgsWaljDfrFm4q3khpTXbedckJDmaoBJ0xvbGATY55K-ezy6FaAzc-yQf7Pq-rx0HCpLbgVLGDtDLpRd7KetCYqUj6RiXqFeJLaMzqCFrlv60dmOA%3D)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6d9f01dd2b3c4bdc992ac243c0e24c00&_e=bO2cMYWSdMUkP0rfO_jgqrcis-d4ovJzNBn--tUfoLL0jTuS99az6cMu4lvfizkRSZulJWCx5xYuwq8gFyKnSQP60lmh1ku1oiXvfEGLodYhTg4dbY3ziGPFRYMygc9mMSSutMOaJSJVmL22lIilzR0PfPTGBJsf2UfPOHr-bTs6CapTeafuvKDVXlxSoGMinyXjgJ3iA0YMiNFH7fg_lhtebYEcdaBWNXp4JQtw96GZJprwzY_kNMghjTDgmJ6h1iPdJrTd9QFotCEja3JFiikoBIGK6ziTSemhSKVb3TYPH_wO0bfrSZcWPfzhLD6M6iofqnpw6vqKvLjPxYGOcI968SJEsuOPZIiAEQxEkGd_Qgm0iz_2zC-8D7HfHO72w-eKqSpXN8ZdNuytcYS2Gf0j3ls1nzClr17bsUJjo_M%3D)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df6ea1d521d46728c0a190e8fb153c9&_e=68StYt-n9K5VxyqG6i2ZlKttRjtUSMJx9CfdGc1hNmAVhHsRVSOdR97y6m-xbBUkIGwGGra1utdrKysEIsbF7kq52uC5-YW_x5Q4iBqWWyPvtwjdYISCCt5SQQDutVGO5Fqvj1o6IzQr9my34CV3VP_PPTyAFl3fjbwLetGrxDY4XsfU_h0vdW7fleyO5C7ExmTXgYnntRTEBiZ0M1Ow3JfVTLHnujSogzrzB5U3rpVPfjBvsiCergVIYp2SjS1fswCB7FNyqsZIetIUijo8IcXzG5oyBx89P0W6vhFAwGWer070a2bsjrPiCcgFdV3ckiBdcNrw3VB2tfyhkBkQTrdv6ZA0O05U8F1ct_MpsIw-js66k5aXZMztSyrrdeSpmy2ttuZT5z-pTgUG9MckCYQ90G7T24FnTyOJicx3Ghk%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df6ea1d521d46728c0a190e8fb153c9&_e=68StYt-n9K5VxyqG6i2ZlKttRjtUSMJx9CfdGc1hNmAVhHsRVSOdR97y6m-xbBUkIGwGGra1utdrKysEIsbF7kq52uC5-YW_x5Q4iBqWWyPvtwjdYISCCt5SQQDutVGO5Fqvj1o6IzQr9my34CV3VP_PPTyAFl3fjbwLetGrxDY4XsfU_h0vdW7fleyO5C7ExmTXgYnntRTEBiZ0M1Ow3JfVTLHnujSogzrzB5U3rpVPfjBvsiCergVIYp2SjS1fswCB7FNyqsZIetIUijo8IVphzIA0iBXzw4FbfxCcDg6nKdau7cpoIuEaVtkugT7sSJLjn32swNHhgS2ss3uVYAPeDtTRqpxU2wafYEy70RTusTrB_g_tUnvMVKmb9e09yLaFSMVZJieNY2TFXzOlXKbfZU0OZPG-sOqoPN75fxU%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df6ea1d521d46728c0a190e8fb153c9&_e=68StYt-n9K5VxyqG6i2ZlKttRjtUSMJx9CfdGc1hNmAVhHsRVSOdR97y6m-xbBUkIGwGGra1utdrKysEIsbF7kq52uC5-YW_x5Q4iBqWWyPvtwjdYISCCt5SQQDutVGO5Fqvj1o6IzQr9my34CV3VP_PPTyAFl3fjbwLetGrxDY4XsfU_h0vdW7fleyO5C7ExmTXgYnntRTEBiZ0M1Ow3JfVTLHnujSogzrzB5U3rpVPfjBvsiCergVIYp2SjS1fswCB7FNyqsZIetIUijo8IWJeUMk83Zl22uMqlKSAoETg1mvTXwJe9C8mHptVKWp7SsCZ1kmK2xAmNtouwAlXwPDGgg7Cai3aCt-x-opJMDhmBCB2Oh_urBlz3jShfzwyCLdhZ87LiSCl4iGRDv-smb2f9gKMDrm4hnkYwNKX6jw%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8df6ea1d521d46728c0a190e8fb153c9&_e=68StYt-n9K5VxyqG6i2ZlKttRjtUSMJx9CfdGc1hNmAVhHsRVSOdR97y6m-xbBUkIGwGGra1utdrKysEIsbF7kq52uC5-YW_x5Q4iBqWWyPvtwjdYISCCt5SQQDutVGO5Fqvj1o6IzQr9my34CV3VP_PPTyAFl3fjbwLetGrxDY4XsfU_h0vdW7fleyO5C7ExmTXgYnntRTEBiZ0M1Ow3JfVTLHnujSogzrzB5U3rpVPfjBvsiCergVIYp2SjS1fswCB7FNyqsZIetIUijo8IcU4yCjjVXCdr-VlETvVa5TeUDiPcCBwWF7rrecCyumox5vkmtfxfgt6-oCrGR_ErwVknWMeEqMxiMbgDVH22ovniuALDkZR8N0WL8AfRHSNART9jDnEwUIrPzBtwDFRPPsjNsGwBNIDzBFMi1LcYz4%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: This Is the Type of Leadership America Needs!
body:
RAMASWAMY: From the Streets of Kensington, PA to a Revival of Our National Identity Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood embodies the epicenter of every failed policy imposed upon the American people, rivaling even the border itself. It stands as a potent symbol, exposing the catastrophic aftermath of a series of ill-conceived and potentially malicious policies. The porous borders, widespread homelessness, unaddressed mental health issues, controversial "safe needle injection sites," diminished law enforcement funding, subpar education system, and the insidious proliferation of fentanyl all show up in Kensington, and all intertwine, weaving a destructive web of inevitable repercussions and hardships for those ensnared within its grasp. Regrettably, a Kensington can be found in nearly every corner of America.
| |

## **RAMASWAMY: From the Streets of Kensington, PA to a Revival of Our National Identity**
Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood embodies the epicenter of every failed policy imposed upon the American people, rivaling even the border itself.
It stands as a potent symbol, exposing the catastrophic aftermath of a series of ill-conceived and potentially malicious policies. The porous borders, widespread homelessness, unaddressed mental health issues, controversial "safe needle injection sites," diminished law enforcement funding, subpar education system, and the insidious proliferation of fentanyl all show up in Kensington, and all intertwine, weaving a destructive web of inevitable repercussions and hardships for those ensnared within its grasp. Regrettably, a Kensington can be found in nearly every corner of America.

clean_body: RAMASWAMY: From the Streets of Kensington, PA to a Revival of Our National Identity Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood embodies the epicenter of every failed policy imposed upon the American people, rivaling even the border itself. It stands as a potent symbol, exposing the catastrophic aftermath of a series of ill-conceived and potentially malicious policies. The porous borders, widespread homelessness, unaddressed mental health issues, controversial "safe needle injection sites," diminished law enforcement funding, subpar education system, and the insidious proliferation of fentanyl all show up in Kensington, and all intertwine, weaving a destructive web of inevitable repercussions and hardships for those ensnared within its grasp. Regrettably, a Kensington can be found in nearly every corner of America. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? | | | Jun 20 | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- RAMASWAMY: From the Streets of Kensington, PA to a Revival of Our National Identity Philadelphia's Kensington neighborhood embodies the epicenter of every failed policy imposed upon the American people, rivaling even the border itself. It stands as a potent symbol, exposing the catastrophic aftermath of a series of ill-conceived and potentially malicious policies. The porous borders, widespread homelessness, unaddressed mental health issues, controversial "safe needle injection sites," diminished law enforcement funding, subpar education system, and the insidious proliferation of fentanyl all show up in Kensington, and all intertwine, weaving a destructive web of inevitable repercussions and hardships for those ensnared within its grasp. Regrettably, a Kensington can be found in nearly every corner of America. # TUESDAY, JUNE 20, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** Today we celebrate the Great Seal of America, with its iconic depiction of an American bald eagle clutching 13 olive branches and 13 arrows. The Continental Congress adopted the Seal on June 20, 1782. In today's edition, we wrote about the desperate hunt for a missing tourist submarine in the North Atlantic, Apple's battle to stop companies from using pictures of apples, and an astonishingly short video of a young man solving a Rubik's Cube in just three seconds.

Have thoughts on what we can do better? [Please send us a note](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover)**** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas!
