## Hunt is On for Missing Titanic-Tour Submersible
The U.S. Coast Guard is [racing against time](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtuwzAMAL_G3hxQ1MPOoKFLtnTtaNAS5bCV7UBSE_Tvi3TueLjlcB_X-UqSZV_faWPf0jFTaPLgGdyAMKCesY8-MSPrnr1y04gOEU1_82QmVPasIKRRTVNa9JlwGU1kNJOyrhePgBocggKjAE5hSdqqyI5JW5NMZ4CjtKOcPg_Z241T_jkeXE7h2Prsb63da6ffOrx0eKH7zs_6Ui8oTULmDi9NGu0Shmfh8EUrD5vUKvs61O9l41JlyTw4TBQ5jWQtJQBE1jGMNqbJIdmg-uLj_Sk5S3VjZ2DdSPJfRft_ym8AAAD__8N0YpY) to find a missing tourist submarine that carries people to see the wreckage of the Titanic.

The small submarine disappeared Sunday afternoon and has only 96 hours of oxygen supply. Five people are aboard the sub, including a British executive and a French naval commander.

Oceangate, the company running the tours, [charges $250,000](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8Gd1gwYJIUFNfQ5dorLWKP7clhiGAca_9-la23f9J7ev_u4z1Sorz-jTt6XsoYJ6Y3jspJUBLMCN3sF0RA06HX7noBBwC223y8KDR4dQPaGZQZtLFW3wBhGtwVF9ORBwVGOVBaWa1UPz0WM-gZHUYz2MUKq3AmLrV_Fsq84ZK-yhtrP5W9S35jfjVh_ggIAsJ5nj1vuB6xzhTzhxEQjv8y49kEhI9LQHgeWUDQNwGBiWOmSXI5KjWW7XjssVJGuVNrlFeZS-VNRk4xM01d9fPrpJSouYuwat0jpZ8W_n3NdwAAAP__BZpltQ) a ticket for a seven-night expedition to the Titanic.
## Ukraine Drives Russians From Eight Villages
Ukraine says its two-week-old counter-offensive [has driven Russian forces](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DGTsyAQxvFPg906uCAmBcXb2OVtr3QQF90LkQxgnHz7m1x97fM0v_l_3aab48j7-t89yNaQJucrv2iSBlACqgmbxQYiJNWQ7cxlQIOIutns7BbjB2986AZN_ewvZOb-Os8XJa_K-4YtSlTSoOyk7qRs_RxU3y1kyKleBy20pIVryu134r1uFOI7vSi3Pj2aaLdan0WofwJHgeN5nm2mo1Iun_-zpBwXgSMdOT1J4Hjcs-OdoLh3AeJ1q_DiGN1KBTJVd6cd8lEKux1Cyp4K1DPBSXQv8LGCNNBdBY5Ntsvz5Bi5mEFouT4cx19W_bvSTwAAAP__Ym9qwQ) out of eight villages on the heavily fortified route to the Azov Sea coast.

The advance by Kyiv has now moved 4.5 miles [into Russian lines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGSwiAUAL-GdGTggeQsUtikOm0tMwgP804CDhAz_v2NV1-1xTY7ez3PZ0uR0v1iVxxbyLN1jV44C8NBcFAzdH4MiICqw1GarwEMAOhuGYUeglfucPMO_WCcO0ppndFSDkdj1dDRCAKUMCCk0FKI3t2COkiPBq066KCZFuip5dL_ZEptwRDf-YWld3nt4ri09qxMnRhMDKZ93_u1po9jMGHiW2UwJdw_2HOJnsG0PYqlhNzlLTUsOQRMlV7IV_vAyhe0frdvTonXvLWFV2qbbZQTd3l9RnK2oec5cbS1YUk8lJwag8kWfjpJ932_XLsy-udOMVI1A9PivlqKf8nt_4O_AQAA__-LbHXY) over two weeks, capturing 44 square miles of contested land.

Ukrainian defense officials said their "biggest blow" was still to come, despite tough Russian resistance.
## How Much Money Makes You Feel Rich?
A new survey from Charles Schwab shows that Americans think [$2.2 million is the magic number ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGu4yAQAL8Gd1jrheCkoLjGXa690sJmCXuHTQQkPv_9U179uilGGmn-3Oe748T747fbyLaQZ7c2ftMMRiJIVDN23gYiJNWRHcx1RIOIuot2GGFBusG4mCtq5YNfHY7-gniDAcLSsUVABQZhAD0A9OsS1GXwZMipiw5aaCDPLZf-b-a9RQrpzG8q_Zq3LtnY2rMK9UvgJHA6jqMP-f_yqrxTrR9H4JQ4UG1nIoGTz_LML9ki7_8-VEgWXqOMVKjKI7om3UaFV7dXWd3ZFeufB6fE1YxCw2NznL7b7ecVXwEAAP__2zJiHw)to feel wealthy.

At the same time, 48 percent of Americans who say they already feel wealthy actually have a net worth of $550,000.

The Schwab annual Modern Wealth Survey shows that most Americans don't measure wealth only by money. Nearly two-thirds say having [good relationships with their loved ones](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskUGPmzAQhX8N3AaZgTjpgcO2K9QesofuSjlGA35eXBkc2YaUf19l1V6qvc68T_qe3uV8PYvzbnl_kRldtuEqY3YbrkoTK-LmyqXpLMBoSnS1Ph1ZM3NbTh2GwfBwEGX5i8URRrMcjeKTwqludF26jhU3SrOqVVsrVY2DbQ61gYY0h9a2RatgXA6x-hXckidYv4cNsRrDXPpuyvmWiuap4L7g_haRUgxhrmQIa07jdJfhkfz3owgPSUj_HwruHyIF968fUKJzMIgLXSA-T_S6xg07_cQG8YleINHv9F28pWDpaUZ0oyyJesD_Zfava6aLyxMJvd1dyvQ2YafnsGQ6Q9IaQT8yuYWeg_cSE9E3LPmhZmBl9bmSdPtdxs7c7s57l_SxaNX7LM5_tM-fj_EnAAD__08bkDE) better describes real wealth.

clean_body: The U.S. Coast Guard is racing against time to find a missing tourist submarine that carries people to see the wreckage of the Titanic. | | | | | | TUESDAY, JUNE 20, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we celebrate the Great Seal of America, with its iconic depiction of an American bald eagle clutching 13 olive branches and 13 arrows. The Continental Congress adopted the Seal on June 20, 1782. In today's edition, we wrote about the desperate hunt for a missing tourist submarine in the North Atlantic, Apple's battle to stop companies from using pictures of apples, and an astonishingly short video of a young man solving a Rubik's Cube in just three seconds. Have thoughts on what we can do better? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback+for+The+Flyover** and let us know. We read every email and value your ideas! If this is your first time reading The Flyover, and make sure you don't miss our next edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . Enjoying the Flyover? Take a moment to check out today's sponsor, | Hunt is On for Missing Titanic-Tour Submersible The U.S. Coast Guard is to find a missing tourist submarine that carries people to see the wreckage of the Titanic. The small submarine disappeared Sunday afternoon and has only 96 hours of oxygen supply. Five people are aboard the sub, including a British executive and a French naval commander. Oceangate, the company running the tours, a ticket for a seven-night expedition to the Titanic. Ukraine Drives Russians From Eight Villages Ukraine says its two-week-old counter-offensive out of eight villages on the heavily fortified route to the Azov Sea coast. The advance by Kyiv has now moved 4.5 miles over two weeks, capturing 44 square miles of contested land. Ukrainian defense officials said their "biggest blow" was still to come, despite tough Russian resistance. How Much Money Makes You Feel Rich? A new survey from Charles Schwab shows that Americans think feel wealthy. At the same time, 48 percent of Americans who say they already feel wealthy actually have a net worth of $550,000. The Schwab annual Modern Wealth Survey shows that most Americans don't measure wealth only by money. Nearly two-thirds say having better describes real wealth. clean_body: It's no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned | | | FROM THE DESK OF BEN STEIN | Is Your Retirement At Risk? | | Rising interest rates. Skyrocketing inflation. Exploding debt. Global chaos. A looming recession. It's no wonder Americans are becoming more and more concerned about their savings and investments. That's why I wrote my newest report... | | | Protecting Your Retirement From Recessions & Depressions | Lessons From My Father and The Great Depression | | This shows YOU how you could protect your retirement savings before it's too late. It reveals... Two critical lessons from my late father and economist, Herbert Stein. How everyday Americans are ruining their retirements (and how they could stop the bleeding). The time-tested strategies my father and I have have both used to battle recessions and depressions. Plus, so much more! All you have to do is and a copy will be sent to your doorstep ASAP. | | | | Don't wait until it's too late. and learn how you could protect everything you've worked for! Best regards, Ben Stein Author, Actor, Economist Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4171a89401d41068f084b68ffd43d2f&_e=hHsL-jLOSTIM-SUUuIOmsvL1IzFAcXTfRypTTtKtpKYqVOj8INUt0aiGAAD9-WWxzbMh2xau9pMbyZ4zXK2B0l93zGp6-2jm_u4t5dvozekxMATo8jG-9YRH_qi4ltYQ2M6L3IazK4yA2v2tr1F6RClkvATb8c2dBSHLBR0cGwbcnRQcqI57zc79IUpicTjRlaJavG0zN_X3YQKNUjQQnzABFAsha9D9dIN3HDtXQxSQupq4pwtYPfJ_PnLBWsRm) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4171a89401d41068f084b68ffd43d2f&_e=hHsL-jLOSTIM-SUUuIOmsvL1IzFAcXTfRypTTtKtpKYqVOj8INUt0aiGAAD9-WWxzbMh2xau9pMbyZ4zXK2B0l93zGp6-2jm_u4t5dvozenihy3Nlj6MrCNtX2f3sm_iPeIqYXN4AOS7dwsJ8dlEidIJ8f3Gt5Y0nBacGdSnmDrK-6mEWq0MXmVzldvbi9gsjasaLLaUXa7r8cUjpL4kYeI0b_QTLCkv8qzQqRE1i2YWYguuGMhCVokKQW0bEIwy) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4171a89401d41068f084b68ffd43d2f&_e=hHsL-jLOSTIM-SUUuIOmsvL1IzFAcXTfRypTTtKtpKYqVOj8INUt0aiGAAD9-WWxzbMh2xau9pMbyZ4zXK2B0l93zGp6-2jm_u4t5dvozenW_59m0KLU-FWRRxxYHDsT-EucvLibnuj-0_M6DT55r19Nbw5LvMZEW1f3EdUZ4w-6n-weet5MIIw8vRIkEpvZRpB8-N6ps3-CGQQys0kY_EljI1QzNywmncPiGlRJvc6JpaTvsQQXDDoaSq7R7h4Q) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4171a89401d41068f084b68ffd43d2f&_e=hHsL-jLOSTIM-SUUuIOmsvL1IzFAcXTfRypTTtKtpKYqVOj8INUt0aiGAAD9-WWxzbMh2xau9pMbyZ4zXK2B0l93zGp6-2jm_u4t5dvozekYrVnktJIsDhcTqHKGrrXWnjm9CeBmSjWyWaYWy4uJPdYXJMJKUGLRm20wC_f9Z54wtTlyzWcIwHIjj1BnmqEPpSyah0b-YCGhizIjxrFGV2GKWi8N-nILgn-LTToMUzcArFX4Ok-JaqgQidJedqPW)

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Tell Congress to reduce greenhouse gas emissions
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831579?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Children going HUNGRY during school lunchtime!****[Tell Congress to support schools in providing healthy meals to students!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831580?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** For many students, school lunches are their**only meal for the day!** But many cash-strapped schools are unable to provide sufficient options to feed students who follow vegetarian or plant-based diets for religious, ethical, health, or other reasons. Some students report being left with nothing to eat but nut butter and jelly every day. The Healthy Future Students and Earth Act would help provide schools with the funding they need to offer healthy plant-based options to our next generation of leaders. **But we need your help to build support and pass it through Congress -- help us reach our goal of 9,374 more signatures![Demand support for students who need healthy school meal options before 11:59 pm TONIGHT >>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831581?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831582?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Students understand their futures will be defined by how we respond to the climate crisis today. That’s why more and more youth are turning to plant-based diets -- food production contributes to **ONE-THIRD** of climate-warming emissions.**Animal-based foods create TWICE the emissions than plant-based foods.**
Plant-based meals are healthier for students,**reducing the risk of heart disease, cancer, and diabetes.** Veggie-focused diets can also boost academic performance and address educational inequities.
Congress could improve the health of our students and the planet with this bill. **But every second we wait, more students are left without the meals they need! [Please, Friend, take just 30 seconds to send a message to your representative and PROTECT student health and the planet from climate change!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831583?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) **
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1831582?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Chloë Waterman
Climate-friendly food senior program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Conservative Direct
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWlseWzD0N

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWlseWzD0N

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: Anthony Bellotti, White Coat Waste Project
subject: The government forced you to pay for this
body:
The heartless white coats killed and dissected these dogs

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26981%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MJJjbCSUzv7mscKyfQOR1Q&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, The U.S. government’s funding of gain-of-function experiments in the Wuhan Lab -- which many experts believe likely caused the COVID pandemic -- is the most infamous and dangerous waste of taxpayer dollars we’ve uncovered. _But, the National Institutes of Health’s deplorable animal experiments go far beyond bats, China, and COVID. _ **With YOUR tax dollars, the federal government is giving dogs cocaine, infesting beagles with biting flies and ticks, and even cutting off these puppies’ vocal cords so they can’t cry in the lab.** Every year, there are more than 40,000 animals locked in federal labs, and the government's white coats typically kill survivors -- even the healthy adoptable ones -- rather than let taxpayers adopt them, or retire them to sanctuaries. [**Will you help the White Coat Waste Project fight to save the lives of lab animal survivors, including dogs like Violet? Please sign our urgent national petition to support Violet’s Law right away.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26982%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=se2dL0AJBOPchF4uErSAMQ&sysid=1)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26983%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t51F8S94J7gKmFq%2f6Uirug&sysid=1)
---
The House and Senate have re-introduced the bipartisan **Violet’s Law** (S 707/HR 1465). **The bill is named after a hound -- named Violet (formerly gov't ID #CEGMBN) -- who was saved from a taxpayer-funded lab by our team.**
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26984%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ym9dD288r7oh15dX7p575g&sysid=1)
---
When Violet was rescued, she was scared for months -- terrified to explore her house or go outside. But, with assistance, Violet learned to embrace her new life, and now enjoys kisses and scratches ... NOT being poked and prodded by government white coats. _But most animals aren’t as fortunate as Violet. _ Records obtained by the White Coat Waste Project show that the National Institutes of Health and the University of Iowa rounded up more than a dozen abandoned PETS, strapped containers full of hungry sand flies to their skin, and locked the discarded dogs in cages so the _**flies would eat them alive**_.
The heartless white coats killed and dissected these dogs ... then admitted to our investigators that they destroyed many of the documents describing the experiments.
And this is just ONE experiment of many your tax dollars are funding every year! **_Those animals who are lucky enough to survive these heinous experiments -- and wasteful spending -- of our government are usually slaughtered and incinerated._** Thanks to our work at the White Coat Waste Project, the Department of Veterans Affairs, the Department of Defense, the Food and Drug Administration, and the National Institutes of Health have created some retirement policies for lab animals ... but not all federal bureaucrats are on board. [**Your signature on this national petition today will help us show Congress overwhelming support from the American people to demand the federal government retire and re-home ALL animals from their cruel and wasteful taxpayer-funded labs.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26995%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=45Th3tkyUHWz7BZU6hX9TQ&sysid=1)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26983%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t51F8S94J7gKmFq%2f6Uirug&sysid=1)
---
At the White Coat Waste Project, we’ve championed Violet’s Law -- the only one of its kind! **This legislation would require the U.S. government animal labs to place adoptable animals in loving homes and ensure other survivors are placed in animal sanctuaries. ** Polls show that 71% of Democrats and 72% of Republicans want to see these animals retired -- not killed. And scientific research shows that animals released from labs make great pets. While there is broad bipartisan support for animal retirement, agencies that experiment on animals -- including the Center for Disease Control and Prevention, the U.S. Department of Agriculture, and the Environmental Protection Agency have yet to create policies allowing it. Bottom line: government bureaucrats are too lazy to retire survivors like Violet. It’s easier to just slaughter and burn them--like garbage. Let’s make them do the right thing! Let’s help animals like Violet to get a second chance at life, and to be freed from sadistic big government white coats.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26981%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MJJjbCSUzv7mscKyfQOR1Q&sysid=1)
---
[**Please sign the national petition RIGHT AWAY to help the White Coat Waste Project ensure Violet’s Law is passed in the House and Senate ... and that innocent animals being harmed and killed by the U.S. government are given a second chance at life.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26996%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xACt5ZAO1uOX39i2%2fPq9%2bg&sysid=1) Thank you for your support!
---
Anthony Bellotti President & Founder White Coat Waste Project
---
PO. Box 26029, Washington, DC 20001
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8983%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=gUYgqOzMg1M7Wx17A%2fu8Rg&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: NEWS: Nuestro PAC announces relaunch and plans for 2024
body:
Nuestro PAC announces plans to spend $37 million on bilingual digital, mail, and radio programing targeting Latinos | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/nuestropac/relaunch2024?e=b8f90417f9)
---
| |
---
|
_The PAC will create the infrastructure to help Joe Biden win re-election and turn out Latino voters in key House races._
June 20,2023
**Contact: Chuck Rocha (info@nuestropac.com)**
---
| | WASHINGTON -- Today, Nuestro PAC, a partisan Super PAC that mobilizes and turns out Latinos in key states for Democrats, announces plans to spend $37 million on bilingual digital, mail, and radio programing targeting Latinos in Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. Nuestro PAC brings together strategists from the left, right, and center to ensure messaging and implementation is holistic and takes into account the diverse experience of Latino voters. **Chuck Rocha** and **Mike Madrid** will serve as Nuestro PAC’s senior advisors. Rocha is one of the nation’s most experienced Democratic operatives. In 2023, his firm, Solidarity Strategies, was named Creative Agency of the Year by Campaign & Elections. Chuck was also named to Politico’s 2022 Recast Power List which honors the top 40 most influential people on race and politics and awarded General Consultant of the year by Gain Power’s 2022 Powerful Idea Awards. Mike is a communications expert and a nationally recognized expert on Latino voting trends. His active involvement in local, state, and federal races has helped him to develop a keen insight into the successful characteristics of winning campaigns. He co-founded The Lincoln Project and currently serves as the co-Chair of the League of Minority Voters. Nuestro PAC’s two main goals are to ensure Donald Trump and Republican extremism are defeated and to deliver and amplify President Biden’s message to Latino communities. “As we did in 2020, we plan to coordinate with the larger independent expenditure table who are working to re-elect President Biden. In 2020 we were the only Latino lead and focused super pac participating with this table and we will proudly reignite our efforts to re-elect President Biden, keep the Senate, and take back the House,” said Rocha. In 2020, Nuestro PAC raised and spent $10 million dollars in bilingual communication in eight states and set out to educate and energize every persuadable, infrequent and newly registered voter in battleground states early, consistently and at a scale that has historically been an uphill battle in electoral politics. ###

Read more about this announcement [here](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=3621846d0a&e=b8f90417f9)

clean_body: Nuestro PAC announces plans to spend $37 million on bilingual digital, mail, and radio programing targeting Latinos | | | | | | The PAC will create the infrastructure to help Joe Biden win re-election and turn out Latino voters in key House races. June 20,2023 Contact: Chuck Rocha (info@nuestropac.com) | | WASHINGTON -- Today, Nuestro PAC, a partisan Super PAC that mobilizes and turns out Latinos in key states for Democrats, announces plans to spend $37 million on bilingual digital, mail, and radio programing targeting Latinos in Arizona, Georgia, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Nevada, and Wisconsin. Nuestro PAC brings together strategists from the left, right, and center to ensure messaging and implementation is holistic and takes into account the diverse experience of Latino voters. Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid will serve as Nuestro PAC’s senior advisors. Rocha is one of the nation’s most experienced Democratic operatives. In 2023, his firm, Solidarity Strategies, was named Creative Agency of the Year by Campaign & Elections. Chuck was also named to Politico’s 2022 Recast Power List which honors the top 40 most influential people on race and politics and awarded General Consultant of the year by Gain Power’s 2022 Powerful Idea Awards. Mike is a communications expert and a nationally recognized expert on Latino voting trends. His active involvement in local, state, and federal races has helped him to develop a keen insight into the successful characteristics of winning campaigns. He co-founded The Lincoln Project and currently serves as the co-Chair of the League of Minority Voters. Nuestro PAC’s two main goals are to ensure Donald Trump and Republican extremism are defeated and to deliver and amplify President Biden’s message to Latino communities. “As we did in 2020, we plan to coordinate with the larger independent expenditure table who are working to re-elect President Biden. In 2020 we were the only Latino lead and focused super pac participating with this table and we will proudly reignite our efforts to re-elect President Biden, keep the Senate, and take back the House,” said Rocha. In 2020, Nuestro PAC raised and spent $10 million dollars in bilingual communication in eight states and set out to educate and energize every persuadable, infrequent and newly registered voter in battleground states early, consistently and at a scale that has historically been an uphill battle in electoral politics. ### Read more about this announcement | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Nuestro PAC, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: P.O. Box 15845 Washington, D.C. 20003 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans tried to destroy Adam Schiff last week, just for holding an investigation into Trump. We need to have Schiff’s back.
body:
Totally out of control
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77c36871-c19d-4368-b83b-4fa338fa4e86/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last week, Republicans took their treason a step further--using the House to try to destroy Rep. Adam Schiff, by attempting to censure and fine him $16 million(!) for investigating Trump-Russia.[Thankfully, they failed.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc39def0e-caa2-4a89-889a-dde30b62ab11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18b410b6-f773-4d72-adcd-e3b3850c9d62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The sponsor of the censure attempt may be the biggest fraud in the House outside of George Santos. Anna Paulina Luna_ , _or as she was known until she decided to run for office in South Florida, Anna Mayerhofer. _ _**Luna **(or Mayerhofer)** was caught lying about an impoverished upbringing, a Jewish heritage, being the victim of a home invasion **and at least a half dozen other things. A failed Instagram model who likes performing & lacks a conscience, she found her place in the GOP House Caucus._ _Then there's Schiff.__ Former Chair of the House Intelligence Committee,__ he regularly destroyed Republican lies,__ i.e., why MAGA targeted him._ _**A House Impeachment Manager, he gave a summation that'll be taught in classes for years, and served on the Jan 6th Panel exposing Trump's treason.**_ **_Now Schiff's running for the Senate,_** _and Republicans are scared as hell, as h_ _e'll bring the much-needed fire to the Senate. _ [**_Will you join us in sending Adam Schiff, $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can, so this champion of democracy, Adam Schiff, can help lead the charge in the Senate for democracy and against MAGA Republican crime and treason?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2a10176f-733c-4e9e-a0a6-05017a3b99ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for making the Senate--and our democracy--stronger! Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbac1a9e0-8955-45b9-87bb-d2f8c3944366/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Anna Kaplan
subject: George Santos + Donald Trump = birds of a feather
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi, it’s Anna Kaplan, Democratic candidate for Congress running against
George Santos.

Like Donald Trump, my opponent calls himself an “America-first
Republican.”

Both Santos and Trump claim the 2020 election was stolen -- despite not
having any evidence. 🤔

They’re both anti-choice, pro-gun, radical right-wing lunatics.

And now, they’re both under criminal indictment and are running for office
to avoid jail time.

We can’t let them win.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18973?t=1001&akid=3325%2E346206%2EG1CpRC ]Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Charles Booker -- to help
me DEFEAT George Santos and restore honesty and integrity to the U.S.
Congress?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18973?t=1002&akid=3325%2E346206%2EG1CpRC ][IMG]

Trump and Santos are birds of a feather. Let’s defeat them together.

Thanks for your support,

Anna Kaplan

DOWN THE LAW on the corrupt Trump indictment:")**_
"President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want." Mark Levin is spot on.

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** INTIMIDATE them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62849535:6QszluINf:m:1:3299561967:FC2236F080852C15AEB768551826D5DB:r "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt
>>")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So, if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62849536:6QszluINf:m:1:3299561967:FC2236F080852C15AEB768551826D5DB:r "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt

body:
We need to know ASAP. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65088794/412301367/-2090587605?refcode=utc_em_logoT_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMGVjMDVhLTZhMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ip_5aa_aVUhIYKVK6yfw3K4RsjK1KGO-mTWIghwS7vU=)

| **President Biden is counting on all of us to help protect reproductive freedom and keep his ambitious pro-choice agenda going strong!** **WILL YOU JOIN THE FIGHT TO PROTECT ABORTION RIGHTS?** | **[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65088796/412301368/1492504890?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_Abortion_062023_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMGVjMDVhLTZhMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ip_5aa_aVUhIYKVK6yfw3K4RsjK1KGO-mTWIghwS7vU=)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65088797/412301369/1492504890?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_Abortion_062023_B2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMGVjMDVhLTZhMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ip_5aa_aVUhIYKVK6yfw3K4RsjK1KGO-mTWIghwS7vU=)**
---|---
Peter, when Donald Trump’s handpicked Supreme Court justices overturned _Roe v. Wade_ almost one year ago, MAGA Republicans wasted no time pushing a wave of extreme abortion bans & restrictions.

Since then, **20 states have enacted measures to ban or limit abortion — and GOP extremists are even attempting to criminalize abortion pills.**

If that wasn't distressing enough, GOP presidential candidates like Mike Pence and Ron DeSantis are threatening a TOTAL abortion ban across all 50 states if they win in 2024.

We can’t afford to give up an ounce of hope, Peter! Unite the Country is fighting tooth and nail to uplift the Biden Administration’s pro-choice agenda and ensure that we elect more pro-choice Democrats to codify _Roe_ and save the future of reproductive freedom.

But we need to know you’re with us in this fight. **Please let us know before midnight: are you fully committed to protecting reproductive rights?**
**[YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65088798/412301370/1492504890?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_Abortion_062023_B3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMGVjMDVhLTZhMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ip_5aa_aVUhIYKVK6yfw3K4RsjK1KGO-mTWIghwS7vU=)** | **[NO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65088799/412301371/1492504890?refcode=em_UTC_PET_POLL_Abortion_062023_B4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyMGVjMDVhLTZhMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ip_5aa_aVUhIYKVK6yfw3K4RsjK1KGO-mTWIghwS7vU=)**
---|---

subject: Joe Biden has lost his mind—and you're paying for it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Sexualization has NO place in elementary school. | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=2e9d5d6f0a&e=84ee529f47)
---
Friend, In case you missed Biden's latest absurdity...
---
| [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0194f476eb&e=84ee529f47)
---
Joe Biden is taking his support of Tik Tok activists' topless-dancing-in-front-of-the-White-House fiasco to the next extreme **_by using presidential authority to appoint an "anti-book ban coordinator" AKA, a 'porn enforcer' in YOUR kid's school._**
---
| | [JOIN THE FIGHT—PROTECT YOUR KIDS!](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=531291758d&e=84ee529f47)
---
The federal government is out of control. You can rest assured that Gov. Ron DeSantis will use his presidential authority to put an end to EVERY ONE of Biden's senseless policies that are wasting YOUR hard-earned tax dollars. **American children have been put through enough nonsense in the classroom through the mismanagement of Covid. It's time we focus on protecting them, NOT forcing sexualization into their classrooms.** Yesterday, Gov. DeSantis posed a simple question to Joe Biden: **_"Why do you want to have that curriculum jammed into a second-grade classroom?"_** We can't wait to hear what woke nonsense will come in response. As a father of 3 young children, Gov. DeSantis is **fed-up**. Are you?
---
| | [DONATE TODAY—STOP SEXUALIZING THE CLASSROOM](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e8c4cc61aa&e=84ee529f47)
---
We need your help getting Biden out of the Oval Office. **_Will you help out by donating to our cause?_** We can't win this fight alone. In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=0a66c2ffd3&e=84ee529f47)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the “Russia collusion” conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what’s right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom – even when it wasn’t popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America’s founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation’s revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden’s border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn’t stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican – as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: “When the world lost its mind – when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue – Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism.”

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor’s leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration’s overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor’s vision, this year’s legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida’s history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state’s infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden’s border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they’re the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.

---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don't know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I'm personally asking if you'll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ze54oesitf774crjnuqe6vjb4dnrda773pak67ao_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge0ob4c3h2bs "Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats. ")**

No amount is too big or too small and it is all used toward ensuring we defend our razor-thin House Majority.

I would ask if it wasn't critical, Friend. My seat could very well decide the House Majority and my radical opponent knows it.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

---
* * *
---
_We 'll get straight to the point, Friend:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she's able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we're humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zll0erkeml58h50ioae8r39df5ldl910e1qri3p8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge0ob4c3h2bs "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you. name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: I voted no.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is not how we fix immigration. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65090428/412308328/-730477937?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230620immigration_gv_re_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTM0MmU0Zi02YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zTrbY0srSrYwyBoLbf-L6DoO2Ta1C8kkTbWndvVnWQg=)
---
Friends, last month Republicans in the U.S. House put forward an extreme, unrealistic, anti-immigrant bill. **I voted no.** Here’s why👇 1\. **It turns away those who need our help the most.** This legislation attempts to completely strip the asylum process, something that has helped many seek refuge in our country for decades. 2\. **It doesn’t provide much-needed resources to the border.** Instead, it proposes extreme policies, like having police - who are already overwhelmed - act as immigration agents. 3\. **It’s not a long-term solution.** It provides no path to permanent citizenship for the 580,000 DACA DREAMers who were brought to the U.S. as children and have always called this home. I’ve lived on both sides of the border and my district includes 180 miles of the US-Mexico border. We’ve felt the effects of a broken immigration system, but we also know the opportunities immigrants bring to our community. I want to see us come together on real solutions and get this done. clean_body: This is not how we fix immigration. | = Friends, last month Republicans in the U.S. House put forward an extreme, unrealistic, anti-immigrant bill. I voted no. Here’s why👇 1\. It turns away those who need our help the most. This legislation attempts to completely strip the asylum process, something that has helped many seek refuge in our country for decades. 2\. It doesn’t provide much-needed resources to the border. Instead, it proposes extreme policies, like having police - who are already overwhelmed - act as immigration agents. 3\. It’s not a long-term solution. It provides no path to permanent citizenship for the 580,000 DACA DREAMers who were brought to the U.S. as children and have always called this home. I’ve lived on both sides of the border and my district includes 180 miles of the US-Mexico border. We’ve felt the effects of a broken immigration system, but we also know the opportunities immigrants bring to our community. I want to see us come together on real solutions and get this done. We need comprehensive immigration reform that treats asylum-seekers humanely, offers a fair path to citizenship for those who meet certain requirements, and ensures that our border is secure. The bottom line, this bill falls short. That’s why I voted no. Yours, Gabe Vasquez U.S. Representative (NM-02) P.S. My far-right extremist opponent is going to use this vote against me in attack ads. clean_body: the left knows no bounds | Peter This is absolutely insane, and you know it. I know you've seen the news - and it's not good. MY FATHER IS A VICTIM IN THE LATEST WITCH HUNT ORCHESTRATED BY THE RADICAL LEFT. | Biden's corrupt administration is dead set on putting my father away - at ALL costs - and will stop at nothing to do so. Their hatred of our America-First values, conservative views, and love of country is so strong that they're still obsessing over the success of my father's time in office - and convinced that their hatred will win. Conservatives like JD Vance and my father, Donald Trump, are committed to fighting for what makes America great. We cannot allow the Left to strip us of our freedoms, our dignity, and our democracy. Thank you, Donald Trump Jr Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: Lorinser, me (1)
subject: Cuts to Social Security and Medicare
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
HELP ME KEEP UP THE FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
,
As we look to the future, we need to find sustainable ways to fund important programs like Medicare and Social Security, which are critical to the health and well-being of millions of Americans.
Unfortunately, some politicians in Washington — like my opponent Jack Bergman and his GOP colleagues — are pushing for cuts to these programs, or for privatizing our military and eliminating public education, all while giving massive tax breaks to the ultra-rich.
It's simply unacceptable.
That's why I'm running for Congress; to fight for everyday Americans and ensure that we have a fair and just society for all.
As a proud Democrat, I believe that we can find better solutions to our financial challenges, solutions that don't involve cutting benefits for seniors or undermining public education.
But, , I can't do it alone. I need your help putting a stronger fundraising number up this quarter, so I can stay competitive in my race. Will you join me in this fight by making a donation to my campaign today? [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
I am fast approaching our quarterly finance deadline and we are running behind our goals.
Your support will help me spread the word about my campaign, reach more voters, and fight back against the forces of greed and inequality that threaten our democracy.
Together, we can build a brighter future for all Americans, and ensure that everyone has access to the care, support, and security they need.
Yours,
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan & the UP
Proud Democrat, MI01

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Lee?=
subject: Protecting Taxpayers and Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Michael Lee for Sheriff
body:
| | |
---
| | For far too long, non-DeSoto County residents have used loopholes and forgery to cheat the system and abuse our high-achieving school system.
Yesterday, we took action to stop that practice in DeSoto County.
Following a recommendation from our DeSoto County School Board and Superintendent Cory Uselton, your Board of Supervisors have unanimously adopted and passed an ordinance that will make it a crime for parents who falsify residence documents in order to send their child to school here.
Borders matter. And this ordinance will stop the practice of non-DeSoto County residents who use loopholes and forgery to cheat the taxpayers of DeSoto County and our high-achieving school system. Those that continue to cheat will be removed from DCS and met with a $500 fine and/or 6 months in jail.
I want to thank Superintendent Uselton and the School Board for bringing this to our attention and partnering with us to further protect our attractive school system and the taxpayers of DeSoto County.
---

Good morning, Peter,
A lot of campaigns are trying to convince you to donate with a fake 1,000% matching gimmick. And if you don't donate they threaten you, they call you a bad Republican... they lead with fear instead of optimism.

At Team DeSantis we're taking a different approach.

Our entire fundraising & digital program's foundation is built on this principle: Our donors are a part of our team; they are NOT our personal piggy bank.

Look, I get it. Times are tough thanks to Joe Biden's Economy and our team doesn't want to pressure you towards donating if you can't afford it.

You will never receive a solicitation from this campaign that promises a fake match or degrades you for not donating. When we tell you about our internal fundraising goals, those are real numbers.
**__No smoke and mirrors, no fake matches, and no lies. __**
That's what this campaign is all about, and I promise you, that's the kind of President you will have when I am in the White House.

If that sounds like the kind of campaign you want to invest in, then **[please become a recurring donor to our campaign today.](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=af89f35fc9b9442789ef47cc35efc425&_e=FMy6Ewmyhx1pFNBj1QuyXO9L1GdBRQs3_AUyGCBtQTKNZwQAFUXJqEnBdHr2u4M--fUWC1nr4IgdkQxYYJk1M-40FLKwTNY2zkSvtUJfk16pyWzvMApYE6pMkLWSIJBJdSQmhxx1gPLrHpu3z_UXxHFsHaxadGzNz2deY1i_iEWAsZftZK9_sdLnvRttHpzYZdJQU-Qqw4U_AV0vcfN47bZSQcRCiQq-52mDxVzEY-vYT0rMjcnTzrGDweyGdtdNYA48NaynnWVxpGJ7J_f59vSaPt6HkUH6_wLzp9LnKZZlRU9upjcnUbKArf2ZJDE7HDIh_gKVDwSMeylXjSol3pZfbRIn_MO3iMB8oj2X1hr8HWqdt3DEYyFs2h1hBs-oXq8q1mK6NnyrNKJdORO4ww%3D%3D "please become a recurring donor to our campaign today.") **

| Ron DeSantis is the 46th Governor of Florida.

A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he graduated with honors and was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School. While at Harvard, he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq as an adviser to a U.S. Navy SEAL commander in support of the SEAL
---
mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.

Ron also served as a federal prosecutor, where he targeted and convicted child predators. He was elected to Congress in 2012 and advocated for congressional term limits and a balanced budget amendment. He also spearheaded oversight efforts to expose malfeasance in the IRS and in agencies involved in abusing their authority during the manufacturing of the Russia collusion conspiracy theory. Congressman DeSantis was also a leading champion for America's veterans and helped enact reforms to the VA and place an emphasis on mental health.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award winning television host. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

name: =?UTF-8?Q?=E2=9C=8F=EF=B8=8F_Add_Your_Name_=7C_Left_Action?=
subject: Sign: Support a Constitutional amendment to take away Trump's ability to pardon himself
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Take away Trump's ability to pardon himself if he's president >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td8b63a94-26e7-40d2-b516-0a0c4bbb4de6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te2a2eeef-5642-46b7-b8e0-f15ccf9f5662/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump has been charged with a range of federal crimes, and he appears to be running for president primarily so he could pardon himself if elected. [**We need to act now to take away his ability to self-pardon. We can do so through a Constitutional amendment.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T737d9978-89a1-4389-ae5a-9bb081d51af3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) An amendment is never easy, but there is broad agreement across party lines that convicted criminals should not be able to pardon themselves. And it is unclear whether the Constitution's presidential pardon power even includes self-pardons. So let's make it clear, let's pass it quickly, and let's have it in place before the next presidential election. And if Republicans won't get on board, let that be yet more evidence that they care more about protecting criminals than defending justice. [**Add your name: Take away Trump's ability to pardon himself if he's president >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T635e42a3-cadc-4801-85d4-721251f11eaf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Donald Trump has been charged with a range of federal crimes, and he appears to be running for president primarily so he could pardon himself if elected. An amendment is never easy, but there is broad agreement across party lines that convicted criminals should not be able to pardon themselves. And it is unclear whether the Constitution's presidential pardon power even includes self-pardons. So let's make it clear, let's pass it quickly, and let's have it in place before the next presidential election. And if Republicans won't get on board, let that be yet more evidence that they care more about protecting criminals than defending justice. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Taking some time off
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
It's not a bad thing -- it's a beautiful thing.
#

Peter -
I am writing to let you know that I am going to be taking some time off from the campaign trail soon.
It's not a bad thing -- it's a beautiful thing.
My wife and I are expecting our first child together any day now, and I am committed to being a father and a husband first in these first few weeks. You never get that moment back, and I want to make the most of it.
Now, the timing is not ideal. Our FEC deadline is coming up fast. But I am going to be there for my wife and our growing family.
So I made the decision hoping you'd help me close the gap. That you'd replace the fundraising calls I can't make with donations made in response to emails like this one.
This is a magical time in my family's life, but it's also an important week for our campaign. And I am hoping you'll help.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Min=20for=20Congress?=
subject: RELEASE: Poll Shows Dave Min In Strong Position To Win CA47 General Election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024
body:
Min Leads Likely Republican Opponent Scott Baugh +7 (43-36)

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/685df63e7a41/release-poll-shows-dave-min-in-strong-position-to-win-ca47-general-election-15657384?e=7017cc100e)
For Immediate Release: June 20, 2023
Contact: press@davemin.com (mailto:press@davemin.com)

Poll Shows Dave Min In Strong Position To Win CA47 General Election
Min Leads Likely Republican Opponent Scott Baugh +7 (43-36)

IRVINE, CA — Today, a new poll released by Public Policy Polling among likely General Election voters in California’s 47th Congressional District shows State Senator Dave Min in a strong position to defeat likely Republican nominee Scott Baugh in 2024.
Voters respond overwhelmingly to Min’s unique story. The son of Korean immigrants, Min has a record of service as a former Law Enforcement Attorney for the SEC and as a current State Senator who represents 85% of the Congressional District. After the candidate’s biographies are read, Min leads Baugh by +4 (41-37), and expands his leads to +7 (43-36) after negative messaging is introduced.
To Read The Full Polling Memo Click Here (https://docs.google.com/document/d/e/2PACX-1vS0USA0SGSRHz0jqyEQM8IU2ySeL6BKGA51u_SGXGj7EFKCZ2ngJJeLucBhWHlykekiGTTD9l8fDKjl/pub)

Min’s recent DUI flatlines with voters as a salient attack. When likely voters were informed about Scott Baugh's negatives, namely that he has faced more than 20 criminal charges for perjury and campaign finance violations, 65% of likely voters thought this was a convincing reason to vote against him, and 49% found this very convincing.

By way of comparison, while Min's DUI earlier this year caused some observers to question his viability as a candidate, the poll found that this incident was clearly not a significant factor for voters. Only 19% of likely voters found this to be a very convincing line of attack, while 47% found this not at all convincing. After voters were informed about the negative messages for both candidates, Min’s lead grew from 4% to 7%.

The news of the public polling comes on the heels of Min announcing the endorsement from the largest local law enforcement association in California, adding to his impressive coalition of support which includes 125 local, state, and federal leaders, SEIU, the California Federation of Teachers and the Congressional Asian Pacific Islander Caucus’ ASPIRE PAC in endorsing Dave Min for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District.

Senator Min, the only Korean-American in the state legislature, serves as Chair of the Senate Natural Resources and Water Committee and as Senate Vice Chair of the Asian and Pacific Islander Legislative Caucus. Min, who was formerly a law professor at UC Irvine School of Law and has three children in Irvine public schools, also serves on the Senate’s Budget Subcommittee for Education, which oversees all budget funding for California’s public schools, community colleges, the California State University system, and the University of California system.

Min has proven himself an incredibly effective legislative leader in the Senate, authoring 16 bills signed into law by the Governor, including leading legislation on hate crimes (https://timesofsandiego.com/opinion/2022/03/13/2-bills-before-the-legislature-will-help-stop-anti-asian-hate-crimes-in-california/) , gun violence prevention (https://www.latimes.com/socal/daily-pilot/news/story/2022-07-25/bill-aiming-to-ban-gun-shows-sales-on-state-land-hits-target) , family safety, and women’s reproductive rights (https://www.ocregister.com/2022/07/14/california-judges-able-to-renew-domestic-violence-protection-orders-under-new-law/) , and procuring over $70 million in direct appropriations for priorities in his district, including for fire response, parks and open spaces, and climate innovation. In the wake of the 2021 Huntington Beach Oil Spill, he stood up to the oil industry and led efforts to end offshore drilling
(https://spectrumnews1.com/ca/la-west/news/2022/04/26/sb-953-aims-to-end-drilling-off-state-shores) . Min sits on two key environmental committees, chairing the Natural Resources and Water Committee and serving on the Energy and Utilities Committee, as well as the Budget Committee, the Budget Subcommittee for Education, the Judiciary Committee, and the Banking and Financial Institutions Committee. Senator Min previously served as Chair of the Select Committee on Cybersecurity.

Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout.

#######

California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15% in this area. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country.

============================================================
Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024
PO Box 5959
Irvine, CA 92616

You can ** update your preferences (https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=80a6b445f5)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://davemin.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=1b97cb6a343b55cba640c3404&id=700e70ffe1&e=7017cc100e&c=80a6b445f5)

clean_body: That’s the average online donation to our campaign this month. We’re so proud of this number, Peter: Thanks to supporters just like you in Missouri + all across the country, we’re building a truly grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley, elect Lucas Kunce, and take back power for working people. This month our average online donation is just $25.61. Whether folks responded to an email like this one, saw one of our Facebook ads, got one of our texts, or even just visited our website — this kind of small-dollar support plays a critical role in setting Lucas + our entire campaign up for success. And with our major end-of-quarter FEC deadline coming up on June 30, we’ve got to keep it going... National GOP insiders are doing everything they can to re-elect Josh Hawley and keep this Senate seat under their thumb. Last quarter, the NRSC even used their joint committee with Hawley’s campaign to funnel him $250,000 — all while launching a string of desperate attacks about Lucas. If we’re going to be able to keep fighting back and getting Lucas’ message in front of every Missouri voter between now and Election Day, we have no choice but to keep up this grassroots momentum. subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWmMuJzDNM

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on
eliminating...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWmMuJzDNM

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61941752:WmMuJzDNM:m:3:2532013465:1F22C0B0B2C855CDE9DD84B8B410F419:r

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61941752:WmMuJzDNM:m:3:2532013465:1F22C0B0B2C855CDE9DD84B8B410F419:r

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61941752:WmMuJzDNM:m:3:2532013465:1F22C0B0B2C855CDE9DD84B8B410F419:r

Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.
