clean_body: The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on eliminating... Please see a special message from our sponsor: Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles." This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example… Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction." Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you!

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: After Bernie 2016
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

This email will probably be a bit longer than others you receive today,
but it’s really important and I hope you’ll read the entire message.

Justice Democrats was started by just a handful of Bernie 2016 staffers
and super volunteers. We had just worked on this inspiring campaign for
president. Bernie put a progressive agenda front and center for millions
of people for the first time — myself included.

In 2018, when Justice Democrats recruited AOC to run, she was working as a
bartender — she even worked as a bartender for many months while running
for office. Sometimes, that’s what it takes when you’re a working-class
candidate.

We helped AOC manage her team, run her organizing program, and make
everything we could of our small budget. Then, she won. We toppled one of
the most powerful corporate Democrats and elected the youngest woman ever
to serve in Congress in his place.

Money has always been one of the biggest things holding us back from doing
more. It’s the one thing that our establishment opponents have a seemingly
endless supply of and that we’re always working hard to raise just a
fraction of what they can raise.

Since January 2021, our fundraising has been in a slow but steady decline
and it really isn’t sustainable for us as an organization. Here’s a
screenshot from our ActBlue dashboard:

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, so we rely on supporters like
you to power our work.

Thank you so much for being a part of our movement to challenge the entire
political establishment and elect more progressive change-makers.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135053?refcode=em20230620-29513&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC ]→ Will you now dig deep and make your first contribution of
$3 right now to support our critical work?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135053?refcode=em20230620-29513&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC ]Contribute $3

I know we can do amazing things together. I’m grateful to be in this fight
with you, thank you again.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas, Executive Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230620-29513-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29513_1203867_GLMGvC&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29513%2E1203867%2EGLMGvC

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

After finally being indicted for stealing
national security secrets, Donald Trump and his surrogates aren't hiding
their fascist ambitions to take over the country and seize total power —
pledging to purge the justice department and threatening violence if Trump
is held accountable for his crimes.

count on you to rush a donation to help us fight rising fascism before
it's too late?

While corporate Democrats dilly-dally and obsess over trivial nonsense,
Donald Trump and his movement are gearing up to destroy the rule of law,
crush working families, and install a fascist dictator in the White House.

Donald Trump is so dangerous because he can successfully pose as a
populist while pursuing policies that impoverish workers, slash safety
protections, destroy our environment, and undermine our democracy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8681?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230616_FR_FightFascismFund_0_12MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_FightFascismFund&t=1009&akid=4377%2E5885482%2EkNbcb0 ]Peter Willis, we

| | In 10 days, my campaign for US Congress hits an important deadline for the Federal Election Commission. At the end of this month, we'll close out our "Q2" or second quarter of the year. But what does this mean? Every year, candidates running for federal office must meet four quarterly deadlines. After each deadline passes, we're required to report how much money we've raised and from how many individual contributions. Political analysts and the press scrutinize these deadlines as an indicator of the strength of a campaign. If a campaign has lots of early support from many individual supporters, it's seen as being on track. If a campaign is struggling and only raising money from a few donors, it's not a great sign. For my campaign, I don't believe in big money in politics. I reject corporate PAC money because I want my financial support to reflect people power, not big pockets. I'm less concerned with big dollar donors, and prefer to be funded by small contributions from many supporters. I'm working hard to ensure that the FEC report we file on June 30 shows grassroots support. People like you who donate to campaigns like mine make this possible. If you've recently contributed, thank you! Your donation does not go unnoticed and I'm very grateful you're in my corner. Disregard the financial ask and consider this email a campaign update. [Because every bit helps, please forward this to your like-minded friends. We want as many people reflected on this FEC report as possible. Our strength is not in dollar amounts; it's in number of contributors.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/31OZP1JcK/c?w=537BjPwjVzf5pXtZMAvty4xsc5qxZaS2KNbnexopADw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjY0NjljNTU1LTUwMmMtNDk2ZS05MjI3LWJjNzRjYjJmYWViNyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) Thank you for your consideration. I appreciate your support!
---

Friends,
I have a very exciting announcement: You can officially become a paying subscriber to the State Freedom Caucus Network on Substack.
A paid subscription will get you additional behind the scenes content of what Freedom Caucuses are up to in our states, as well as nationally, beginning with my upcoming interview with House Freedom Caucus member Rep. Bob Good.
And you will be supporting our mission to put the far left and RINO establishment on notice.
[](https://substack.cc/redirect/dd3fdce5-2e54-45d0-ba34-92f51e39f4f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZmNuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.FbVYLElJwRAUCCVipZUFIeQrargur_vRti3kAHymOsc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=129530072)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_
P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a [contribution](https://substack.cc/redirect/0453dcf1-4ccc-4a57-8a2f-50a4210b0321?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty.
You're currently a free subscriber to [State Freedom Caucus Network](https://substack.cc/redirect/db04c9cb-c384-4704-8b52-34f3d4b3015a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Trump says Trump should go to jail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Trump himself says “we can’t have someone in the Oval Office who doesn’t understand the meaning of the words confidential or classified.”
|
---
Friend,

In the weeks since his second indictment, Donald Trump has called it a witch hunt and stoked rage at the FBI and Department of Justice from his base. This is coming through in our focus groups. Recently a two-time Trump voter told me Trump got “absolutely railroaded” and that “they weaponized the DOJ.” Viewers need to be reminded about what Trump himself has said about mishandling classified documents in the past. Today our friends at Republican Accountability Project launched a $1M ad campaign airing on nationwide and local TV, including Fox News. That means the ad will run on Fox & Friends—a Trump favorite—and Fox News Sunday. The ad uses Trump’s own words to hold him accountable for stealing classified documents and obstructing justice, including him saying “you go to jail for that.” [Check the video out here:](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVYG9G5fDs-NW68XG_L8CjWmSW7-75Mp5013QYN5t-nkr3q905V1-WJV7CgQqFW7cwz4w2zKjYtW6JpdLB7MM4dvW993RbK79_CwjW5mjhDT62jLHmW3TbDVb1sGXj5W4x5yM04FFWBzW1RV7_v4xDLYhW4CpKvd5d3HsVW4DZ6-S7PS77fW6rksfB8Xn3DfVq75x026tPB-W6jPjC53fQ3rmN8QF4KxWSDBHW2lf4bQ1cX-YJW3pwjzN16gXJKW2s9CCY1srLBHW6-jknK74Hj3XW4H9QvN41gkdlW78gcW08V2xMsW7R1syG8qM1q3W8yHpHr3Wlf7RW3T9gZT8R2ct3W94ZnVQ5TwZr9W6Zv2Lm6pnnL63k7w1)

With the help of you and this grassroots team, we made history last November – flipping four chambers, adding three new Democratic trifectas, and defending every single majority. **But we can’t take our foot off the gas now – the stakes are too high.**
State Democrats are facing a slew of special elections over the next two months – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November.
**Electing Democratic leaders who will support President Biden’s agenda in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your state. But it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents. **
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your state. **So can we count you in?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Defending our Constitutional Rights (2 min update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
Stopping liberal attacks on the Second Amendment | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f85e3f1fcc&e=1050d051da)
---
| Friend,

It's Jake LaTurner here. Last week in Washington, I took action to protect our Second Amendment rights, weaken the growing administrative state, uncover more Biden family fraud, and push back on Joe Biden's failed energy agenda.

Thanks to all your help, we are **FINALLY** getting America back on track. I am so grateful for your trust and support.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **PROTECTING OUR 2A RIGHTS**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=122bab2316&e=1050d051da)
---
| It's no secret that Joe Biden, the ATF, and liberals in Washington are hellbent on coming after our Second Amendment rights. The ATF's latest gun-grabbing effort is to ban pistol braces—a tool many older Americans and disabled veterans rely on.

__**This is completely unconstitutional and would turn millions of law-abiding gun owners into criminals.**__

This is just another example of Joe Biden trying to control every aspect of our lives. **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** I proudly voted to block this outrageous ATF rule and stand up for gun owners in Kansas and across the country. I will do everything in my power to fight against the onslaught of liberal attacks on our Constitutional rights and freedoms. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c7b42d5126&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **WEAKENING THE ADMINISTRATIVE STATE**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9a3c91ca3e&e=1050d051da)
---
| Unelected bureaucrats in Washington have way too much power over our everyday lives. These nameless, faceless individuals in the administrative state have put in place over **1.3 MILLION** burdensome regulations costing Americans over **$2,000,000,000,000** every single year.

_**The federal government is out of control. I came to Congress to shrink the size of Washington and get the government out of the lives of Kansas families and small businesses. **_

I proudly voted for the REINS Act to take power away from the swamp and put it back in the hands of hard-working Americans across the country. This bill would stop reckless government overreach and prevent bureaucrats from spending billions of taxpayer dollars without approval from Congress. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=41b5ff3240&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **UNCOVERING MORE BIDEN FAMILY FRAUD**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9dd3b862a6&e=1050d051da)
---
| Every week James Comer, Jim Jordan, and I are uncovering more and more about the Biden family business schemes. Washington elites **HATE** it. The mainstream media refuses to cover it and the White House is doing everything it can to prevent our investigation from continuing.
**Here's the truth: We have only just begun. **
Joe and Hunter can deny these allegations all they want but we have the receipts and the bank records don't lie. The Oversight Committee is expected to receive new bank records next week showing that the Biden family has accepted as much as **$30 MILLION** from foreign nationals.

Accountability is coming and we will not relent in our fight to deliver the truth to the American people. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=3d017c8ba3&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **STOPPING BIDEN'S RECKLESS ENERGY AGENDA**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2d81cefb25&e=1050d051da)
---
| Joe and Kamala **LOVE** putting radical Green New Deal activists over what's best for hardworking American families. We have seen the results: Americans faced the highest gas prices in history last year and utility bills continue to soar.

_Now the White House is coming for your stove. Yes, you heard that correctly. The White House and EPA want to ban gas stoves._

It's outrageous that Joe Biden is trying to tell you what appliance you can use to cook your food. It's just another example of liberal extremists wanting as much control as possible over our way of life. House Republicans passed a bill last week to put the EPA back in its place and stop this ridiculous rule from taking effect. I will continue using every tool in the toolbox to push back against Joe Biden's failed energy agenda. [**[READ MORE]**](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=bc26de9e16&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=884f085718&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=5b5254daf9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=5b5254daf9).

name: Sherrod B.
subject: two very important members of my team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I want to introduce you to two very important members of my team
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65105973/412352192/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk256-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZiYjY4MS03YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1symCqaviWxDp268Fqtr675RGwCb28Pk2PTK-5NnnBM=)
Friend,

I want to introduce you to two very important members of my team: Franklin and Walter, two dogs Connie and I rescued years ago.

We named them after President FDR and former UAW President Walter Reuther – two leaders who dedicated their lives to fighting for the Dignity of Work.
Look friend, I'm in the fight of my life to defend Ohio's battleground Senate seat. Experts at _CNN_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot, and if we lose here, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are virtually guaranteed to flip the Senate red.

**I'm running a grassroots campaign, which means I'm counting on folks like you to chip in $5 or $10 to help me stand up to the GOP's attacks – and WIN. [So please, can I count on you to chip in $5 or more now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65105974/412352193/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk256-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZiYjY4MS03YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1symCqaviWxDp268Fqtr675RGwCb28Pk2PTK-5NnnBM=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65105975/412352194/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk256-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDZiYjY4MS03YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1symCqaviWxDp268Fqtr675RGwCb28Pk2PTK-5NnnBM=)

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgch66bh8ipnbuhtg8fp17g6i7kfeot1n2hit380_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbm00q39bvlkeatmvflpq3sdb1go4nrjpto7jmqo_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zosf01l3v71jhoqfcmsbl8nghu56gcvj65k756i0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znjg39a0o368ct4eqj1mtn9esjmsm1b4fvel0vho_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zge2jqb4i8i351k8n3e1o7sv3op7ja253vn1cb68_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zu4o100bar1m4ufq69n7nan9p10l8mc921getkq0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrp276tmqgngo4ej5cluvtuckpodm6nrakvq0178_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcqo0vhbvstevcof6spq53gps0b05a0j4mh26h90_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd4p4g1c14c91mrhcvgccjlr0nsjrm7emvaiqrj8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq9jgc9n7f585kd9k5dqnooosnafdhoulv5iqor8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z0qg09aj9bjk6n9l578vl2oopoeopepto9p06kf8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6v5lmkagvmifc5ug7bdj82d1tgk29q91v68d1l0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo3orsv61vr9s22tmr182klo2ntnu4o13biuco7o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2ca97jr79tt33l8qnm8dft7fqph9gf6vqjdhjf8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbek3fda8fpebknuna8tbviivgbk69inqdpc4v28_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsuvhg251bu32va1htkck6i5vq2g451d1j3fcli0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5aluu3mnb1qo4ikpsagjhjtevclpe0degf5h3b8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5fqjkoqle3lpnarrm3334nij6vsgak7cirodig_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zoe88c605el031dbeeq6ff4s50pn0300qnigei5o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68oj1c9jm2oh1k8gn48n24hhm1pr2c3geap36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp24as0qbr6rdb50ip3dg2c2rilb7m5rqnbc93go_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ge1pb4cph2bs)_

name: Anthony Bellotti, White Coat Waste Project
subject: These good dogs deserve a second chance
body:
When Violet was rescued, she was scared for months -- terrified to explore her house or go outside.

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UY76eisIKxyu5fMhA9KUc37ZLuvqtXhzXL3UYg4dzyIQjN_aWvpyMXIVAzJuzLk6BLPE9I990P7x15BIrQJmWJX7c5gAYiUTHq-S0jy9L6Dyc8ycOoey_4QjKrfmireyqAlLH5O4LXWgVXcVMgYT6Tv)
---
Fellow American, The U.S. government's funding of gain-of-function experiments in the Wuhan Lab -- which many experts believe likely caused the COVID pandemic -- is the most infamous and dangerous waste of taxpayer dollars we've uncovered. _But, the National Institutes of Health 's deplorable animal experiments go far beyond bats, China, and COVID. _ **With YOUR tax dollars, the federal government is giving dogs cocaine, infesting beagles with biting flies and ticks, and even cutting off these puppies ' vocal cords so they can't cry in the lab. ** Every year, there are more than 40,000 animals locked in federal labs, and the government's white coats typically kill survivors -- even the healthy adoptable ones -- rather than let taxpayers adopt them, or retire them to sanctuaries. [**Will you help the White Coat Waste Project fight to save the lives of lab animal survivors, including dogs like Violet? Please sign our urgent national petition to support Violet 's Law right away.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5Uasmvm8hxFPfuGsWKtxPWG4bk3bD1dlej5eIZAh0lVMA1Jf2z1XNq-AdOI2cMb5qcVxlBq0Id_wejxgCgxeUut8juukh_NKxLx-_oudaREo7ixiZwfHCXDWhXc53oVoy7u8s-jml_1Q7vk196NOceCt)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UYhRze6f4Zay0etibudSvlmBD5gL4ttCmw17T2Iv5H6P2xZqEALCBCr0s6rfhr37JIJ2Z8s6JHhXmoYd-lYosFZH7jKaMRuDQH7-aiTj7N9_eJ1OTPQJpm9gilXc-foVR4NmrubwA8rhsujEraUiASB)
---
The House and Senate have re-introduced the bipartisan **Violet 's Law** (S 707/HR 1465). **The bill is named after a hound -- named Violet (formerly gov't ID #CEGMBN) -- who was saved from a taxpayer-funded lab by our team.**
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UYFvXqigb_VvqNj91B6to_DLzdf5f-8__HFRY6Dr14WwrWZILdHkeaq2ZAMbWOwANSA4MseaLX_dfFUdeCvCAC99Ay2LzZm4uoO4IcjB4Cw7107-vEtECuJiZOktOpv3L1XAECJhnAJh-CsVtjA5K-6)
---
When Violet was rescued, she was scared for months -- terrified to explore her house or go outside. But, with assistance, Violet learned to embrace her new life, and now enjoys kisses and scratches ... NOT being poked and prodded by government white coats. _But most animals aren 't as fortunate as Violet. _ Records obtained by the White Coat Waste Project show that the National Institutes of Health and the University of Iowa rounded up more than a dozen abandoned PETS, strapped containers full of hungry sand flies to their skin, and locked the discarded dogs in cages so the _**flies would eat them alive**_.
The heartless white coats killed and dissected these dogs ... then admitted to our investigators that they destroyed many of the documents describing the experiments.
And this is just ONE experiment of many your tax dollars are funding every year! **_Those animals who are lucky enough to survive these heinous experiments -- and wasteful spending -- of our government are usually slaughtered and incinerated._** Thanks to our work at the White Coat Waste Project, the Department of Veterans Affairs, the Department of Defense, the Food and Drug Administration, and the National Institutes of Health have created some retirement policies for lab animals ... but not all federal bureaucrats are on board. [**Your signature on this national petition today will help us show Congress overwhelming support from the American people to demand the federal government retire and re-home ALL animals from their cruel and wasteful taxpayer-funded labs.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UbkNAxfuOWBTqjXNMK9m_HtBxwOT9ETviHsBkWunU6__1i5wiauo-ue_Eouw2flsso4xlUnrX9FAXTVpcZg8VTcAdGHdwPeCNFV59djQ6ViNDymEKJB3ezruXlzuePxIm-pY7r9eQvOGSULxrKAsgx4)
---
[Help save dogs like Violet!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UZRvCku6UcgqZ3TpduQA4xFaLtX47BuYqNs93HrT95sB9Fzl5k_tejGyoZflayPpYXoLOx44u8Qoy8asaX9d7WDfHPcT7moEh1GvQwPMQlKx6NPFFOcCxs0XSc7q62z7Gyo0_oqD_xoXnEvwytFuvwz)
---
At the White Coat Waste Project, we've championed Violet's Law -- the only one of its kind! **This legislation would require the U.S. government animal labs to place adoptable animals in loving homes and ensure other survivors are placed in animal sanctuaries. ** Polls show that 71% of Democrats and 72% of Republicans want to see these animals retired -- not killed. And scientific research shows that animals released from labs make great pets. While there is broad bipartisan support for animal retirement, agencies that experiment on animals -- including the Center for Disease Control and Prevention, the U.S. Department of Agriculture, and the Environmental Protection Agency have yet to create policies allowing it. Bottom line: government bureaucrats are too lazy to retire survivors like Violet. It's easier to just slaughter and burn them--like garbage. Let's make them do the right thing! Let's help animals like Violet to get a second chance at life, and to be freed from sadistic big government white coats.
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5Ub5BzUfIuBvtDTg2YB5PaV9_aYk8cD_hmNdiTlJ5pkDWqC6CoTl3MHQjXqjQCik-D8KAyzyiyUEtuKJxMMJEgZzaeY0i97xfcq1_5LGomURlJ2-ZnfWnGXzQYlnsmccWd5-jdvB3r3SBnj-igJBVGgB)
---
[**Please sign the national petition RIGHT AWAY to help the White Coat Waste Project ensure Violet's Law is passed in the House and Senate ... and that innocent animals being harmed and killed by the U.S. government are given a second chance at life.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57h1ANYwh6eCG2CTKKCjUzyWgOh1e6qHl2pgNUxkU_6AfdWUyHlkNbyqg7cd-RaPyAn2Qd6XcVsBn9LA30RKFjMsplIuLqnf4keFgpf02S7WGd5H4Azcbsa1Zc7UXbWWbO1ucAF5xOGOtUNhwkV1R5UYLpOe9OoXnHnTHsQMh5rBn6oD6v_y3l8AY1Ith_tcLBHGmIoWxLWW5ins7EbMZMRGVbdDRqxeTlZKql9sieVPbMgWcvLhz7O-kW29q3mT-9f-XK3p5icx1SbeA-Pz_qXRocKl_eS0bjYwfIrQgXH9i) Thank you for your support!
---
Anthony Bellotti President & Founder White Coat Waste Project
---
PO. Box 26029, Washington, DC 20001
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_t=3ttPYOGloHQJc6SWru35NdEdqWCzJmF-45o7PYzE7qS8ndi7f5c86mG900CcCbCQwlcJCIXXLLz9k4IxJoNnr-Z3FAMxl7M8b2bIzpwUHS1Oyu6hd0xZePJHQ7Eo8d7s_mrUxzdRHdsQ7l0V64TqrQrjEVG5M8cb5iFiWi95CoA%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=JnFNTD665cyUIngYAlcNe034xJnyXhAjA-3OTYhBvny9_0JpSpWDjxr4K--bbOTL6RNkN0Qo0vfCCkMCT1dDkF0qdcMEQ0MWq34aPa1tGNaKWfmxPr0ETq6GbGwVi2hTo0-M1S5EgEekp8p-t8f1dnpiVYuKjs9lC07WkyNigAhFpzLsNNJIAeojJTcnBuqIWj5yiCacWWTuTgbfKvv8Ew8ppPP5eVt0qs3niEg5fPGPer_OQNezzLxG1z-JdU16yPTrTIu-OQciwOhWV743xQ%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e45afbbf2e4741ce9fc68ca64f2858d8&_e=LImJCRhIrNBmzM-t6ff57v5T5C88FopMKhPxMfLlq1iRiDUQ6D9Vn2mMw6T57avWjIDlKrEuXqxBO0rFCqmSTUivUaK2lytHN1Pb-A15OdyBXD3VTGitnBPSWWOQ09Li1AEBOlPC98CE3X7Wi5CWmqV5ZjUA1tMx9j_W6Hc_waJicrEx5iHZBxY8GhxOXv6gWclHCe5jxrWpWy1xXSrktudo4Um3zTA1tkwResASg00%3D)_

name: Chloe Cole
subject: I'm a cautionary tale
body:
You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bbdc756d84a444aaeb944a50a91be20&_e=EDTPRq92oUWj5Sl8xgJcZ_izBRV-8a2bzX7Vq1irEV43MbvWA_TFHrlEprUijvn2V0LTenSrol933p78S4B9H_OGch53Kd5CFu6QnorKsxjsDn0YaZL4St07a5PZjhqzjvWKOpwOwureKuXu2ynqNdF6ulEZzya2Uut5ZeXfC8D5x3tV6nI_6uvrrX9SmSp1WLyH-pellKUSWP5lyR1PUJfCg6S9DynSqJAXl33wkq5J-9mTNyXR2bTAdhSxzDD6AJ6tV1Q5xg1pvkliKrrp3TBSu7zyC5Jk-bJq9tOJTM6WIIo4_APRf1MgnrvA3b5jsKR6bBngnYZaHgl5wQbKBjkNLXzA9V2KEYBjFC5wbhI4Ar3eBUKh8wZn93cgAi_i)
---
| | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy."
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bbdc756d84a444aaeb944a50a91be20&_e=EDTPRq92oUWj5Sl8xgJcZ_izBRV-8a2bzX7Vq1irEV43MbvWA_TFHrlEprUijvn2V0LTenSrol933p78S4B9H_OGch53Kd5CFu6QnorKsxjsDn0YaZL4St07a5PZjhqzjvWKOpwOwureKuXu2ynqNdF6ulEZzya2Uut5ZeXfC8D5x3tV6nI_6uvrrX9SmSp1WLyH-pellKUSWP5lyR1PUJfCg6S9DynSqJAXl33wkq4n49hxhO_IP3BnPlhezcDlMQzZBropClf9EhOkN4D805VX0iZBt7xMlA3NLZxvRHH5x8nIq5hjkP3SyPzxbFtkoC_-WG2LYDIorDIgeXE_y-XSE00O_iNCcbz1Qu0WYt7hwuikaJiqcgehyBc_kF5a)
---
**_Before transitioning_**
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bbdc756d84a444aaeb944a50a91be20&_e=EDTPRq92oUWj5Sl8xgJcZ_izBRV-8a2bzX7Vq1irEV43MbvWA_TFHrlEprUijvn2V0LTenSrol933p78S4B9H_OGch53Kd5CFu6QnorKsxjsDn0YaZL4St07a5PZjhqzjvWKOpwOwureKuXu2ynqNdF6ulEZzya2Uut5ZeXfC8D5x3tV6nI_6uvrrX9SmSp1WLyH-pellKUSWP5lyR1PUJfCg6S9DynSqJAXl33wkq5ttS-DOn1Cl0iJmzdBLTaVj2kHxZLWq4gv_4IUHGPEeJiqzkPEtXc_UkqTe-Aj17KeCmLKnsC3Yf2nG1oM2TXiDVFbBHeZAPFI_EKSUbw7DR5DdgMgVZZs8bgrB_B1s_szYtcHq70t2UK8OGAyQbpm)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bbdc756d84a444aaeb944a50a91be20&_e=EDTPRq92oUWj5Sl8xgJcZ_izBRV-8a2bzX7Vq1irEV43MbvWA_TFHrlEprUijvn2V0LTenSrol933p78S4B9H_OGch53Kd5CFu6QnorKsxjsDn0YaZL4St07a5PZjhqzjvWKOpwOwureKuXu2ynqNdF6ulEZzya2Uut5ZeXfC8D5x3tV6nI_6uvrrX9SmSp1WLyH-pellKUSWP5lyR1PUJfCg6S9DynSqJAXl33wkq6RMeypO0rYV63KOZ-aBZAePLBEdhytMaP9LQbbzNu2b_pQo3FxLjfR0_MsvQXIfOj5Jk1dL-rRhlUORAHvGbsIy3ymyNl9R41OZbxT3q_ZstUvzgAwViDtplWdv6NenYRMe1cbczF4BOfBGdcX1G8T) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0bbdc756d84a444aaeb944a50a91be20&_e=EDTPRq92oUWj5Sl8xgJcZ_izBRV-8a2bzX7Vq1irEV43MbvWA_TFHrlEprUijvn2V0LTenSrol933p78S4B9H_OGch53Kd5CFu6QnorKsxjsDn0YaZL4St07a5PZjhqzjvWKOpwOwureKuXu2ynqNdF6ulEZzya2Uut5ZeXfC8D5x3tV6nI_6uvrrX9SmSp1WLyH-pellKUSWP5lyR1PUJfCg6S9DynSqJAXl33wkq45-vWVdmxn8CNsPK7tfB0X5g-V9LKZw0C6arQTqeomi1pqwuX-c5OCrzbuWn-5tizRWep4vvQq18SJ5BEIiTF6e6lPS0BaS3WwclyohVa7jh8phN0er5DVjPiO6lXsln_N63icvkWsVZHE944s4v_o) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." clean_body: You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. | | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. | | | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy." | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Kaiser Permanente and we need your help
body:
Layla Jane was just 11 years old when she learned about transgenderism on social media.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, Layla Jane was just 11 years old when she learned about transgenderism on social media. From the time she was just 6 years old, she had struggled with her mental health. **This was all that the doctors at Kaiser Hospitals needed to irreversibly change her life forever.** At just 12 years old, doctors at Kaiser:
---
| |
* Failed to give Layla the proper mental health treatment she needed
* Put Layla on puberty-blockers and testosterone "treatment"

---
And when Layla was just 13 years old, doctors at Kaiser:
---
* Performed a radical double mastectomy on her.

---
The doctors at Kaiser manipulated Layla and her parents by falsely stating that Layla would die if she didn't undergo a chemical and surgical gender transition... ...and failed to inform Layla or her parents of the true impact of transgender surgery - they concealed scientific studies explaining how chemical and surgical gender "transitions" actually increase, dramatically, suicide rates. That's why my team at the Center for American Liberty is helping Layla SUE the doctors at Kaiser Hospitals who permanently mutilated her body. Today, Layla sees through the lies they fed her **and she 's fighting back against the doctors who permanently altered her life.** Will you help Layla Jane get the justice she deserves? [**Which is why I 'm asking you for a tax-deductible gift of $35 or more to help fund our lawsuit on behalf of Layla Jane. **](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=89d9a266c8c348808c0e9b02275857d5&_e=1JiW5lOc1RAl3JHctvibP8MR0PqB4eZv7Hyv9xITK7XpTVVWLfOV4qp411H3uUZniresMwPf6kfgwoYJj3xxm3jxAGXrl-a4dzaiaplDjzxJZo4UD113nwlcRABWbXLaaG0nX0F-Zo10EAr2xAXt8Q9rOEIvEX-fJjPrZTEBlqHkxI3iWvU5zc2inIl1UEycxV22FEpWqxmnnH3SdyjixUOHMUnOyfRDAPmfR043-obvxd4ayY1thYqt-xHPgbmyh9C6pIMqxFjSI7zwK-_vKzyVG2lElhTH_Ik6nPrr3LOxJb9clANg_VSNO1we7dhVaE5dtSPV6aeaanJlNDosRpNoTRawqQxSxju074WV0l4%3D) Doctors treated Layla like a lab rat in a twisted experiment of so-called "gender-affirming care." Sadly, you and I are seeing this happen to children all across America. And the fact is, we're going up against the largest medical group in the country. clean_body: Layla Jane was just 11 years old when she learned about transgenderism on social media. | | | | Fellow Patriot, Layla Jane was just 11 years old when she learned about transgenderism on social media. From the time she was just 6 years old, she had struggled with her mental health. This was all that the doctors at Kaiser Hospitals needed to irreversibly change her life forever. At just 12 years old, doctors at Kaiser: | | Failed to give Layla the proper mental health treatment she needed Put Layla on puberty-blockers and testosterone "treatment" And when Layla was just 13 years old, doctors at Kaiser: Performed a radical double mastectomy on her. The doctors at Kaiser manipulated Layla and her parents by falsely stating that Layla would die if she didn't undergo a chemical and surgical gender transition... ...and failed to inform Layla or her parents of the true impact of transgender surgery - they concealed scientific studies explaining how chemical and surgical gender "transitions" actually increase, dramatically, suicide rates. That's why my team at the Center for American Liberty is helping Layla SUE the doctors at Kaiser Hospitals who permanently mutilated her body. Today, Layla sees through the lies they fed her and she 's fighting back against the doctors who permanently altered her life.** Will you help Layla Jane get the justice she deserves? Doctors treated Layla like a lab rat in a twisted experiment of so-called "gender-affirming care." Sadly, you and I are seeing this happen to children all across America. And the fact is, we're going up against the largest medical group in the country. The only way to shut down these barbaric procedures from being performed on vulnerable children is by taking the hospitals and doctors responsible to court. But they'll be fighting back against us with a team of high-powered lawyers. Any gift that you can send today will go a long way in the fight. By supporting our case against Kaiser Hospitals, you will bring us one step closer to getting Layla Jane the justice she deserves and one step closer to putting an end to these barbaric procedures being performed on children. | | Thank you for taking a stand! | | Sincerely, Harmeet K. name: VoteVets
subject: Tuberville is the GOP’s Problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Tell them to do something about him
#
Tommy Tuberville has never served a day in the Armed Forces. Matter of fact, the only thing he’s ever really done before getting elected to represent Alabama in the Senate was coach a football team.
But here we are — hundreds of senior flag officers in the most powerful Military in human history are still having their promotions held up.
By this guy.
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230620_vv_tuberville_petition/?source=em230620-1-15?source2=10054.3013755.eCDA9Y&akid=10054%2E3013755%2EeCDA9Y)
This has gone on for months. We’re doing everything we can to get these promotions moving. It’s our duty — both to honor these officers and their commitment to our nation, and to protect the country.
But where’s the GOP? Where’s that supposed “pro-America, pro-Military, pro-Veteran party?”
As far as we’re concerned, the leadership of the GOP and their entire party are as complicit as Tuberville in this. And it’s time they started feeling the heat.
[**Tuberville is the GOP’s problem, so tell them to do something about him. Add your name and tell the GOP to step up and call off Tuberville.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230620_vv_tuberville_petition/?source=em230620-1-15?source2=10054.3013755.eCDA9Y&akid=10054%2E3013755%2EeCDA9Y)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230620_vv_tuberville_petition/?source=em230620-1-15?source2=10054.3013755.eCDA9Y&akid=10054%2E3013755%2EeCDA9Y)
---
So far, it’s just organizations like VoteVets and our allies in Congress driving this issue. It hasn’t gotten anywhere near the coverage it merits.
But if we can get thousands of you to join us, we can put more pressure on the press. Then the press will put more pressure on Mitch McConnell and the rest of the GOP. And then, with any luck, they’ll put more pressure on Tuberville.
Step by step, Derek.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26919%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ak2kg4C%2f97fvPqjmXAYEbA&sysid=1)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26919%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ak2kg4C%2f97fvPqjmXAYEbA&sysid=1)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. **[https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26910%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QEb6AkaOtaYqpSc7AoUz2g&sysid=1)**

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Your America News
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Broadmoor Town Hall Meeting (Thursday) AND San Francisco Pride Parade (Sunday)
body:
Join me for the Broadmoor Town Hall Meeting on Thursday AND the SF Pride Parade on Sunday! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5a14c9d9e5ec/broadmoor-town-hall-meeting-thursday-and-san-francisco-pride-parade-sunday?e=c0babbc643)
---
| |
---
| | Dear friends,

June 22nd @ 7:00 PM I'll be hosting a very important Town Hall Meeting at the Broadmoor Community Center to discuss the future of the Broadmoor Police Department. We will have Chief Connolly from the BPD and a representative from LAFCo speaking on this crucial neighborhood safety issue. Please forward this upcoming event to friends and family who may live in Broadmoor:

If you can attend please RSVP with Mike Richardson on my staff: 650-363-4572 or [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Broadmoor%20Town%20Hall%20Meeting%20\(6%2F22%20%40%207%3A00%20PM\))

_**[PRIDE PARADE - SAN FRANCISCO](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=910a36a3df&e=c0babbc643)**_

Join me at the SF Pride Parade this year! The Pride Parade will be on June 25th, going down Market Street from Embarcadero to the Celebration at Civic Center.

My staff will send you a confirmation and provide you with the meeting time and location for the day of the parade! Complete this form to join me: [https://forms.gle/rATQoRfbmSMZGPeJ6](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=c7e91bd7da&e=c0babbc643)

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=92879fedc4&e=c0babbc643)
In Friendship,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5

---
|
---
|
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=a2cf42ec93) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=a2cf42ec93).

---

name: Steve Simon
subject: Our election workers are facing an increase in alarming threats, harassment, and intimidation. Here’s what we did about it:
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65108153/412361809/1241229479?amount=15&refcode=ss_em_fr_30DO 30NTL_230620&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWExZTUzZjItODMwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nejbHp836l8z8_8Jf6DtzTpHjOM_ct9eNz2B9YUfnWI=) In recent elections, our election workers have faced an increase in alarming threats, harassment, and intimidation. From being followed to their cars to receiving menacing phone calls, these essential workers have sometimes been subjected to a level of hostility that goes beyond political disagreements. **We have taken a critical step to protect our election workers. I helped enact a new law making it explicitly illegal to intimidate, harass, or threaten our election officials.** Passage of this law is a crucial milestone in safeguarding the integrity of our elections and ensuring the safety of those who tirelessly work to uphold our democracy. But our work is far from over. Threats to election workers may continue to escalate, as 2024 approaches - fueled by false claims and disinformation surrounding our election system. We must act now to confront this challenge head-on. By supporting our campaign, you contribute to the resources we need to advocate for stronger protections, raise awareness about ongoing threats, and push back against the spread of false information. [**Our first quarterly fundraising deadline since the enactment of the new law is in just days and I need your help to show that we’re fighting back against disinformation. We need to raise another $20,000 before then. Will you please chip in now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65108162/412361817/1241229479?amount=15&refcode=ss_em_fr_30DO 30NTL_230620&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWExZTUzZjItODMwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nejbHp836l8z8_8Jf6DtzTpHjOM_ct9eNz2B9YUfnWI=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

| | | Our state has always been a beacon of opportunity, innovation, and freedom. But now, we face a new threat that puts our very way of life at risk. China seeks to infiltrate our state, threatening our jobs, our technology, and our security; **_we cannot allow this to happen. _**
That's why I'm calling on you to join the fight to protect Michigan. It's time to take a stand and defend our homes and families. Together, we can safeguard Michigan's interests and ensure a brighter future for all.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: The Pittsburgh Tree of Life killer has been convicted. Now we must work to end anti-Semitic hate, and move forward with the Jewish Democratic Council of America to elect Democrats who’ll work to keep all our families safer
body:
Robert Bowers guilty on 63 charges
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc1d41039-dc61-40db-81fd-601c33127f7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Last week, Robert Bowers was found guilty of all 63 charges in the worst anti-Semtic attack in U.S. history--the horrifying mass murder of 11 attendees of the Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh.** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bfd4f63-17dd-4440-aa0d-5d8467e1cc84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _You may remember, Bowers didn't act alone. Well, he did, but the devil on his shoulder telling him to "kill all Jews" was _**_inspired, in his own words, by the anti-Semitic lie "George Soros" was funding a "Central American caravan" of "dangerous illegals" & "unknown Middle Easterners invading" the U.S._** **_Donald Trump repeated the lie endlessly, with an advisor of his calling it a "political gift._" _Fox personalities, Mike Pence, Matt Gaetz and scores of other GOPers repeated this blood libel, __leading Bowers to massacre a group of innocent people in a house of worship for peace and prayer._** _The Jewish Democratic Council of America (JDCA) fights anti-Semitism and to turn out the Jewish Democratic vote. But the JDCA also fights for gun safety, humane immigration reform, democracy & human rights_, _all factors that led to the Tree of Life Massacre. They'll never forget this horrific tragedy, as **it inspires them to fight to elect Democrats who support these key issues. **_ [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or more to the JDCA to end the hate, elect progressive Democrats and never again must grieve due to terrorist attacks at a house of worship inspired by Republicans?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc8373b0-6fac-451d-a617-6aff7b9f1a04/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for fighting for equality, democracy and security. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddd1d60f-012a-4b16-b86c-aa04d86f33c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/co-sponsor-email -petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf  Friend, The woke left melted down when I called out Joe Biden’s Pride Month flag display at the White House. The American flag should NEVER be sidelined for a radical social agenda — and that’s why I’m introducing the One Flag For All Act. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/co-sponsor-email-petitio n?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf Will you SIGN on as a co-sponsor? This bill is simple. It prohibits any flag to be flown, draped, or displayed on federal buildings, with limited exceptions. I’m fed up with this White House putting its social agenda before American patriotism. And this is a simple way to put a stop to it. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/co-sponsor-email-petitio n?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf I’m hoping for 1,500 co-sponsors to sign on before midnight. Will you take action now? Let’s make sure that Old Glory reigns supreme as a symbol of America’s freedom... freedom that our veterans have fought and died to protect.  https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/co-sponsor-email- petition?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/co-sponsor-email-petitio n?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf SIGN ON HERE »   https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email -footer?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023june20hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. Sylvia Garcia. “As someone who was born in the district Michelle is running to serve, and as someone who still has family living in TX-15, I know the urgent needs facing South Texas. For our freedoms, futures, and prosperity, vote for Michelle Vallejo.” “We need leaders from our frontera who will fight for our American Dream in Congress,” said Rep. Veronica Escobar. “I am proud to endorse Michelle Vallejo because I know she is fighting to make sure our families have access to affordable health care, protect Social Security and Medicare for our seniors, defend a woman’s right to choose, and drive forward solutions for our border. We need Michelle in Congress working with us to create a better future for all of us.” These are leaders who have seen the kind of work that goes into making sure Texans’ voices are heard in Congress — and I know I can be a part of that force for our South Texas. Together, we can build a stronger Texas. **[Make a donation right now to personally join Rep. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government.

| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7p46hn2q4cbcoghklathln9hoiv7scq1ael32lg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ie4p32chh2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves.
