name: Replace Sinema
subject: PETITION: Tell Congress to pass the Equality Act
body:
Sinema’s beloved filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? This is an issue of basic, constitutionally protected freedoms and protection from direct, discriminatory attacks against those freedoms. **Sinema promised to ensure those basic rights were protected–not to do the bidding of rich donors and uphold a racist procedural relic.** **That’s why we’re participating in this joint petition to demand that Congress pass the Equality Act and stop the denial of our freedoms.[Add your name HERE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf0gvZ1ERO09a0-tPfcyfxiUo-BMu8apYKQHkirwVks5alD4iVmzQgn-fQF0ZRimsadxdo-og3xgu0lSvnzKHptPtplP3Geqjsoqu97g8dZU8q6xy0uxaPBTydexSK9FbGQEdty2J9J2cVq5Dq1ePdaKWmnowrl3-fAm467Up3dsRwiGgA0yBOUxpEMbBGs4LlLq6nU1Wjp7xkYti-wZl5jhRAGlyX_TORfZrYgWplRoDl3HZXTGCLLvGSxbQ5mKOjIfee3QKnw4OxLSRMGicDwss0JqJWDoc2XP6yYTCC2GsA4wo8jZzMMOP-Zi6YdzLX_W39XwLbqjxn5eeYJUilwF6FdXIRgNI4eTMjhuxNcwLCXlkJ670K_6xr9dyGoOTShWlt3b41K1UGArWIcGmZ2XsR1qRsLUx6vUbRGu9UA0Q/3x7/if1r8sG_RuqxPieJzq-FmQ/h0/coZ_ios_pCl2k9ByNOY4m6xu-Bqv48FoQzsAoiW_ntU)**[**__**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf9uS00VNqonlXfR8_JfiDQgkZpBgzA8o_E0IAW5IDEeVrTGFtx8dR5UMQSEjf9HZyCJfC4ooqnmm0XfJqU5nnoLprgglJrSwkkGBzgkckpdSvgqFRDDA9OLwKrGCfUNpubTBn3dHFntnLMCXSw8F-rur4xXfFulIHdA9b2eSSPrmSwsccMg2F1MhHC617ReMq4YQNW1LROYTMtY7z6eLVrqf725zHEIbvcqwIQCoNL0EuNFjDabMEWdr2J6CCUNKTGzWYUWPNkvxGYOvanX119ayeQmidPuAbTv78_SGtjbg/3x7/if1r8sG_RuqxPieJzq-FmQ/h1/K5cHjyIYcKYttdx9xb9DB03HkuL3RAz8Y0QXY66o6k4) We’ll be blunt: when Sinema was elected as the first openly bisexual Senator in U.S. history, the LGBT community – including us – were thrilled. We had no idea how quickly she would sell us all out. She prioritized cutting deals with Republicans over her own community – just as she has prioritized her Wall Street donors over her Arizona constituents. Shameful. So the next time Sinema tweets in support of Pride Month or waves the Rainbow Flag, **never forget that she put the filibuster above the basic rights of millions of Americans.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf0gvZ1ERO09a0-tPfcyfxiUo-BMu8apYKQHkirwVks5alD4iVmzQgn-fQF0ZRimsadxdo-og3xgu0lSvnzKHptPtplP3Geqjsoqu97g8dZU8q6xy0uxaPBTydexSK9FbGQEdty2J9J2cVq5Dq1ePdaKWmnowrl3-fAm467Up3dsb4JbfNSG9lYucD__XtbP2So-_7xjtmeZGks6N_ErbHiuDbMo044Qc8Ynx9DplMDSL9VkvmS5r6enKXPr3uXy06zlY8054DNhvUCj_dq8MXPF--W3ebRZ1vN3evRPsSn8_yiSu9aCDTDDXnKl2E1SXbndzM4nwwgKnQpLC8PloSOWN_97ljjipJwBYDmXsvsFqtpsdbVkuCBjvNIU455saF9whAucrtj4Etr2Mi8L06atMSJxTWnRhFquxIGt9oKMA/3x7/if1r8sG_RuqxPieJzq-FmQ/h2/sclt_BOcsbG5xa46VUN1vIXZHffLSJh8TTgvINjJb3E) **[Please add your name to our petition to pass the Equality Act and outlaw discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf0gvZ1ERO09a0-tPfcyfxiUo-BMu8apYKQHkirwVks5alD4iVmzQgn-fQF0ZRimsadxdo-og3xgu0lSvnzKHptPtplP3Geqjsoqu97g8dZU8q6xy0uxaPBTydexSK9FbGQEdty2J9J2cVq5Dq1ePdaKWmnowrl3-fAm467Up3dsasETYHA2bYt21RfEGMegmNWGQRqRQ9hf0c9XDa7LYbwMNgQuHjHyROH8E-STuowfJ6MdbZwUX8SPzWJvHPrj57e87wSAPxaPRmh0A1nY9TUf5rZwt9D3luTnBcIvOzomPUOOaTzAdy4ZG0vlJSsIIxKzUWFV2sFFjZrv9QvJ_qaZhabO8Ul7UzowVOJPLPMDAz5Fe6cbhfUFEISjQ0e8kwIzk0dFv5L8PIE_XPFxSkOVEmNLELrl0L9jsvVtqsYMQ/3x7/if1r8sG_RuqxPieJzq-FmQ/h3/qldDt9_AtIu1r9exRb4zm1nuz41Mxio4yo0AuvLizpM)** Happy Pride 🏳️🌈 -Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

clean_body: Sinema’s beloved filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? This is an issue of basic, constitutionally protected freedoms and protection from direct, discriminatory attacks against those freedoms. Sinema promised to ensure those basic rights were protected–not to do the bidding of rich donors and uphold a racist procedural relic. That’s why we’re participating in this joint petition to demand that Congress pass the Equality Act and stop the denial of our freedoms. We’ll be blunt: when Sinema was elected as the first openly bisexual Senator in U.S. history, the LGBT community – including us – were thrilled. We had no idea how quickly she would sell us all out. She prioritized cutting deals with Republicans over her own community – just as she has prioritized her Wall Street donors over her Arizona constituents. Shameful. So the next time Sinema tweets in support of Pride Month or waves the Rainbow Flag, never forget that she put the filibuster above the basic rights of millions of Americans. Happy Pride 🏳️🌈 -Change for Arizona 2024 PAC | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Change for Arizona 2024 PAC, please .

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: Save the Date: The Art of Democracy and Keystone Progress Summit!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Are you ready for it...| | |
---
Hi Friend, Happy Pride Month! We hope that you and your loved ones are in spaces where you can be your entire selves without fear. It's absolutely terrifying to witness how much legislation is not just getting introduced, but passed, that overrides the recommendations of the American medical establishment and makes it dangerous just to exist. These maps show how widespread the proposals and laws are throughout the US:
* [Map of states attacking gender-affirming care](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65109538/412367038/-38790909?utm_medium=ads&utm_source=GoogleSearch&utm_content=GACMap-General&utm_campaign=GoogleGrant&utm_source=GS&utm_medium=AD&utm_campaign=BPI-HRC-Grant&utm_content=657195962805&utm_term=anti%20lgbtq%20bills&gclid=CjwKCAjwyqWkBhBMEiwAp2yUFpOwnq5C5EDsUDnse4MBvfogkW4D-sSZuONk4drLUEgWFkWXfwD8nBoCHbMQAvD_BwE&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTQxY2I3LTg2MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6DrrO7NFKPvYW_BNX2vywjX2EheFy0oYje322y8CBVY=&emci=6e3676e9-260a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f541cb7-860f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
* [Mapping Attacks on LGBTQ Rights in US State Legislatures](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65109539/412367039/-1978262397?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTQxY2I3LTg2MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6DrrO7NFKPvYW_BNX2vywjX2EheFy0oYje322y8CBVY=&emci=6e3676e9-260a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f541cb7-860f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)

This is where PA stands on LGBTQI policies:
* [PA's equity profile](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65109540/412367040/-1886778126?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTQxY2I3LTg2MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6DrrO7NFKPvYW_BNX2vywjX2EheFy0oYje322y8CBVY=&emci=6e3676e9-260a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f541cb7-860f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)
* [Municipal Equity Index from the Human Rights Campaign](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65109546/412367043/844797065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTQxY2I3LTg2MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6DrrO7NFKPvYW_BNX2vywjX2EheFy0oYje322y8CBVY=&emci=6e3676e9-260a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f541cb7-860f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)

Also, Happy Juneteenth Weekend! In 2021 President Biden signed a bill officially making Juneteenth a federal holiday. But, if many conservative legislators have their way, our children won't be taught in school about the founding of this country on slavery and genocide or about the long Black freedom struggle. Currently, at least 44 states have passed or proposed legislation to prohibit teaching about structural racism. When history is suppressed it's a sign that we should learn more! Check out the Zinn Education Project's page: [June 19, 1865: “Juneteenth” Emancipation Day](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65109549/412367049/-1262059677?fbclid=IwAR2_tEa5xL83lXQVDnNMvWroKyo-z0aYRGKuoncYRASpm2kqG_CR7il-6Mw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmNTQxY2I3LTg2MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6DrrO7NFKPvYW_BNX2vywjX2EheFy0oYje322y8CBVY=&emci=6e3676e9-260a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5f541cb7-860f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). While we should certainly be pissed off about all of this - let's transform it into fuel for creating a better future. While we can't replace the people making these decisions today, we can work to change them in every election. While there is no big US Senate seat or Governor's race on the line this year, the people who sit on your city or county council, your school board, in the Judge's chairs, and the District Attorney are just as important, if not more so. So be pissed as hell and then make sure to channel that anger and the need for change at the ballot box!
---

clean_body: Are you ready for it...| | | Hi Friend, Happy Pride Month! We hope that you and your loved ones are in spaces where you can be your entire selves without fear. It's absolutely terrifying to witness how much legislation is not just getting introduced, but passed, that overrides the recommendations of the American medical establishment and makes it dangerous just to exist. These maps show how widespread the proposals and laws are throughout the US: This is where PA stands on LGBTQI policies: Also, Happy Juneteenth Weekend! In 2021 President Biden signed a bill officially making Juneteenth a federal holiday. But, if many conservative legislators have their way, our children won't be taught in school about the founding of this country on slavery and genocide or about the long Black freedom struggle. Currently, at least 44 states have passed or proposed legislation to prohibit teaching about structural racism. When history is suppressed it's a sign that we should learn more! Check out the Zinn Education Project's page: . While we should certainly be pissed off about all of this - let's transform it into fuel for creating a better future. While we can't replace the people making these decisions today, we can work to change them in every election. While there is no big US Senate seat or Governor's race on the line this year, the people who sit on your city or county council, your school board, in the Judge's chairs, and the District Attorney are just as important, if not more so. So be pissed as hell and then make sure to channel that anger and the need for change at the ballot box! | | COMING UP! | | The Art of Democracy We're excited to announce the first annual Art of Democracy series that will take place in Pittsburgh during the last week of September. Stay tuned for more details, a call-out for pieces, and invitations to community events centered around perspectives on our democracy and low-commitment actions to take! | | | To stay up-to-date on the Summit, bookmark this page: | | | In solidarity and love,the KPEF/KP Team | | KPEF engages communities and creates spaces for people across the progressive spectrum to It takes time and resources to fight for our rights and we value paying our skilled staff living wages. | = | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Peter,

_**Are you as excited as I am to elect Ron DeSantis as our next President of the United States?**_ I know you've seen it before: so often, candidates run for political office with promises of wonderful change that they plan to bring to our national stage. Instead, they end up going rogue. They turn into listless vessels bending in the wind and beholden to polls and politics. These candidates do not deliver on the promises they make when they run. They do not stand by the plan they were elected to enact. I'm reaching out to you because I want you to know that Ron DeSantis is NOT that kind of politician. I am so proud of the Governor for **ALWAYS** staying true to the promises he makes to the people he serves. _**I have a challenge for you, Peter.**_ If you aren't yet convinced that Governor DeSantis is the right candidate to lead our nation, go back and watch his State of the State and Inaugural addresses. Listen to his promises, then read about his accomplishments in the state of Florida. **Ron DeSantis lays out a vision, and he executes on that vision. Every time. He does what he says he 's going to. He gets it done, and he wins. This will never change. ** The Governor has the record, he has the drive, and he has the energy to lead our nation. Help me elect a leader we can believe in again. **[If you can afford to support his vision, will you join me?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=14c5fc049cd841d990442b4dd24c32b1&_e=CMu4-21_mVlPNpioNORy5sJq2KIiwjK7t8FX98GwAZMV6UgBAHC1qs0C5DfQL7orfF-sssLGvfyBXVb0GlkYr-IelHmXC88ZylB-LKPWLKr7o0oMUm_XU6wH9n7fzuZGyseYIKIEA7kaVwRCJougcZQnh7cfjtR8M2vTYrq8rjeG6opLVKxzL8UDGzE-cY_76uJahjBX3YZbMCMFqcg8QmZAJNOF-nAorqkC9VXOho6bskBEElkFRhPGFvj98_ZcvTMiNNaaLTHNBrQOyNwKKivreRC7ZVJovVIdELxxUwAlWjDUv2XyReyxqmCz2U5zghCI6x51WYxgwQ-xJBGGQfWPBE1SPG66YXQOF1ljpGZgbN8IMJ7h4XLyfpSZoXBE9vQmfGV2Ck1zTijjWG-h1g%3D%3D "If you can afford to support his vision, will you join me?")**

Casey DeSantis
First Lady of Florida

**RON DESANTIS GOT RESULTS FOR FLORIDA**
---
| | | **K-12 Education**

Parents' rights have been increasingly under assault around the nation, but in Florida, we stand up for the rights of parents and the fundamental role they play in the education of their children.
* School choice is available for all Floridians by eliminating enrollment caps and income requirements while still prioritizing lower-income families and expanding scholarships for students with special needs.

* Florida is now the first state in the nation to have school choice fully integrated in the public K-12 funding process.

* Florida is ranked #1 in education freedom, #1 in parental empowerment, #1 in state spending on private school choice, and #1 in school choice enrollment.

* Florida eliminated Critical Race Theory in its K-12 schools.

* In 2021 Florida created annual increases in scholarships for students with special needs and we provided $750 for transportation costs to the chosen school.

* Florida has established robust civics education requirements so that students learn about the constitution and what it means to be an American.

**Higher Education Reform**

Academia, writ large, across the country, has lost its way. In Florida, we're changing that with a series of reforms:
* Ending tenure by instating regular performance reviews.

* Dismantling the monopolistic style of higher ed accreditation agencies.

* Resetting the focus of higher ed towards preparing students to be contributing members of society, rather than imposing political ideology.

* Ensuring students and staff are evaluated based on merit and eliminating so-called D.E.I. programs, which are effectively programs based in discrimination, exclusion, and indoctrination.

**China**

Ron DeSantis has taken action to stand against the United States' greatest geopolitical threat -- the Chinese Communist Party (CCP). He signed legislation that:
* Prevents Chinese entities or affiliates from buying farmland in Florida or land near our military bases.

* Stops sensitive data from being stored on servers that might be owned by entities affiliated with the CCP.

* Prohibits the Chinese influence that we rooted out of higher education from working its way into our primary and secondary education institutions, including a prohibition on Confucious institutes.

* Blocks access to dangerous applications, such as TikTok, on government servers and devices.

**Protecting Life **
* The Heartbeat Protection Act protects the most vulnerable: babies in the womb whose hearts have already begun to beat.

**Defending 2nd Amendment Rights **
* Enacted constitutional carry that allows Floridians to carry concealed weapons without a government-issued permission slip.

**Law and Order**

Other states endanger their citizens by making it easier to put criminals back on the street. Here in Florida, we support and enact policies to protect our communities and keep our people safe. Governor DeSantis signed reforms that:
* Strengthen pre-trial detention and pushed back against woke "bail reform" efforts

* Increasing sentences for drug traffickers that target children with dangerous fentanyl.

* Subjected child rapists to the death penalty while simultaneously reforming death penalty statutes to ensure justice.

* Gov. DeSantis is also the only elected official in America to remove a "progressive" Soros-funded district attorney from office.

**Immigration**

The Biden Border Crisis has wreaked havoc across the United States and has put Americans in danger. But Governor DeSantis did not stand idly by while the federal government abandoned its lawful duties to protect our country, instead he:
* Mandated immigration status verification through E-Verify for public and private employers.

* Made knowingly transporting illegal immigrant minors a felony.

* Made using a fake ID to gain employment a felony.

* Required hospitals to report healthcare costs for illegal aliens.

* Gave Florida more money to send more illegal immigrants to more "sanctuary" jurisdictions such as Martha's Vineyard.

**Prescription Drugs**

Pharmacy benefit managers and Big Pharma have managed to escape the public eye and work in the shadows for far too long. Ron DeSantis signed a bill that takes the reins back from these healthcare monopolies while empowering consumers.
* With the legislation passed this session, drug companies must disclose wholesale drug price increases of 15% or more.

* Florida is also prohibiting pharmacy benefit managers from mandating mail orders.

**Tax Cuts**

Florida's economy has consistently outpaced the nation, but we are still fighting against inflationary policies imposed on us by the Biden administration. In Florida, we supported our residents and helped them afford the goods that they need.
* We lowered tolls across the state.

* We created a permanent tax exemption on diapers, wipes, baby clothes, cribs, strollers, and much more.

* We reduced taxes by nearly $5 billion - a Florida record.

**Legal Reform and Housing**

As Florida's population booms, we have provided record support for Florida's workforce to get quality housing and live the American Dream.
* The Live Local Act dedicates more than half a billion dollars to incentivize and jumpstart new construction.

* The Hometown Heroes Program makes sure police officers, firefighters, teachers, and other community leaders can afford to live in or near the communities they serve.

**Environmental, social, and corporate governance & Central Bank Digital Currency **

Ron DeSantis refuses to let elites circumvent the ballot box to implement a radical ideological agenda through financial sleight of hand.
* Governor DeSantis signed legislation that prohibits the financial sector from considering so-called "Social Credit Scores" in banking and lending practices that aim to prevent Floridians from obtaining loans, lines of credit, and bank accounts.

* And Governor DeSantis is on the record: NO to CBDCs or Federally-controlled digital dollar. Any proposal will be dead on arrival.

**Let Kids Be Kids **

There is a disturbing trend in our society to try to sexualize young people. That is not the way you look out for our children. You protect children--and Governor DeSantis has, by signing landmark legislation that:
* Prohibits sex reassignment surgeries and prescriptions for children under 18.

* Bans children from attending drag shows.

* Protects students from having to "declare" their pronouns in school and ensures that students are not forced to use pronouns that are not based on a student's biological sex.

* Expands parents' rights in the education of their children by prohibiting classroom instruction on sexual orientation and gender identity in Pre-K through 8th grade.

* Protects young women from being forced to use bathrooms and locker rooms alongside biological males who have decided that they can invade women's spaces.

---
| | **These kinds of accomplishments are why Floridians re-elected Ron DeSantis as their governor by a whopping 20-point margin, turning Democrat strongholds red. We need candidates and proven records who can win --that's Ron DeSantis. Are you ready to win big for ALL of America? **
---

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=14c5fc049cd841d990442b4dd24c32b1&_e=CMu4-21_mVlPNpioNORy5sJq2KIiwjK7t8FX98GwAZMV6UgBAHC1qs0C5DfQL7orfF-sssLGvfyBXVb0GlkYr-IelHmXC88ZylB-LKPWLKr7o0oMUm_XU6wH9n7fzuZGyseYIKIEA7kaVwRCJougcZQnh7cfjtR8M2vTYrq8rjeG6opLVKxzL8UDGzE-cY_76uJahjBX3YZbMCMFqcg8QmZAJNOF-nAorqkC9VXOho6bskBEElkFRhPGFvj98_Zc5sxYnvi_mz6WdPv3puJXJVCLo2rM2DY8A6HfyCd6UpAushT_FsyrL4tNkmwVFn-3HouKEmZiA2oRpsaRUkic9EVQ94_O0ukAtyttG3fScx5jQTtVYmcAloVeCjawAYeajwgAdeqQbr62br_AgKHzcQ%3D%3D)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.

name: Andy Kim
subject: Why I ran six years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
This month marks six years since I first ran for Congress.

I'm not someone who ever thought that I would run for office. But six years ago, things changed.

My area of New Jersey was represented by someone who was the lead author of a horrendous bill to repeal health care coverage. In 2017 it passed the House of Representatives with an amendment that gutted pre-existing condition protections.

That was my Congressman from New Jersey.

He represented me and my family.

He was the one that came up with the idea to gut preexisting condition protections.

I felt betrayed by my own Congressperson.

I couldn't believe that he represented my community, my family. My father had polio and beat it – I'm the son of a polio survivor. My youngest son, who was just a newborn at that time, had health challenges of his own. He now had a preexisting condition.

After they passed that terrible health care bill in the House, I told my wife that I felt we could and needed to do something to hold our congressperson accountable. It was unacceptable to support ripping health care coverage away from millions with preexisting conditions.

So I decided to run.

The person I was taking on had won his previous election by a large margin, and Trump had easily won this district. So when I announced I was running, a lot of people, including people within my own political party, told me, you know, you seem like a nice guy and all, but there's no way you're going to be able to win this seat in Congress . I didn't listen. I was determined to bring people together and build a movement for change.

Six years later, I'm glad that not only was I able to continue on but show that we can win . I can say with certainty that I wouldn't be in Congress without the support of our grassroots movement and people like you.This is still a divided district, and today, I am asking for your continued support. My campaign is approaching our end-of-quarter deadline, and we need to raise $15,030 more to reach our goal. Can you support our grassroots movement with a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-06-20-6yearsago&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=02b5398a-870f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73]

More soon,

Andy

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: A pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients?
body:
Congress just introduced the American Dream and Promise Act to provide a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients. | | | I have some promising news, Peter: **Congress just introduced the _American Dream and Promise Act_** — finally taking action to create a pathway to citizenship for DACA recipients and those with Temporary Protected Status or Deferred Enforced Departure. This is a step in the right direction, but we won’t stop until these policies become a reality and ALL undocumented people have a pathway to citizenship. **Will you support our fight for permanent protections by making a donation today? The _American Dream and Promise Act_ was introduced with bipartisan support in the House to provide a pathway to citizenship for hundreds of thousands of DACA recipients and TPS and DED holders.
As DACA recipients face an uncertain future while courts seek to shut down the program, we’re encouraged to see Congress finally responding to this moment with the urgency it demands.
But DACA recipients aren’t the only ones facing uncertainty — with millions more undocumented people living under the fear of detention and deportation — so our work can’t stop here.
**That’s why United We Dream Action is taking action to secure a comprehensive, expansive pathway to citizenship for not only DACA recipients and TPS and DED holders, but ALL undocumented people.**
We know for a fact that Congress has the power to deliver after working together to introduce this bipartisan bill. Now, we need to keep up our advocacy work to secure an expansive, inclusive pathway to citizenship that leaves no one behind. Will you join us?
**If you’re able, please add a donation today to help keep up our fight for permanent protections. We’re grateful for any amount you can give in support of our ongoing work to uplift immigrant communities.**

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvpnno5fj77rjstd1jk3dbab6ad15g5eafm5ak58_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9iecp70cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9ahhrnbedp72e9cvktumlrla37qgkh4qlrkiijg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9iecp70cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi6c9iefg6saj33dsa796iicoflblb9o0ud91va8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9iecp70cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Colin Allred for U.S. Senate
subject: the fight of Ted Cruz’s life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend: This race is bigger than defeating Ted Cruz. Our Democratic Senate majority and the White House are on the line in 2024.
The future of our democracy and so many of our fundamental rights, from voting to reproductive freedom, depend on Democrats winning. Unfortunately, the 2024 Senate map strongly favors Republicans.
But here's the thing: Experts at CNN and FiveThirtyEight are calling Texas our BEST pickup opportunity – and if we can flip this seat, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!
Please, split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America before our midnight deadline to help Colin Allred beat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority! → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Our chances have never looked better to flip Texas: This team raised more in our first 24 hours than Ted Cruz raised in the first three months of the year, causing Inside Elections to update their official Texas ranking from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground." People are calling this the political fight of Ted Cruz's life.
That’s why Mitch McConnell, GOP mega donors and shady special interests are going to spend whatever it takes to save Ted Cruz and defeat Colin.
But we've got to keep up our momentum, friend, and that's where you come in. We have an ambitious $150,000 daily fundraising goal because in a battleground race, money could be the difference between winning and losing. Right now, we're falling short, and we're counting on you to help close the gap.
Please, will you split a donation of $15 or more between our campaign and Serve America to help us defeat Ted Cruz? Every dollar matters in our fight to flip Texas blue and protect the Senate – and the future of our democracy – from Cruz and his allies → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thank you for being a critical part of this grassroots team.
Team Allred

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

name: =?utf-8?B?8J+aqFRydW1wIHVwZGF0ZSB8fCBEQVNT?=
subject: “I won 2020 by a lot, okay? Let’s get that straight. I won in 2020.”
body:
Last night Trump peddled dangerous conspiracy theories and lies in an interview with Fox News → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june23?refcode=em_fr_062023_b1_trump-cnn_30ac&amount=10] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june23?refcode=em_fr_062023_b1_trump-cnn_30ac&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june23?refcode=em_fr_062023_b1_trump-cnn_30ac&amount=25]DONATE NOW TO PROTECT OUR DEMOCRACY >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-june23?refcode=em_fr_062023_b1_trump-cnn_30ac&amount=5]
– Trump lied about the 2020 election being stolen, claiming it was rigged and he “won by a lot.”
– He falsely claimed there were fake ballots in 2020, despite dozens of recounts and audits across the nation.
– He pushed falsehoods about the active Department of Justice investigation over his handling of classified documents.
– And he showed us that his campaign will be even more dangerous than the last one.

body:
Yes. Just $1.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=263%2E791427%2EzN0rrt)
$1.
That's the amount we're asking you to chip in to show you stand with Ilhan Omar today.
Yes. Just $1.
Your $1 contribution will make sure our people-powered campaign has the resources we NEED to fight back against Kevin McCarthy, the right-wing super PACs, and everything the GOP will throw our way this campaign cycle.
Your $1 contribution will also mean Ilhan can put up the best fundraising numbers possible ahead of this month's official FEC deadline — when we're legally required to disclose the number of donations we've received this quarter.
And your $1 contribution will show that you're a part of a grassroots movement of progressives all across the country who stand with our collective fight for justice.
A $1 contribution today might not seem like it'll make that big of a difference, but we're here to tell you that it will.
That's because by the time you read this part of the email, lots of people have already chipped in their $1. Now they're hoping you'll do the same.
That's the ask. $1. What do you say?
**[Use this link to make a $1 donation to stand with Ilhan Omar today. No matter how big or small your contribution, every single dollar sends an unmistakable message about the strength of the movement we're building together.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230620-1-t2&t=2&akid=263%2E791427%2EzN0rrt)

Thank you,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=263%2E791427%2EzN0rrt)**. Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=263%2E791427%2EzN0rrt)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=263_791427_zN0rrt&akid=263%2E791427%2EzN0rrt)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Bob Casey HQ
subject: Here's why:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
There’s no other way to say this.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)
Peter, there is no other way to say this — Senate campaigns these days are _expensive_ , particularly in states like Pennsylvania.
Mitch McConnell is targeting our race in Pennsylvania, so we know we’re going to see millions upon millions of right-wing dark money flooding into our Commonwealth.
We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back — and from traveling across the state, to putting TV ads on the air, to even buying pens and clipboards, campaign expenses add up fast.
**[That’s why we are working hard to ensure we build a campaign that is ready to take on whatever the GOP throws at us. Will you make a contribution of any amount to fund our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230620-1?refcode=em20230620-1&refcode2=172_552475_2c9wC9&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230620-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230620-1&refcode2=172_552475_2c9wC9&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)**
Among the Senate battleground states, Pennsylvania is a historically expensive state. With over $381 million dollars spent in the Commonwealth’s 2022 U.S. Senate race, strong grassroots support is critical to our success in 2024.
We’re building our campaign early so that we’re prepared for the long road ahead. (Remember — it wasn’t even 24 hours after Senator Casey launched his re-election campaign that Republicans released attacks!)
**[Will you make your first contribution of $5 to our campaign today? Your donation will allow us to host campaign events, air TV ads, hire more staff, and organize voters across Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230620-1?refcode=em20230620-1&refcode2=172_552475_2c9wC9&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)**
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230620-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230620-1&refcode2=172_552475_2c9wC9&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)**
Thank you so much,
Team Casey

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=172%2E552475%2E2c9wC9)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Joe Biden
subject: June 30 marks our first FEC deadline since we launched this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Will you pitch in ahead of our deadline on June 30?
| | | June 30 marks our first FEC deadline since we launched this campaign.

What’s that mean? After that, we’ll have to publicly report how much money this grassroots team has raised -- our first chance to really size things up and see how ready we are to build a campaign that can compete for the long haul.

**This is a big fundraising deadline! So I'm asking you personally:**

**Will you split a $5 donation between the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee and my reelection campaign today?**

If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Biden For President and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/13154?amount=5&t=3&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230620-JoeBiden-BidenDSCCTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230620-JoeBiden-BidenDSCCTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=11092%2E9716520%2EFqfupJ)

Grassroots supporters just like you helped elect Kamala, me, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. And I’m so proud of the incredible progress we’ve made together.

We’ve helped create a record 13 million new jobs -- with more jobs created in two years than any president has ever created in four.

We passed a once-in-a-generation infrastructure law, building bridges to connect our nation.

We’re lowering costs for working families, combating climate change, and making big corporations pay their fair share.

_But our work to build a better America is far from over._

**My friends at the DSCC and I are counting on your support to win reelection and defend our Senate majority next year.**

**[Split a $5 donation between the DSCC and my reelection campaign ahead of our June 30 deadline.](https://go.dscc.org/go/13154?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230620-JoeBiden-BidenDSCCTandem1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230620-JoeBiden-BidenDSCCTandem1-Pros-sl1&akid=11092%2E9716520%2EFqfupJ)**

Thank you for being a part of this grassroots team,

Joe

But our work to build a better America is far from over._ My friends at the DSCC and I are counting on your support to win reelection and defend our Senate majority next year. Thank you for being a part of this grassroots team, Joe Joe Biden | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1qkmt01h7sgollejn5hc010jc1nscne5r61g8p8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ie2o72cph2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk6c5tss12vpmf8t3c5albfbh0vq2339su8skef8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ie2o72cph2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. And as a token of our appreciation for a gift to Pathway to Victory, we’ll not only send you this book, but also a brand new CD featuring some of our nation’s most patriotic songs from First Baptist Dallas’ renowned choir and orchestra. **[https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6mvk3q8lt5aq0hie8e0qng9epb8n1j4fbasm8gg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ie2o72cph2bs)**

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Defense News

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: A New Chapter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Thank you for your unwavering and continued support for our State Party | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f812cc2ceb&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Peter,

You might have already heard the news, but I wanted to personally express my gratitude: after more than five years of serving as Chairman to the Washington State Republican Party (WSRP), and more than twelve years serving on staff, I have decided that it is time for a new chapter personally and professionally. My successor will be elected on August 12th by County party leadership from all 39 counties.

Serving as the Chairman of the WSRP has been one of the highest honors of my life. Traveling this great state, meeting thousands of committed people, working tirelessly with them to help elect great candidates, each moment has been both challenging and rewarding. However, for the purpose of being more present in my family’s life, it's time for a change. Though I will not be continuing on as Chairman of the WSRP, I will still remain very active in the fight for our conservative values as I have taken a position with a national grassroots organization dedicated to restoring freedom and the American Dream.

During my time as Chair, we were able to help get some tremendous people elected to office, but we also shared in more than a few heartbreaking losses. Below is just a short list of outstanding contributions I was proud to have made during my tenure in order to position the Washington State Republican Party into one of the strongest state parties in the entire country thanks to your partnership:
* 13,000+ grassroots activists trained and mobilized to support candidates.
* $26 million raised to support our Republican efforts in Washington State, including securing the largest investment from national Republican committees in decades.
* Hiring 400+ Republicans through our robust field programs that are now professionals equipped to run campaigns, work for state and national organizations, and be staff members for Republicans in Olympia and D.C.
* In 2022, we put the WSRP on the map by building the 4th largest field program of any state party in the entire country - rivaling states like Texas, Ohio, Florida, Pennsylvania, and Georgia.
* Implementing new and vital programs like _Every Race, Every Place_ and our newest _Ballot Collection_ program that will be an effective and legal means of countering the Democrat’s dirty ballot harvesting tactics used in past elections.

I cannot thank all of the current and past staff at the WSRP enough for the tremendous amount of time and passion they have contributed to our shared cause and to this organization. I am deeply thankful to have gotten to know and work alongside each and every one of them.

Moving forward, there is no slowing down for our excellent staff at the WSRP. They are continually engaging with our supporters and working with activists across the state to educate voters on why Republican leadership is necessary if we are going to bring an end to the disastrous state Democrats have led us to.

Our Political team will continue to build on top of the 60+ trainings already held that have trained over 2,000 grassroots activists, plus the 15+ candidate trainings that have set-up hundreds of local candidates with the data, knowledge, and voter-contact tools they need to be successful in defeating radical socialists running for school boards and city councils this year, and we’re engaging with dozens of local organizations and businesses each week to help us implement our aggressive Ballot Collection program in communities throughout the state. The Washington State Republican Party will continue to remain strong and active through August and through the statewide elections in November 2024.

With a strong foundation built, I am excited for what lies ahead for the WSRP and our Party as a new Chair works to implement their vision for the future, and I hope you share in this excitement. I remain deeply thankful to our donors, volunteers, staff, and you, all of our committed supporters who together make the work of our party possible.

I can’t thank you enough for your commitment and dedication to fighting for common sense conservative values. I will remain in that fight nationally and here in Washington State, and will look forward to partnering with you in new and different ways moving forward. The situation in Washington is only hopeless, if we give up hope. Our country, our state, our communities, and our future, are worth fighting for.

Looking forward,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/a-new-chapter?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._

name: Mike Gallagher
subject: Our chance to push back on the Communists in China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
There are common sense ways to make America safe. It just requires strong leadership. | | | Peter, The Chinese Communist Party isn’t a distant problem.******It is a right-here-at-home in America problem.** Under Xi Jinping’s leadership, we’ve seen the Communists in China: ❌ Fly spy balloons across our nation.❌ Operate secret policing stations on American soil. ❌ Exploit our college campuses.❌ Steal billions of dollars worth of American intellectual property. **If we don’t stand up for American sovereignty, push back against these threats, and work to rebuild our strength, we will continue to project weakness that makes America – and the world – less safe. ** **__[I AGREE >>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e2007d2533c4b7eb1eb3883624457e4&_e=g1Vp4Sx0qDcZ2d36Ih5m78Adq2qw3ALYmwV6Cvx6Y4IOorUNpbgVEkVxn39vOKqBMjFKfw526yTgD4R6ln-OVom3nVPa4x9dIW5tqaIfpkJR32JKmIYVfQ4N8yqXY2I022CuleGFpMW6cLT8JFUi5OmiFj9Vgnn7_z51Nl03ki6PDliKAeuEvmFjprh1Sazv6g8Nupj4HGoZe5zpH4BJJ4wjagiZYZ3ywm7-Jqs34umF-851OFmN698nud7uPFwYhpWe7EBd_y2Aq5JKhQkfvJ1XEDoJF9g9YrDS-pZ3XQKNYgZok30TZnBuTk7Eyb-soprOn-O6QqXaiEdeoIIx8othoQRELS-u38M7KzKe2qQ3zVgJDNKWui8L7YjHCQEv)__ ** Peter, I _refuse_ to sit on the sideline while America surrenders its strength. We are the good guys. It’s time we start acting like it. It’s why I’m using my role as Chairman of the Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party to show the world that America can tackle our most critical challenges under a _united front_.
---
| | [**SIGN TO STAND WITH MIKE**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e2007d2533c4b7eb1eb3883624457e4&_e=g1Vp4Sx0qDcZ2d36Ih5m78Adq2qw3ALYmwV6Cvx6Y4IOorUNpbgVEkVxn39vOKqBMjFKfw526yTgD4R6ln-OVom3nVPa4x9dIW5tqaIfpkJR32JKmIYVfQ4N8yqXY2I022CuleGFpMW6cLT8JFUi5OmiFj9Vgnn7_z51Nl03ki6PDliKAeuEvmFjprh1Sazv6g8Nupj4HGoZe5zpH4BJJ4wjagiZYZ3ywm7-Jqs34ulyWp7ueJQxDQ4cNIX_fNCYrM9aB6a3pdlAbaB8tobIBRnzWl62GrMoQ1XnZ6-C33hoO2NXUmXuf9V2NNYm3gowZAbyrqqdCa8AlNxpWB_cJ55OHKfY1titC4BwIdPDhlDYF0_V7wSzO9_kmu43G3V2)
---
**The solutions are straightforward. They tackle the threats posed by the Communists in China head on. And they could be implemented**** _right now._**** ** **_[Sign my petition to urge my colleagues to join me in rebuilding American strength and sovereignty.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9e2007d2533c4b7eb1eb3883624457e4&_e=g1Vp4Sx0qDcZ2d36Ih5m78Adq2qw3ALYmwV6Cvx6Y4IOorUNpbgVEkVxn39vOKqBMjFKfw526yTgD4R6ln-OVom3nVPa4x9dIW5tqaIfpkJR32JKmIYVfQ4N8yqXY2I022CuleGFpMW6cLT8JFUi5OmiFj9Vgnn7_z51Nl03ki6PDliKAeuEvmFjprh1Sazv6g8Nupj4HGoZe5zpH4BJJ4wjagiZYZ3ywm7-Jqs34ukl5EXWXMI5fRi-1kCy50eCeaW4wpMxG3n1LKDkW-v0R1IyzWXQEU54lzN3lGZszU_cPZ1FkpJOKVEn4yU7s8A8TCv4Z8Tot2dn6AM8qlDbXg13nW9DfJ1iqEdqwMyi-iVB3-r7XbCxwOLWmO_a0Th7)_**

clean_body: There are common sense ways to make America safe. It just requires strong leadership. | | | Peter, The Chinese Communist Party isn’t a distant problem.****It is a right-here-at-home in America problem. Under Xi Jinping’s leadership, we’ve seen the Communists in China: ❌ Fly spy balloons across our nation.❌ Operate secret policing stations on American soil. ❌ Exploit our college campuses.❌ Steal billions of dollars worth of American intellectual property. If we don’t stand up for American sovereignty, push back against these threats, and work to rebuild our strength, we will continue to project weakness that makes America – and the world – less safe. Peter, I refuse to sit on the sideline while America surrenders its strength. We are the good guys. It’s time we start acting like it. It’s why I’m using my role as Chairman of the Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party to show the world that America can tackle our most critical challenges under a united front. | | The solutions are straightforward. They tackle the threats posed by the Communists in China head on. And they could be implemented right now. | | Independence Forever, Mike GallagherCongressman, WI-08Chairman, House Select Committee on the Chinese Communist Party | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin. | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | .

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: One of the most vulnerable Democratic senators in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
She’s up for re-election in one of the swingiest swing states there is. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124517/412419038/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=&emci=50f66232-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6534d224-af0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
When I first ran for office, I was fighting my heart out in Massachusetts to defeat one of Wall Street’s favorite senators — but I was also keeping a close eye on Wisconsin. That’s where Tammy Baldwin — one of the toughest fighters working families could ever ask for — was running an uphill Senate campaign. She got out there, she talked about how we could put government on the side of working people, and she won. So of course, ever since then, powerful special interests and right-wing extremists have been trying to knock her out of the game. They spent millions to try to defeat her in 2018. They’re ramping up to try again as she runs for re-election next year. **Look: In Wisconsin, races go down to the wire.** Progressive champion Russ Feingold lost two heartbreaking Senate races there, Donald Trump eked out a win in 2016, and the terrific Mandela Barnes came up just a hair short in 2022. **We can’t take anything for granted. We’ve got to do everything we can to make sure Tammy Baldwin pulls out a victory, and early contributions make the biggest difference to help her plan her campaign.** [**If it makes sense for you right now, will you split a donation of $15 or any amount between Tammy Baldwin and our re-election campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124519/412419040/606078457?amount=15&refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=) I know that Tammy Baldwin can count on this team for support, and I know that we can always count on her to fight for our values. From lowering the cost of prescription drugs, to promoting Made in America manufacturing, to making marriage equality the law of the land no matter what the Supreme Court has to say about it, Tammy Baldwin takes on tough fights and gets results. She makes a difference, and she’s also made history as our nation’s first openly gay senator. So this Pride Month, her campaign has a special significance. Back when she was in college, she knew she wanted to dedicate her career to public service, but she was afraid she’d have to choose between that path and living her authentic life openly. After seeing the courage of other members of the LGBTQ+ community who were coming out, she realized she could run for office while being upfront about who she was. And that’s exactly what she did. We need to keep her voice in Washington, where she fights and wins for working families and works to protect our freedoms, including the right to an abortion. **But this is shaping up to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. And every single donation will go a long way to help get out the vote and get her over the finish line.** [**To help defend our Democratic majority and grow our grassroots movement for bold reform, please split a donation if you can between Tammy Baldwin’s re-election campaign and ours today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124521/412419042/-1399657728?refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124523/412419044/1523097117?refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=&emci=50f66232-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6534d224-af0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124525/412419046/-1254625552?refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=&emci=50f66232-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6534d224-af0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124527/412419048/879980101?refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=&emci=50f66232-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6534d224-af0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124529/412419050/2089751220?refcode=EMZ14R_TAN_E_20230620_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM0ZDIyNC1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0z_QAX3U1WHTBv82jpZ0vbCvELq2HCzlqREGc5lbRdM=&emci=50f66232-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=6534d224-af0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills

| This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc59mmfg5atfddjbh0u758o6ndrdf105pd3j1cng_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaksenldtn61bl5t6eqaedasjkg5kjfdm87iuhq0_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4cjh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo5k3gmtimo7r0aojugfn1c5hglfjrmfh5bq3v6o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4cjh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Hold The Line
subject: Disney's Latest LOSER
body:
When will they learn— go WOKE, go BROKE!!| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b938affa80e74ebc91853d8e5b23c195&_e=PoPkxPWlSnts05R7FG-UW6zFsQ3G06O7qV3G6gouYRisED6InCZbbmIGKOQNhjd6fapq9CawEG-qiXzQs237oHH4pMNnCovM_yTp73SUM1lul9bXClhlm8awBUxDpFj7WNbFWM1Lo56JZpwfAd4bWPJ-sUCNEp_mJWgemRFE3RPf9uoDKvxxW4WamUlbSkyOWsSnBvjjqYdsSFUtIvC-4QC9oWvAK53iP0mXHIk9QT2Du5Grf62wox8PbHeyZ5fsVKcMyAtKjiWrjvM1oI1uDDoaN81zsbtsBBC8ao-RHplZrh2dwu0NX5JFVALNcYrK)
---
| | Fellow American,
---
We are making a difference! For FAR too long, we stood on the sidelines and let huge corporations drift further and further left without any consequences. Those days are OVER. Bud Light and Target were recent examples of conservatives punishing corporations for woke activism.

But before those boycotts, Hold The Line led a boycott against Disney. We held rallies outside of Disney World, Disneyland, and Disney's headquarters. Even though Disney's stock price dropped, it seems like they haven't learned a lesson. Their latest WOKE offering has BOMBED at the box office— GOOD!!
---
_**HOW IT STARTED...**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=b938affa80e74ebc91853d8e5b23c195&_e=PoPkxPWlSnts05R7FG-UW6zFsQ3G06O7qV3G6gouYRisED6InCZbbmIGKOQNhjd6fapq9CawEG-qiXzQs237oHH4pMNnCovM_yTp73SUM1lul9bXClhlm8awBUxDpFj7WNbFWM1Lo56JZpwfAd4bWPJ-sUCNEp_mJWgemRFE3RPxrxYz_N-s0FcyqdJeeIg8ga_L-jT1i7rTTUhbchuy4DrKdE2MbhkmVbNK-WmLh7ozKysn2TlArmd56zmVZVOrTGVF6D5WBeVcDktaA2Q0y6O7pkUeF16M0nHIJYst-ewWxhy9o5DhawnHD0upRXN_)
---

clean_body: When will they learn— go WOKE, go BROKE!!| | | | | Fellow American, We are making a difference! For FAR too long, we stood on the sidelines and let huge corporations drift further and further left without any consequences. Those days are OVER. Bud Light and Target were recent examples of conservatives punishing corporations for woke activism. But before those boycotts, Hold The Line led a boycott against Disney. We held rallies outside of Disney World, Disneyland, and Disney's headquarters. Even though Disney's stock price dropped, it seems like they haven't learned a lesson. Their latest WOKE offering has BOMBED at the box office— GOOD!! HOW IT STARTED... HOW IT'S GOING. We are a force for GOOD, and how we spend our money can be a reflection of that. We need to get to a place where corporations think twice about pushing woke propaganda on our children. body:
| | | Peter, In Washington, you see a lot of politicians make their decisions based on what special interests and lobbyists tell them to do.

_But I’m not that kind of leader._

I want to make sure I’m _always_ staying connected to everyday Americans, and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

You are on the ground feeling the real effects of our actions in Washington. Now, I want your expert opinion.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: ⚠️ They Want to KILL Conservative Talk Radio ⚠️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.-ELlhB44eg)
---
Fellow Conservative, I am not a fan of mandates. I have reliably opposed them in the U.S. Senate.

**But I will not sit by while Woke Big Business – in this case, the automobile industry – once again attempts to silence conservative speech.** BMW, Mazda, and Volkswagen have already begun removing AM radios from their vehicles. Other major manufacturers have been flirting with the idea too... They want to take down AM radio because that’s where a lot of talk radio is found, and talk radio is overwhelmingly conservative... __and the left CAN’T STAND IT!__ I’m backing the **AM for Every Vehicle Act** to require automakers to offer free AM radio access in all new cars and trucks, to put a hard stop to this nonsense and protect conservative talk radio. [_**Will you step up today to support me in this fight?**_](http://trk.tedcruz._w)
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Protecting AM radio isn’t just about halting efforts to stifle conservative free speech.

AM radio is also essential to our nation’s Emergency Alert System. Without access to AM radio millions of Americans – particularly in rural areas – will not receive critical alerts regarding weather alerts and national disasters. And, it is extremely important to note that AM radio is free! Our nation’s radio spectrum is owned by the American People and we can’t let woke corporations deny us access, or force us to “subscribe” just to hear the radio! [_**I appreciate any support you can send, Fellow Conservative.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.) **We must take a stand.** For Liberty,
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Ted Cruz
---
[**KEEP THE RADIO ON AND FREE >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
| | | **Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
---
| | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701

name: Rep. Young Kim
subject: Throwing in the towel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvuv8cbj4jaa07s5vmb77n9eeundmvtv3na58078_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs)
---

This isn’t the news I was hoping to deliver today, Friend.

**FIRST** , Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Hakeem Jeffries all came to California to raise money to defeat me.

**THEN** , House Democrats named me one of their _**TOP 18 TARGETS**_.

**NEXT** , two Far Leftists jumped into my race and Dem attack groups pledged _**MILLIONS**_ to defeat me.

**NOW** , one of my Left-Wing opponents raised _**$100K in HER FIRST WEEK**_ after announcing her campaign.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7htmvd7h2jfpo0s1firg2ho523t1nfm2k61sc20_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I hate having to give you bad news like this, but I don’t know where else to turn. My opponent will only continue to grow her coffers - _she has the backing of Hollywood elites and dark money donors. _

With our second quarterly deadline rapidly approaching, catching up to her has never been more important.

**[Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z393kntm1qtfv34rqh92ai856ih5nsa6bnh966l8_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs "Today, I’m personally asking if you’ll rush in a few dollars to help us close this gap and protect this seat from the woke Democrats.")**

No amount is too big or too small and it is all used toward ensuring we defend our razor-thin House Majority.
---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztp26atmlfr7pc8pqofnb3jifv6g8j37t3tt8n7o_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
I would ask if it wasn’t critical, Friend. My seat could very well decide the House Majority and my radical opponent knows it.

Will you please step up and help us?

Thank you for everything,

Young Kim

---
| | | [RUSH DONATE HERE](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z439gsc2psoh1igj4al4e0q7jl21u7gkqmv577ug_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs "RUSH DONATE HERE")
---
* * *
---
_We’ll get straight to the point, Friend:

We are completely dependent on grassroots support to fuel our efforts against the Democrats.

YOU are the reason Young is in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason she’s able to continue our fight for small business support, lower taxes, slashing red tape, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for generations. **[So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9lor4vcgafo89642rgqhkluqkg5m6aehb0volg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ieapr4c3h2bs "So, we’re humbly asking for $3, $5, $10, or a greater amount to help keep my seat so I can keep fighting for you.")**_
---
