FIRST: Experts at FiveThirtyEight said that Nevada could once again decide Senate control. THEN: Mitch McConnell and the GOP started coming after me as a top target for defeat. NOW: A recent poll shows me 2 points down, just as I'm falling short of my critical end-of-quarter goal. The only way I can get back on track is with your immediate grassroots support. Peter — Nevada's last Senate race came down to less than 1 point, and this race is shaping up to be just as close. With Senate control at stake here, the GOP is set to spend whatever it takes to flip our battleground red. That's why I'm reaching out today. I'm no stranger to tough fights, but I simply cannot win this one alone. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Jacky Rosen and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for coming through at such a crucial moment. Jacky Rosen P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 | mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

name: our final plea (protectvoting.org)
subject: re: George Santos' resignation...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| George Santos’ list of lies is growing EVERY DAY – so when we reached out to top Democrats to sign our letter demanding his resignation, we thought signatures would POUR IN. **__But we couldn’t have been more wrong.__** We’re sending our letter to Santos tomorrow morning at 9am sharp, and we need a SURGE of signatures before we do!

_If we don’t, Santos will think nobody cares about his lies and he’ll get away scot-free!_ [We’re asking one last time: Chip in $3 to add your name to our letter demanding George Santos resigns from Congress »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=6&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h) | [**DONATE $3 AND ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=7&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=8&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
* * *
**TO: Rep. George Santos**
**FROM: Add your name**
Dear Rep. George Santos,

I’m SICK and TIRED of your misinformation, lies, and constant scandals.

American working families need REAL support, but you’re too busy playing politics and covering up your potential crimes!!

[That’s why I’m calling on you to RESIGN NOW and gladly chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to remove MAGA extremists like YOU from public office »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=9&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=10&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
---
We deserve genuine, honest Representatives that care about healthcare, voting rights, LGBTQ rights, accountability in our Democracy...

NOT an ultra MAGA fan who lied about his entire identity while running for office!!

[That’s why I’m signing this letter calling on you to RESIGN immediately and pitching in $3 to Voter Protection Project to ensure far-right Republicans like you never hold office again »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=11&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)

With conviction,

_**_X Add your name_**_
[**DONATE $3 AND SIGN MY NAME »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48021?t=12&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
---
***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=8600%2E878179%2Ex7yA3h)

Friend,
The America we’re living in today under Crooked Joe Biden is the very nation our Founding Fathers warned us we could one day become...
**A government no longer controlled by YOU, but a _regime_ controlled by a Deep State that is profiting off putting our country DEAD LAST.**
Remember, they only hate me because I fight for YOU.
_And they only want to silence YOU because you reject their Marxist, globalist agenda. _
For decades, the corrupt bureaucrats, RINO elitists, and radical Leftists in Washington have tried to eradicate America’s middle class – the central pillar of our once free Republic.
**Because if they had it their way, they would replace our Republic with a Third World tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat – _and they are!_**
After our America First Movement shocked the world and WON the White House in 2016, that was the moment they decided there were no longer _any_ limits to their tyranny...
_...The Deep State’s very survival depended on it._
**From that day on, there was no line they would not cross, no lie they would not tell, no witch hunt they would not concoct, and no unlawful INDICTMENT they would not pursue, so long as it was in the name of _“getting Trump”_ and ending our beautiful movement. **
But despite the entire Swamp poised to destroy us, _**WE PREVAILED**_ ... over, and over, and over again.
We stood tall in the face of tyranny, and we never once flinched.
And today, despite the very dark cloud hanging over our nation as Crooked Joe and his corrupt DOJ seek to put me in JAIL for _**400 YEARS**_ as an innocent man, our resolve has never been STRONGER.
_**Because we simply will NEVER SURRENDER our country.**_
But 2024 is not _just_ another election, Friend, it is truly our LAST CHANCE to save America and bring her back from the brink.
_**Either we destroy the Deep State here and now, or the Deep State destroys America. **_
[**So please, if you're not doing too poorly despite Biden’s disastrous policies, make a contribution of any amount to help me obliterate the Deep State once and for all – and together, we will peacefully SAVE AMERICA in 2024.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4782i9kcmcccdp958hfgtf90addipprlavcu7bg_rp22sh2s8i66o77c9ie6or1cth2bs)

name: Delegate Jazz Lewis
subject: Friends - MD House Majority Whip Jazz Lewis Sent You His Newsletter!
body:
Find out what is coming next & what Delegate Lewis (LD- 24) has been up to!
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---|---
|

Delegate Jazz Lewis Newsletter
Reviewing the Start of Summer & What Is Coming Next
News & updates From Delegate Jazz Lewis 6/20
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
Summer Highlights What has Majority Whip Jazz Lewis up after the Legislative Session?
---
| |
---
Principals Action Summit
---
| |
---|---
|
This month, Delegate Lewis spoke with students at Charles Herbert Flowers High School during the Principals Action Summit. Delegate Lewis spoke about his journey in public service and the importance of maintaining a work-life balance.
| |
---
Community Day Events
---
| |
---|---
|
Recently, Delegate Lewis attended a number of community days hosted by municipalities and civic associations, including Balk Hill Village and Ardmore-Springdale, to connect with residents across the 24th Legislative District.
| |
---
Public Safety Roundtable
---
| |
---|---
|
After the Legislative Session, Delegate Lewis hosted a public safety roundtable with local public safety leaders including State Attorney Braveboy, PGPD Chief Aziz, Representatives from Luminis Health, the University of Maryland's Violence Intervention Program, municipal police chiefs, and various PGPD leaders. Roundtable participants discussed how Delegate Lewis, and the state government, can best support local government.
| |
---
Local University Visits
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5Yc4cFC8jasIbMHSCoYO2jCVui_hiYTWGfFd8vpphwBvU4Tqhss9J57vjloTDLhn9tyKGD5lY50c6nYXiLaA_uCQSORNivTiGNkxKa4SSbtmvhdlDBneQTXOk4Xo3asf5tA==&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==) |
---|---
|
In May, Delegate Lewis joined a panel at Bowie State University to discuss Ethics, Politics, and DNA. The panel discussed the research potential, ethics, and legal issues related to the use of Consumer DNA testing products. Delegate Lewis also joined the University of Maryland's Black Politics class to offer advice and discuss his journey in public service.
| |
---
Prince George's County Chamber of Commerce Legislative Wrap up
---
| |
---|---
|
In May, Delegate Lewis joined the Prince George's County Delegation Chair, Nick Charles (LD-25), Senator Melany Griffith (LD-25), and Delegate Kym Taylor (LD-23) to discuss their accomplishments from the 2023 legislative session, and how new legislation will impact business in Prince George's County.
| |
---
Central County Coalition Meeting
---
| |
---|---
|
Last week, Delegate Lewis joined the Central County Coalition to discuss the Blue Line Corridor, and his efforts in Annapolis to make the corridor as well as the district more equitable for all residents.
| |
---
---
| |
---
Legislative Updates:
---
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YQFZkb5ho8pg3hMlHqxRy9_yOIyriOLtPFJG_F6944MItQKM0khllH18IEsuMcQkTaj6Yl28MKQIyBhMoEv5zarXnuyWdJthv9ftUGFMpOtZ4JN9kl7zTTf5-1MXpHX11Vs5AcB7iAR1GcWh_6n4MwI1cRIhDMDX7YKqrgci-Uy7V-D34SbbxCU=&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==) to read the end of session letter Delegate Lewis wrote to constituents, where he describes the many accomplishments of the 2023 legislative session.
---
| |
---
Tools for you:
---
If you have casework for the office of Delegate Jazz Lewis. Please fill out the form below.
---
| | [Click here for our form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YchIU58RRIcmRiUyf1P_mMv0hV_tj8puvRuF7FgrlowWUeBQnMwQFH9jlUhybPjm87tMBUcoaDWbMvzqeiT97Cw0byzwPZfjiW3kJghlE-xlU-3MXUPWOw4DP8cCVrSIxkOSOyUyPeAlivS9QtGgyowtSkVIyyUg8MhL2W21KtDU-iGUvF8KUeaFp2BXprc9BHZI6IAg7Zl0mNU-0xCH52kfjIIdpcQEhQ==&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==)
---
One of Delegate Lewis's top priorities is to make our government work for Marylanders. Our casework team is ready to assist constituents with problems relating to the state or county government. We will make every effort to answer in a timely manner.
---
| |
---
Join our Newsletter:
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YdJnuekP9-JfTZy0nO1aJEdq8tvXC18KyiqyVRrqRj7bqxOMA-Qojb5_dsWS-_JmioRcOGh_-c0WhhzAbUnYH_e9eyXJ6zhzCbTPITYnmHUoIZ0iEPOwnIX_yLxgoFV2xrO1nLqz58KWv-m1vzpwiqyDdatw1cRQQ0HWZnmKpSMhM8fL_HJ7ij1D71adYa4UB2NKD-4w4CBb-SQsfOtK4JnyypOqeLv7dm41zscqUq1VyS0whgOKWNT4tsyGJZRte7Ln-vj0dQfMaz9sAqWzoLA=&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==) for our email sign up form to share with friends or community members who want to hear the latest news from Delegate Jazz Lewis.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
Looking forward to Summer What's coming next for Delegate Lewis and District 24?
---
| |
---
| |
---
| University of Maryland Medical System's Injury Prevention & CommUNITY Wellness Fair
---
On July 1st, Delegate Lewis will join the University of Maryland Capitol Region Health's Violence Intervention is hosting an Injury Prevention & CommUNITY Wellness Fair at the University of Maryland's Capital Region Medical Center from 12 pm to 4 pm. The goal of the fair is to promote the Violence Intervention program at Capitol Region Health. The event flyer with more information is [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YdJnuekP9-JfAngV1D3Ww5Zw4CiL2Ly-MRHPYFQPrs4PtfGmA93Sfo0upRXVzxTtQ1La2B9pIAAn9FXA1DBe1WntVtZCTXKSPOVngPpVa7cUAPROIpyukYHcnuB5oC_sPdIc0tp1GF9Lbi8dS_RXBijvoxDkofBhMBHVoGCMZxu_wHMbFRWSu9WHd3W-VsnQRA==&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==).
---
| |
---
Yoga in the Parks
---
Every Thursday from 8:30 am to 9:30 am, join free classes in the beautiful outdoors of Prince George's County! Learn basic moves to strengthen your body, increase flexibility, and free your mind. The classes take place at Woodmore Town Centre, and the park's department's calendar event is [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YdJnuekP9-JfnhHmjpvddZeIf6JbUz4VFYtRCN72rKbm-Up07O-QOZXD-Klb8rUS39oGpvnDom5DDNw0dY5baag_sj_XFnfLrIc-Dv3HDQT-KSSd5vAY2k51ZUSxwo1b3ndvumW9-myg&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==).
---
| |
---
| Juneteenth Bingo
---
On Tuesday, June 20th, Delegate Lewis will give remarks and participate in Juneteenth Bingo at the Largo-Kettering Library. The event will take place from 5:30 pm to 7:30 pm, and the library's event page is [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YdJnuekP9-JfbBXcoec8_bOuO1kb0zY6thBACX5lZaSFrpJxo3VYWu5kpx5y0h5htLBfzurvpHUDHkXxZeZvUIMk614C9CK_q1b3fxLi9pkR&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==). Join the Delegate to expand your knowledge about Juneteenth while playing a fun game of bingo. There will be multiple rounds of bingo, so please come by.
---
| | |
---
| Pride Month Ready 2 Read Storytime
---
On Monday June 26th, from 11:00 am - 11:30 am, at South Bowie Branch Library, join Delegate Lewis as he reads pride month themed stories to kids in the 0-to-5-year-old age group. The library's event page is [linked here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001d76JNtTrvbzbohrQYNU_9ke7HglFTFn36266goIbPts9NQZGO8z5YdJnuekP9-JfuWW08ccG461zD-UZhzLuXnP0DfUZS-HlZkLzbE7VM6LiWel4l3wutkPA9-QbLaQ1Lz1xi9zapMQU0s5qZ7ZnIK5fNt-Adh27JXRZFloFfEk=&c=WgNQTpvl32juUUHCceaSElsPo7bYLFWCboON_f9_ciziUNY_hKjDKA==&ch=AdHcNNHbaWsYPnTCGOjSDb2bfR_2e0aVYv4STDBByn3HZbBof5Shsw==). Join Delegate Lewis for a morning of reading and celebration of inclusivity.
---
| | |
---
| District 24 Delegation Speaking to Collington Residents
---
On Thursday, June 22nd, at 1:30 pm, Delegate Lewis and the District 24 Delegation will be speaking with Collington MaCCRA (Maryland Continuing Care Residents Association) about the 2023 session and an overview of the issues that you intend to focus on in 2024. Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Team Alex Padilla
subject: We must defend our pro-choice majority
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

_Hi there, we’re reaching out today to share this important message from Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand of New York. Please read her note, and then consider[**splitting a contribution between our campaigns](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-gillibrand-june23.lF_V1l&refcode=em230620-1-30-l&t=1&akid=1359%2E159979%2ER3bOEQ)** to protect our Democratic Senate majority. Thank you. -Team Alex Padilla_
* * *

Friend, it’s been almost a year since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court ruled to officially overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
In the year since then, we’ve watched state after state pass increasingly extreme abortion bans. Now, the future of our reproductive rights will be on the ballot again in 2024 – and the odds are stacked against us.
Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats. Republicans only have to defend 10. That means they’ll have more resources to go on the offensive and target incumbents like me. **And election experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ are already saying that Mitch McConnell has a “clear path” to retaking Senate control in 2024. **
Protecting our pro-choice majority has never been more important – and to do that we have to win every single seat up for election. The only way to do that is with early, strong investments in Democrats. [**So please, will you split a donation between my campaign and Alex Padilla to help us hit our $25,000 fundraising goal? We’re not backing down in this fight, but we need you by our side.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-gillibrand-june23.lF_V1l&refcode=em230620-1-30-l&t=2&akid=1359%2E159979%2ER3bOEQ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2338?c0=ap-em-gillibrand-june23.xGeZRR&refcode=em230620-1-30-l&t=21&akid=1359%2E159979%2ER3bOEQ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2339?c0=ap-em-gillibrand-june23.bCgs8K&refcode=em230620-1-30-l&t=22&akid=1359%2E159979%2ER3bOEQ)**

Thank you,
Kirsten

[**Donald Trump just personally invited his far-right donors to his golf course fundraiser after his latest indictment.** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65115375/412384891/-1810142053?refcode=20230620_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlOWU0MC05NDBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKQml5b7OI5MJXka6_B3djpBk72cNmZpDv_KN7PLY3U=) It makes me sick to my stomach. Which is why, in moments like this, we need to rise up and show him what we’re made of. [**_I’m asking 641 Democrats to step up with $14 to make this one of my BIGGEST fundraising days and make Trump’s fundraiser completely BACKFIRE. If I can pull this off, I’ll have more resources to help my Democratic colleagues reach an UNPRECEDENTED number of voters, defeat MAGA extremists, and keep Trump out of office for good. Can I count on your immediate $14 right now? >> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65115378/412384894/-1810142053?refcode=20230620_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlOWU0MC05NDBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKQml5b7OI5MJXka6_B3djpBk72cNmZpDv_KN7PLY3U=) Peter, let me be perfectly clear: [**I stand on the side of our Democracy and our Constitution.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65115382/412384898/-1810142053?refcode=20230620_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmRlOWU0MC05NDBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QKQml5b7OI5MJXka6_B3djpBk72cNmZpDv_KN7PLY3U=) That’s why I need to show that I will never -- NEVER -- again allow a man as dangerous as Donald Trump to hold power. I need 641 Democrats to chip in $14 in the next 10 hours to help me have an UNPRECEDENTED fundraising haul of my own, OUTRAISE Trump and his far-right allies, and SQUASH his hopes of ever regaining power. body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!
I want you to imagine this: you're a parent in Illinois, and after years of dealing with a broken school system that is failing your child...

I want you to imagine this: you're a parent in Illinois, and after years of dealing with a broken school system that is failing your child, you finally get them into a school of your choice. **But then the application is canceled.** Now I want you to imagine that you're a student facing bullying or an unsafe learning environment, and you just got into the school of your dreams, **and then it 's ripped away from you.** **Governor J.B. Pritzker and the Illinois legislature just did that to more than 31,000 students. ** You see, to Governor J.B. Pritzker, Senate President Harmon, and House Speaker Welch, **school choice is something**** _only_****reserved for the wealthy and well-connected, such as Pritzker 's own children. ** I'm proud to say this is exactly the kind of hypocrisy that the American Federation for Children is fighting against. School choice is a freedom that _all_ children and families deserve, and we won't stand for seeing those rights ripped away by the hypocrisy of the elite.
Friend, we're depending on your support. [**Will you help us continue our mission by pledging a small donation today? Any amount donated is a huge aid in our fight to ensure school choice prevails for every family.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=75953cb166db46348fd80ab50d961c29&_e=qkgtI21tORwq3aMlN15gPBSDkzq2HDGt41pDebcfclLaNwLjNRHADWx9s3hj73CDg4PVK-EufOuTR3zYrjxpLHFKw8Sf_C_YNfSqaXc_8NtUKoBDsNGpLxUwfGW3jjAK7EcN4LvJycpu7QhAa2qs6M9liklLtKOUpA7wJ79XHNTX__bgUFHjQaMU5alX36ifQLkzDP5suxJvGAHEesK2vOaGoMd73tkN33dyObTWn7bt5b27u73_nkM8kG5xOMTi44jcnMd_s5mtRyc-GyVGvo-fnUd8n3sloa_Bq19h-IhMAVQoVh4YFxmgzJuBDWTJnxxaIhC3dJyUIFf9t2gWX4EaNxZo_YWlqcyUH4_I7SQOVbsoiaPV-Fr9QEfMguicvSFjgOfIr2FWdLkfZkPkxzU9kOqmyGjHGiMD9MIgLEU%3D)

clean_body: The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! I want you to imagine this: you're a parent in Illinois, and after years of dealing with a broken school system that is failing your child... | | | | | Friend, did you see this terrible news? I want you to imagine this: you're a parent in Illinois, and after years of dealing with a broken school system that is failing your child, you finally get them into a school of your choice. But then the application is canceled. Now I want you to imagine that you're a student facing bullying or an unsafe learning environment, and you just got into the school of your dreams, and then it 's ripped away from you. Governor J.B. Pritzker and the Illinois legislature just did that to more than 31,000 students. You see, to Governor J.B. Pritzker, Senate President Harmon, and House Speaker Welch, school choice is something onlyreserved for the wealthy and well-connected, such as Pritzker 's own children. I'm proud to say this is exactly the kind of hypocrisy that the American Federation for Children is fighting against. School choice is a freedom that all children and families deserve, and we won't stand for seeing those rights ripped away by the hypocrisy of the elite. Friend, we're depending on your support. Thank you, Tommy Schultz Chief Executive Officer American Federation for Children | | | | | | | | Paid for by American Federation for Children Contributions or gifts to the American Federation of Children are not tax deductible as charitable contributions. | | American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 | | | | | | | Please see a brief message from the American Federation for Children (AFC): This is a prospecting message not affiliated with this list and is not meant to be an endorsement or opposition towards AFC Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Amelia Johnson
subject: I'd like to introduce myself, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
United Rural Democrats [https://can2-prod.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/data/000/670/558/original/logo.png]
Peter — it's a pleasure to meet you. My name is Amelia Johnson, and I am the new president of United Rural Democrats.

I've spent years organizing in my home state of Oklahoma and neighboring Kansas, and I'm ready to take on the challenge of leading URD on the road to 2024.

I've been connected to the URD family for years. Last year, I was about to start a job in Montana, but my car broke down the day before I left. I called Joe Shepherd, the previous president of URD, to let him know I wouldn’t be able to meet him in Iowa the next day.

Joe said not to worry and drove the full eight hours to where I was living in Arkansas at the time, picked me up, and we drove to Montana. Without Joe, I wouldn’t have been able to make it.

It's those commitments that I look forward to continuing as I take on a leadership position at URD. URD is there for people. We know that organizing Democratic wins takes personal relationships, kindness, and empathy.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail?refcode=230620_aj_intro_b1]

I'm excited to get to work, and I'd love to hear from you on what you're looking for URD to prioritize this election cycle.

Thank you for the warm welcome!

– Amelia
President, URD
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?
Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=2b69bff0-950f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73]
GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urdemail?refcode=emailfooter&recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=2b69bff0-950f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73]
PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Y7szl2shaUe1fBwHtDYj7A2?unsubscribedata=5YoSYC6VtHMEmpzzcfRvAyo7h7wTZTqJjL%2FqXkHnKrf5rvn%2BjqSW1I3bFoE7JhA1i0lAkI3sQxtAcA4MfJ0NcMmPD6ZVmqNm0psBP%2BogTDowSxy7XlLhp%2B9ovy46eYqLHQQEMPgT%2BqR3LyKN2ma9iAVXeMuadKzvDnmdynYbIkoQD5MkzJFmOjM4o8Ds%2FnsWZgPN%2FovK5KYodGQ1RWi8LIyiyLSWP9drxVN4oslQdG7TDkKMQPYaNPhQQ9tG%2B6w4KsIAQEhMk2r0klis0i3nC9IRhxQF6kXv62inxbcpEnMzFkiB8TMYJ9rJOTqn%2FQcCh0KQo9zy7hla2ewISKawLtQScm%2BNdi0X7Z7fQ%2Bhk%2BJrgBW0SJx7l%2BMml1js9%2FZHStfw5hwOeDL1dCXqQf%2Bj%2Fk7Vwlq0zJzWgf5rwobumCf6vbLc7lBtSgzt3COgLCY71] . name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Yesterday’s equality is today's cancel culture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
For the past 30 years we have tolerated a progressive culture shift. Today, you're called a bigot if you don't think young children should see explicit material in school. Enough is enough.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_t=rzBUUvWBslXX-yyxi_ORTZT4YenGQTaclpT7Pj1xS5r2tae-gifihSosBmvPFjJWSbKCgyM2xe4FpJLLPR94i6JoDf9nRwGxG6tPx5vpEDE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_t=rzBUUvWBslXX-yyxi_ORTZT4YenGQTaclpT7Pj1xS5r2tae-gifihSosBmvPFjJWSbKCgyM2xe4FpJLLPR94i6JoDf9nRwGxG6tPx5vpEDE%3D)

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qoBd0L_e2-TK3AGeX9Lg_Iv9E5gx1uhTqj8xwnPGBFnDmE3wnsehs9FnivCIuzXuc0e7XsrlBJaaOi5zZTU_RK7OaaPvJJMiMtLsjWG5NJD_TMW0-aT-Va2s8xpJ042glQSV8phnxsiqSB36YyFTdxQ%3D)
**The left's extremists are at it again, Fellow American.**

The culture war has turned into a full-blown modern-day Spanish Inquisition. It is run by a new church. It's not a church of God; it's a new secular cult - aiming to cancel everyone that disagrees with them.

| [** ABOLISH THE CULTURE WAR ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qsxdo89Dn0OAOIhqN0vVCOOOeRxU117O7fV60RFzkbeQbrHFA4rXLU1gJxRKzEuJ4ciPr1ZojD-1UcjljE0QVvPAjQKYX5Gwa1UuNRSeiC3ZaFAmRmo3YVmLaoieswDtejAUSLuFlqB9CvrxuN2ygwc%3D)
---

In the course of woke history, we have seen:
> **1995:** "Love is love. We just want to be accepted."
> **2005:** "We're just after equality."
> **2012:** "Bake the cake, or see you in court."
> **2015:** "Get my pronouns right or clean out your desk."
> **2022:** "Little kids can pick their own gender."
>
And now, companies and corporations are partnering with transgender activists and influencers to appeal to the "TikTok" generation. Biden will ban people that show up topless at the White House but won't take the same action against the trans-cult agenda in schools. The culture war plaguing America has turned things upside down.

Time to emancipate ourselves from this toxic dogma - once and for all. **_We need to restore order and a true American identity starting at the top._ [If you think it has gone too far, I need you with me, Fellow American. Now is the time to act.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qnnZKcwybmxVwSTJ0kYqzLItKU2fZO4jgMPpKjFP_tVJQyZn2wha5M1uFmVBDr7L8x5N1CxXSMCbiVESmUUQLzjXq3dco4fRbVvYNLJspL-TBlOKH2YJyICDWKc-yeTd_I2yKV-whwBiEi-EgrJ-NLk%3D) **

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qkb5rA1aNqLYO7n65Hq_knUo2dkcF8fi_xcNOHGV0m0DKZlYkGGDk7mHbHXJo2uilzPSQeasX4a3ucxMxLgPxpLeFibpR2GcyinbrZIhuEEmoWaVC-ePQ5N1B56UhQ17_s0e14B5GH_ZFucU7kAij08%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** ABOLISH THE CULTURE WAR ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qhEdUA6TlNCPVpHxDuKMOD27e__AEy2mL6PawOXJgK7QD7_7kgZpEg3i3H4NZKWpe-XlX4qfdds8l2YM9I_ykH46oDsU4yv70Q6k_QzuHOE9NvnqALDxAk2iJ1_Ge2vL1G5FCs5sdZ4u3V0D5UzPyLw%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x-Y6x_3cm2iUnmA33-Bz-3_zpYFQ0uvx3HVHauWhevPpWMz2qtYUWyMGjE__-K8MvJQaIuIvsKfCs_V4p04MuiyhBjBRUypDtby-esMXDqjxYATTfZ0ObEITqhyv7IgzlBxhczytj1tbCp0aaZSAeV7utkMgVPrvxqb40VrJbta4cpICpfnH8ZQmz1Bdhd_bilVrQMe8FE_seKpHTuYXbGhXMqXMyjuZzbwdkQ6Ct-S74BojIEApq7WkT01sqLH7qmYMQiQE3jV45yExEmcsGSlhQ7I3_bUaTD-teYVKBSqnApiUQ6EQg1NcnVx_xd3zXDP96BMD42Iixia5ZV3YlEbjrkq2PRbOvvg4hHI0H_6zRmVdr2n9pI9OdVfT42_FujIG5dMBgZ9sVYRW8jMPH20%3D)

---

| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x8KWgRLLdJdUq1OaFttytQr5fMuXfY9apYY-j-vxberurLgarYKSh0GexMige4Lz74aP__Jh5rvlq-DB_VkBzl282oB77oIh3nNJTWw-WCxmwIzVPcEO6fIPGo7CwEqCHCIef32Thr2jPPG9YHIS3LhPyp7ZraYacUtv6iVkVGKA1qsXMBZme-RrmTX-zoFoqFe1xTFb8Up1VleaIT02YPw%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x8tzGJvf9h-8V3lID_WGUZeDaXzYwtmhjxfu-baVH3m1GgEaH55W_33M-l6JiQxazPRF6CauBlH0T_Vkj3NHsgyTmOV2QOIpT-JghampNVTIyP3XqzGbwv-3FFtGWTr0698ZsTFT4jnot-AyCafx-6zxcuEYyAv-W5Wg0mvTQYDeNKlex4s91vrHbM1MOXoXiA%3D%3D)| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1f00dcba1f06487caa3f4b3b16414ee6&_e=pPWxDZw-_SR1jOkaK-H4x4RH_5KeM0AOXFqWF3yowUTqi8vgF2HKUqbyQDJXCSw7jAOx__hE-tHjdc7c-_E_-R1rVspSeuaXIrIWVQxyNCmWXMXl2BsR8zhFyDJj5DdrHBG63GjOGjulkueq8XoUP737MKEvDo1ZzXpdx2hr3gPS8rITMXj3tPp1GOwUbFey63ZMsgQ-NqNE5E_KRyhF8kOKL-cS0z0YXMipBjL-NcU%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Elder?=
subject: Don’t let the anti-MAGA candidates win!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
We see through the charges against former President Trump.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=73107e3da1&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# Don’t let the anti-MAGA candidates win!
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter, I was just notified that we did not hit our mid-month goal. While I am encouraged by the overwhelming show of support, missing our financial goals means that more anti-MAGA candidates will make the debate stage. name: Coach
subject: I Back the Blue on Our Border
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Read a recent write-up from Fox News >>>
| | | Peter, With the Biden administration ignoring federal law and facilitating historic levels of illegal immigration into our country, we must give state and local law enforcement the authority to keep American communities safe.

For this very reason, last month I reintroduced The Empowering Law Enforcement Act in the U.S. Senate, joined by Republican colleagues in both the House and the Senate.

**_This legislation gives state and local officers the ability to enforce immigration laws when federal officers are prohibited from doing so. It also would extend the detention period for dangerous criminals._**

The Biden administration has opened up our border and undermined our law enforcement — this bill would bring that to an end!

[**Read more in a Fox News write-up here >>>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e590d3b3ddd45a98/e59b4c0f5075fa0ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e590d3b3ddd45a98/edcd856ebf8004bdc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Specifically, The Empowering Law Enforcement Act would:

✔️ Allow immigration enforcement authority for state and local law enforcement entities, including the ability to investigate, identify, apprehend, arrest, detain, or transfer an alien into federal custody. ✔️ Ensure that illegal immigrants are detained in federal custody upon state or local law enforcement request.
---
[**READ MORE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/e590d3b3ddd45a98/6042775caf1f65d9c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
It’s high time we start protecting and defending American communities, by empowering our brave men and women in law enforcement to effectively enforce the law.

I have and always will stand on the side of what’s RIGHT! \- Coach
---

Team, 2024 is set to be a major win for Democrats – if we can keep it.

When Democrats narrowly lost their House majority in 2022, we took solace in the fact that the GOP’s predicted red wave never materialized, as only a few seats decided control of Congress. Now we have a chance to flip back the House in 2024 and retake full control, and that chance runs through Nikki and IL-13.

After the recent Supreme Court ruling that could result in Democratic redistricting gains, the race for the House has shifted and effectively become a toss-up. Just like in 2022, control of Congress will depend on the results in a select few districts that will make or break our majority. Nikki is preparing to hold IL-13, a frontline district critical to any potential Democratic House majority.

But, she needs grassroots supporters like you to have her back from the start.

Nikki is fighting for Illinois working families in Congress, but we can’t risk losing this seat because a Democratic majority in the House is counting on us. [Can you chip in $10 or whatever you can so she has the resources necessary to hold her frontline district and do her part in ensuring Democrats return to the majority in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65116822/412390306/-345890914?refcode=EM_FR_230620Frontline_TN_5_30DO_TESTA_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWMzM2EyYy05ODBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iP6W_aoU_ang5SVgVKVYkRmmX6m43kW_m4nNyJR1GK0=)

When Democrats narrowly lost their House majority in 2022, we took solace in the fact that the GOP’s predicted red wave never materialized, as only a few seats decided control of Congress. Now we have a chance to flip back the House in 2024 and retake full control, and that chance runs through Nikki and IL-13. After the recent Supreme Court ruling that could result in Democratic redistricting gains, the race for the House has shifted and effectively become a toss-up. Just like in 2022, control of Congress will depend on the results in a select few districts that will make or break our majority. Nikki is preparing to hold IL-13, a frontline district critical to any potential Democratic House majority. But, she needs grassroots supporters like you to have her back from the start. Nikki is fighting for Illinois working families in Congress, but we can’t risk losing this seat because a Democratic majority in the House is counting on us. = | = We’re in this together, Team Nikki Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan. Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead. Please, consider making a =. . | | =

name: Patty Murray
subject: One year without Roe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
and we're in a full-blown health care crisis
| | |
---
Peter, it's been almost one year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe _,_ and we're in a full-blown health care crisis.
One-third of the country has banned abortion entirely. Patients are being denied potentially lifesaving care in emergency rooms while others are facing criminal charges for self-managing abortions. It's unacceptable.
**We have to keep speaking out, fighting back and doing everything in our power to restore Roe as the law of the land _._[Will you add your name to my petition to defend reproductive rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65117035/412391119/-1829073782?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-reprorights&code=jtk46-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFiNTg5Yi05ODBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-fW7oCuXsdUY3xNDj_slhl6j9FKVlvDRKOeSJBK6Gs=&emci=d938fdda-530c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28ab589b-980f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65117036/412391120/-1829073782?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-reprorights&code=jtk46-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFiNTg5Yi05ODBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-fW7oCuXsdUY3xNDj_slhl6j9FKVlvDRKOeSJBK6Gs=&emci=d938fdda-530c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28ab589b-980f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)
---
Make no mistake: The GOP will not give up their anti-women crusade until abortion is banned in all 50 states – and in the meantime, they are coming after birth control, IVF, and every aspect of reproductive health care.
It's a tough time, but I'm heartened by the energy and persistence of pro-choice advocates, like all of you. A majority of this country believes in reproductive freedom – and I know that if we continue to stand against these cruel bans and attacks on a woman’s ability to make her own health care decisions, we will win.
**Peter, there is so much at stake, and we've got to keep up the fight in the months and years ahead.**** [Sign my petition now to renew the call for reproductive freedom and to restore Roe _._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65117037/412391121/-1829073782?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmurray-2023-reprorights&code=jtk46-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGFiNTg5Yi05ODBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P-fW7oCuXsdUY3xNDj_slhl6j9FKVlvDRKOeSJBK6Gs=&emci=d938fdda-530c-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=28ab589b-980f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
Thanks for supporting the pro-choice agenda.

Patty
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

One-third of the country has banned abortion entirely. Patients are being denied potentially lifesaving care in emergency rooms while others are facing criminal charges for self-managing abortions. It's unacceptable. We have to keep speaking out, fighting back and doing everything in our power to restore Roe as the law of the land . | | Make no mistake: The GOP will not give up their anti-women crusade until abortion is banned in all 50 states – and in the meantime, they are coming after birth control, IVF, and every aspect of reproductive health care. It's a tough time, but I'm heartened by the energy and persistence of pro-choice advocates, like all of you. A majority of this country believes in reproductive freedom – and I know that if we continue to stand against these cruel bans and attacks on a woman’s ability to make her own health care decisions, we will win. Peter, there is so much at stake, and we've got to keep up the fight in the months and years ahead. Thanks for supporting the pro-choice agenda. Patty | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Cori Bush
subject: Protect trans people with the Equality Act.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
The Equality Act would explicitly prohibit discrimination based on sex, sexual orientation and gender identity. | |
---
Peter, Across the country, legislators are targeting our queer and trans siblings with hateful legislation and violent rhetoric. We urgently need federal protection for LGBTQ+ people so people can live safely and freely as their true selves. In my home state of Missouri, the Governor and legislature just denied access to lifesaving gender-affirming care for young people, as well as adults on Medicaid and incarcerated adults. Families are not sure they will safely be able to stay in Missouri, and some have begun GoFundMe campaigns to gather the resources to move. To secure LGBTQ+ rights and protect LGBTQ+ people from discrimination, I’m pushing for constitutional change and for legislation like the _Equality Act_. The _Equality Act_ would explicitly prohibit discrimination based on sex, sexual orientation and gender identity in areas including education, housing, employment, public accommodations, federally funded programs, credit, and more. We've been having a debate at Team Barr headquarters:
_Who have you seen more of: Rep. Jack Bergman or Bigfoot?_
---
It sent us down a deep internet rabbit hole that we'll spare you from. But it's definitely not a great sign when googling "Bigfoot in Michigan" has better results about the latest sighting than "Jack Bergman district visit."
**Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan families deserve better than a representative who puts in less face time with us than Bigfoot.**
Callie on the other hand? You'll never wonder if she's only a myth.
You can count on Callie to show up for Northern Michigan because this place has always been her home. Her family roots go back five generations here. She was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. And when she and Matt decided to settle down after moving around as a military family, there was no question they'd move back home to Northern Michigan.
[Let's replace Rep. Bergman with someone who will actually represent Yoopers and Northern Michiganders. Team Catch Bigfoot a.k.a. Team Catch Bergman a.k.a. Team Callie Barr \----------- FWD ----------- We've been having a debate at Team Barr headquarters: Who have you seen more of: Rep. Jack Bergman or Bigfoot? It sent us down a deep internet rabbit hole that we'll spare you from. But it's definitely not a great sign when googling "Bigfoot in Michigan" has better results about the latest sighting than "Jack Bergman district visit." Upper Peninsula and Northern Michigan families deserve better than a representative who puts in less face time with us than Bigfoot. Callie on the other hand? You'll never wonder if she's only a myth. You can count on Callie to show up for Northern Michigan because this place has always been her home. Her family roots go back five generations here. She was born and raised in Traverse City and Cheboygan. And when she and Matt decided to settle down after moving around as a military family, there was no question they'd move back home to Northern Michigan. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Team Callie Barr | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Friend,
You’re invited to a free private screening of _Two Trials_ , a powerful documentary detailing the dramatically different approaches and outcomes of the murders of Breonna Taylor and George Floyd. If you haven’t already, please RSVP to let us know you’re coming:
**Two Trials Private Screening**
Wednesday, June 21, 2023
115 SE Main Street
Minneapolis, MN 55414
Doors open at 6:00 pm, screening begins at 7:00 pm
****[RSVP NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65117753/412393901/289788447?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS85MDI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDNlODI1Mi05YjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5yuIik9Yas27Y47uDS6rNy14MhUncOVUkfYEB9kf6oc=&emci=9c3e8252-9b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=9d3e8252-9b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11037791)****
_The screening is free of charge but seats are limited, so RSVP today_
_Two Trials_ examines the powers of Attorneys General and the role of racial equity in our justice system. Following the screening, there will be a reception and discussion featuring Attorney General Keith Ellison. Here are the details:
This is a powerful film about how two very different attorneys general handled significant events that shook our country. And it shows that elections matter.
We hope to see you there,
Team Keith

| | Republican extremists have made their playbook clear: Silence voters — and elected officials — who threaten their power. So today, we’re making ours known, too. **Keep reading to see Fair Fight’s playbook to protect the freedom to vote in the 2024 election cycle,[_and then sign your name to endorse it!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65117755/412393905/-1096187859?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230620_e_playbook1_v1s1_A&ms=bsc_emm_ff_20230620_e_playbook1_v1s1_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTE4NjEzZi05YjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IfL0LxAvdWJsj1PPGSjqxVW0ZQwf7452ESsoLUStEpo=&emci=cdb54296-850f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=be18613f-9b0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)** ✅ **Train** thousands of volunteers to reach voters with accurate and timely information ahead of elections and push back against anti-voter efforts ✅ **Endorse** and support pro-democracy candidates, including Georgia and National Fellows from historically underrepresented backgrounds ✅ **Challenge** anti-voting groups in court, like the Texas-based organization True the Vote, that spearheaded challenges to the voting eligibility of more than 300,0000 Georgians in 2020-2021 ✅ **Reach** young voters with informative and compelling social media content about making our voices heard at the ballot box ✅ **Partner** with reform-minded District Attorneys to facilitate community engagement programs and mitigate the harm of laws designed to disenfranchise voters ✅ **Produce** voter education materials to counter Republican disinformation and conspiracy theories ✅ **Launch** the Vote Georgia tour to reach voters in Black and brown communities, equipping them with resources to combat voter suppression tactics As extremists continue to use every tool at their disposal to maintain their stranglehold on power, we need to be prepared to stop them at every turn. To protect access to the ballot box and elect pro-democracy champions in the 2024 election cycle, we need to out-work the anti-voter extremists — and that’s possible with your support. name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: ICYMI: “Merck sues US government to halt Medicare drug price negotiation”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Pharmaceutical giant Merck – which generated $14.5 billion in profit last year – just announced it’s suing to stop the Inflation Reduction Act Did you see this news, Peter? Pharmaceutical giant Merck – which generated $14.5 billion in profit last year – just announced it's suing the federal government. They're trying to stop the Inflation Reduction Act's program that gives Medicare the ability to negotiate drug prices. That's unacceptable. As a pediatrician and person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it. She's ready to keep fighting to lower prescription drug prices, but she needs your help to do it. **[Chip in $5 to help Kim keep fighting for lower drug prices in Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65118344/412396228/147704916?refcode=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=09017ca5-9c0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAxN2NhNS05YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFFhHXU1C7gqx9mYUopIISX9LnsbjRSL7K-JVnahlEc=)** \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com>
Date: Sat, June 10, 2023
Subject: Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65118345/412396229/147704916?refcode=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=09017ca5-9c0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAxN2NhNS05YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFFhHXU1C7gqx9mYUopIISX9LnsbjRSL7K-JVnahlEc=) Team,

Last year, Kim was proud to help pass the historic Inflation Reduction Act. This legislation includes provisions to reduce costs by letting Medicare negotiate lower drug prices.

**But now, big pharma is fighting back. Pharmaceutical giant Merck just announced it's suing the federal government over the IRA's Medicare-negotiation program:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65118346/412396230/147704916?refcode=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230620_Merck2_fnd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=09017ca5-9c0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTAxN2NhNS05YzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hFFhHXU1C7gqx9mYUopIISX9LnsbjRSL7K-JVnahlEc=) Reducing the cost of prescription drugs is personal to Kim. As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows how crucial it is for people to afford the lifesaving drugs they need.

**Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it.** Kim knows that no one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why she's ready to keep fighting back against big pharma to lower the cost of prescription drugs.

clean_body: Pharmaceutical giant Merck – which generated $14.5 billion in profit last year – just announced it’s suing to stop the Inflation Reduction Act Did you see this news, Peter? Pharmaceutical giant Merck – which generated $14.5 billion in profit last year – just announced it's suing the federal government. They're trying to stop the Inflation Reduction Act's program that gives Medicare the ability to negotiate drug prices. That's unacceptable. As a pediatrician and person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it. She's ready to keep fighting to lower prescription drug prices, but she needs your help to do it. = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Dr. Kim Schrier <info@drkimschrier.com> Date: Sat, June 10, 2023 Subject: Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it = Team, Last year, Kim was proud to help pass the historic Inflation Reduction Act. This legislation includes provisions to reduce costs by letting Medicare negotiate lower drug prices. But now, big pharma is fighting back. Pharmaceutical giant Merck just announced it's suing the federal government over the IRA's Medicare-negotiation program: = Reducing the cost of prescription drugs is personal to Kim. As a person living with Type 1 diabetes, Kim knows how crucial it is for people to afford the lifesaving drugs they need. Cutting-edge medicine only helps people if they can afford it. Kim knows that no one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need. That's why she's ready to keep fighting back against big pharma to lower the cost of prescription drugs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. body:
Under Andy's leadership, Kentucky is a national leader in economic growth. Kentucky's economy is on the move, Peter!

Under Andy's leadership, Kentucky is a national leader in economic growth. We've seen the largest development project in our Commonwealth's history, became the electric vehicle battery production capital of the U.S., and created thousands of new jobs.

**We recently released a new TV ad – titled “Booming” – to make sure Kentuckians across the Commonwealth know how Andy has fought to create jobs, improve wages, and bolster the economy.** But running ads isn't cheap! That's why we're counting on the support of this grassroots team to ensure we have the resources to fund things like ads, mail, and field organizers to continue to spread Andy's message.

Friend,
The America we’re living in today under Crooked Joe Biden is the very nation our Founding Fathers warned us we could one day become...
**A government no longer controlled by YOU, but a _regime_ controlled by a Deep State that is profiting off putting our country DEAD LAST.**
Remember, they only hate me because I fight for YOU.
_And they only want to silence YOU because you reject their Marxist, globalist agenda. _
For decades, the corrupt bureaucrats, RINO elitists, and radical Leftists in Washington have tried to eradicate America’s middle class – the central pillar of our once free Republic.
**Because if they had it their way, they would replace our Republic with a Third World tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat – _and they are!_**
After our America First Movement shocked the world and WON the White House in 2016, that was the moment they decided there were no longer _any_ limits to their tyranny...
_...The Deep State’s very survival depended on it._
**From that day on, there was no line they would not cross, no lie they would not tell, no witch hunt they would not concoct, and no unlawful INDICTMENT they would not pursue, so long as it was in the name of _“getting Trump”_ and ending our beautiful movement. **
But despite the entire Swamp poised to destroy us, _**WE PREVAILED**_ ... over, and over, and over again.
We stood tall in the face of tyranny, and we never once flinched.
And today, despite the very dark cloud hanging over our nation as Crooked Joe and his corrupt DOJ seek to put me in JAIL for _**400 YEARS**_ as an innocent man, our resolve has never been STRONGER.
_**Because we simply will NEVER SURRENDER our country.**_
But 2024 is not _just_ another election, Friend, it is truly our LAST CHANCE to save America and bring her back from the brink.
_**Either we destroy the Deep State here and now, or the Deep State destroys America. **_

clean_body: .............................. | | | Friend, The America we’re living in today under Crooked Joe Biden is the very nation our Founding Fathers warned us we could one day become... A government no longer controlled by YOU, but a regime controlled by a Deep State that is profiting off putting our country DEAD LAST. Remember, they only hate me because I fight for YOU. And they only want to silence YOU because you reject their Marxist, globalist agenda. For decades, the corrupt bureaucrats, RINO elitists, and radical Leftists in Washington have tried to eradicate America’s middle class – the central pillar of our once free Republic. Because if they had it their way, they would replace our Republic with a Third World tin-pot dictatorship in a heartbeat – and they are! After our America First Movement shocked the world and WON the White House in 2016, that was the moment they decided there were no longer any limits to their tyranny... ...The Deep State’s very survival depended on it. From that day on, there was no line they would not cross, no lie they would not tell, no witch hunt they would not concoct, and no unlawful INDICTMENT they would not pursue, so long as it was in the name of “getting Trump” and ending our beautiful movement. But despite the entire Swamp poised to destroy us, WE PREVAILED ... over, and over, and over again. We stood tall in the face of tyranny, and we never once flinched. And today, despite the very dark cloud hanging over our nation as Crooked Joe and his corrupt DOJ seek to put me in JAIL for 400 YEARS as an innocent man, our resolve has never been STRONGER. Because we simply will NEVER SURRENDER our country. But 2024 is not just another election, Friend, it is truly our LAST CHANCE to save America and bring her back from the brink. Either we destroy the Deep State here and now, or the Deep State destroys America. | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump is rallying the GOP to censure me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I'll show you this first,
Derek, because it speaks for
itself.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ijd0au&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]Post from Donald Trump reads: Anna Paulina Luna is a star. She never
gives up, especially in holding total lowlifes like Adam Schifty Schiff
responsible for their lies, deciet, deception, and actually putting our
country at great resik, for which he should be imprisoned! He is a leaker
and a scoundrel. Any republican voting against his censure, or worse,
should immediately be primaried. There are plenty of great candidates out
there!

Donald Trump posted this rallying cry in an attempt to bully the GOP votes
Rep. Luna needs to censure me.

Not only that, but he goes on to say I should be imprisoned, and that any
Republican who votes against my censure must be primaried.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ijd0au&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]Trump and his cronies will continue to orchestrate attacks against me
because they know I will always hold them accountable and I won’t back
down. If you’re ready to help me fight back, will you please contribute $3
or what you can to our campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

While I wish we could chalk this up to absurdity, there are some deeply
concerning implications in Trump’s post and what we’re watching unfold.

Earlier this year, we watched MAGA extremists hold the House hostage as
they refused to give McCarthy the votes he needed to win the Speakership.
Now, the man they follow blindly is promising to primary any Republican
who does not vote the way he wants.

This is what I mean when I say we need to protect our
democracy,
Derek. He’ll go after anyone,
do anything, in his pursuit for power. He'll try to hold our democracy
hostage. And he’s more emboldened now than ever.

I will not stand by as a dangerous demagogue threatens to destroy all we
hold dear. No matter what threats come my way.

Derek, some of
Donald Trump’s biggest enablers are sitting in the United States Senate.
I’m running to make sure they’re held accountable too.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jun2023_abs_em.ijd0au&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]But I need you behind me. If you are able, will you please contribute
$3 today? Every dollar I raise goes toward fueling this grassroots
campaign so we can fight back.

Together, we can save our democracy and deliver real results for the
American people. More on this all soon.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2603%2E5257348%2E9UIpVR ]DONATE MONTHLY

name: Will Rollins
subject: Here’s how I found out I lost in 2022.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65119330/412399640/1321783056?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWJlMjk5NC05ZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8fE0YylxO5UWEu_az2ZiTNhT61YCoswgOKZ7NAVE_7M=)
Peter,

After the polls closed in my 2022 campaign against Ken Calvert, we were feeling pretty excited about our chances. The first few batches of votes released by the registrar showed us with a promising lead, and while the race hadn’t been called, things were good enough to get an invitation to attend new member orientation in Washington.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65119331/412399641/1321783056?refcode=em-6.20.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWJlMjk5NC05ZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8fE0YylxO5UWEu_az2ZiTNhT61YCoswgOKZ7NAVE_7M=)
_Day one of new member orientation last Fall. Credit: POLITICO._
It was awe-inspiring being inside the Capitol as a prospective member and learning about the job I’d spent a year running for and hoped to have. I also enjoyed getting to know some (we had hoped) soon-to-be colleagues.

**Then, literally as I was standing on the House floor, I got the alert on my phone: a new batch of votes finally put Ken Calvert’s vote share out of reach. The Associated Press called the race, and I officially lost.**

So my partner Paolo and I did what a lot of couples might do: we went to the hotel bar.

As we were sitting there, news broke on TV that Donald Trump had just announced his campaign for president.

And I knew in that moment that our fight wasn’t over yet — that our democracy remains fragile, and it’s on each of us to do what’s in our power to better our communities and our country.

Peter, running for Congress a second time was not a decision I came to lightly, but I'm back in it because I know exactly what is at stake. It’s not the time to give up, and I’ve been so humbled that so many across Riverside County who supported our campaign in 2022 haven’t given up either.

**We came closer than anyone expected in 2022 to flipping this seat, and I wouldn’t be in this if I wasn’t confident we could win. But I can’t do this alone:**

**[The end of this month marks our first public FEC fundraising deadline of my campaign. I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort, Peter. Please send in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help us flip CA-41 and finish the job against Ken Calvert.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65119332/412399642/1321783056?refcode=em-6.20.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWJlMjk5NC05ZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8fE0YylxO5UWEu_az2ZiTNhT61YCoswgOKZ7NAVE_7M=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, After the polls closed in my 2022 campaign against Ken Calvert, we were feeling pretty excited about our chances. The first few batches of votes released by the registrar showed us with a promising lead, and while the race hadn’t been called, things were good enough to get an invitation to attend new member orientation in Washington. = Day one of new member orientation last Fall. Credit: POLITICO. It was awe-inspiring being inside the Capitol as a prospective member and learning about the job I’d spent a year running for and hoped to have. I also enjoyed getting to know some (we had hoped) soon-to-be colleagues. Then, literally as I was standing on the House floor, I got the alert on my phone: a new batch of votes finally put Ken Calvert’s vote share out of reach. The Associated Press called the race, and I officially lost. So my partner Paolo and I did what a lot of couples might do: we went to the hotel bar. As we were sitting there, news broke on TV that Donald Trump had just announced his campaign for president. And I knew in that moment that our fight wasn’t over yet — that our democracy remains fragile, and it’s on each of us to do what’s in our power to better our communities and our country. Peter, running for Congress a second time was not a decision I came to lightly, but I'm back in it because I know exactly what is at stake. It’s not the time to give up, and I’ve been so humbled that so many across Riverside County who supported our campaign in 2022 haven’t given up either. We came closer than anyone expected in 2022 to flipping this seat, and I wouldn’t be in this if I wasn’t confident we could win. But I can’t do this alone: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = As always, thanks for your support. Will | = Democrat Will Rollins is a former national security and counter-terrorism prosecutor running for Congress in California's 41st Congressional District. Consider supporting Will's campaign by = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Will Rollins for Congress If you wish to donate by check, you can make it payable to Will Rollins for Congress and mail the check to: Will Rollins for Congress PO Box 6282 414 W Grand Blvd Corona, CA 92878 United States

name: Anna Kaplan via Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos told a web of brazen lies to get elected. Now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. He doesn’t represent voters’ values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November
body:
Defeating George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78e3af2d-060b-4b32-a677-91f6f0e48480/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5984e919-58df-4d07-855d-c4898d53ef3b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Blue Amp Action \-- to help me send George Santos into political retirement? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6047b1e3-1fac-4071-8211-3c5d7a43d800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5df60e7-5602-48b2-95b4-c8619c9bf6a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T964ca157-25a3-426a-b560-032efe598e1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bcdf229-a6c3-49a4-be67-d8bf909e6ef5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9d44984-468b-4937-a94c-336851698263/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a903f6c-9ca1-424b-aaca-3f594876eb24/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---

---

|
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
