clean_body: Defeating George Santos | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fwd: Action Alert: Votes in the Senate on Bills Reducing Exposure to Toxics Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| | | Hi Peter, The Senate is scheduled to vote on the Toxic Free Cosmetics (SB 546) and Toxic Free Kids Modernization (HB 3043) bills today. Both of these bills are part of our priority, the Toxic Free Bills Package. The Toxic Free Cosmetics and Toxic Free Kids Modernization bills are important public health bills that will help reduce our exposure to toxic chemicals found in cosmetics and baby products used every day. **[Please write to your state senator right away asking them to vote YES on these bills.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65121120/412406907/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0Y2FjZDJhLWE1MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VPSBvgbVh_hNY4nevLDmQMeJkAmAr8zFqSDMZn8FZQc=&emci=102a976a-850f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e4cacd2a-a50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for all that you do,
Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65121121/412406908/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0Y2FjZDJhLWE1MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VPSBvgbVh_hNY4nevLDmQMeJkAmAr8zFqSDMZn8FZQc=&emci=102a976a-850f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e4cacd2a-a50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Dear Peter, We are about a week away from the end of session, and **votes in the Senate on two critical public health bills in our priority Toxic Free Bills Package** –the Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546) and Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)–**are scheduled for Tuesday**. There are just a few days left for us to act. **[Will you write to your state senator today urging them to vote YES on these bills?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65121122/412406909/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0Y2FjZDJhLWE1MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VPSBvgbVh_hNY4nevLDmQMeJkAmAr8zFqSDMZn8FZQc=&emci=102a976a-850f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e4cacd2a-a50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)**
* The lotions, make-up, and other cosmetic products we use every day contain many chemicals known to be hazardous to our health, such as formaldehyde (a well-known carcinogen), lead, and arsenic. **The Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546)** requires cosmetic manufacturers to disclose all chemical ingredients in their products on their company websites as an accessible way for consumers to make educated purchasing decisions. It would also regulate or prohibit the sale of the worst classes of chemicals in cosmetics and personal care products.
* **The Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)** passed the House with bipartisan support earlier this month. It’s now waiting for a vote in the Senate to modernize Oregon’s Toxic Free Kids program to be in line with what science today tells us we need. A modernized Toxic Free Kids program would allow our health authorities to regulate classes of harmful chemicals. Children are far more vulnerable to toxic chemicals than adults, which is why it’s so scary that thousands of chemicals lurk in products our kids use every day.

**[Please email your state senator right away in support of the Toxic Free Cosmetics bill (SB 546) and Toxic Free Kids Modernization bill (HB 3043)!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65121123/412406910/718415461?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU0Y2FjZDJhLWE1MGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=VPSBvgbVh_hNY4nevLDmQMeJkAmAr8zFqSDMZn8FZQc=&emci=102a976a-850f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e4cacd2a-a50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** We need to do everything we can to make sure that our lawmakers put the health of our communities first. I hope you’ll join us and help protect all Oregonians from toxic chemicals. Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Don't buy the deflection, it's just a smokescreen | | Hunter Biden has finally pled GUILTY for tax crimes and a gun charge. This Hunter Biden plea deal is a complete joke, Fellow American. It's a feigned retreat and reveals they're even more scared than ever of scrutiny for the real crimes. The real target is the audio tapes of the alleged bribe for Hunter and Joe Biden from the Ukrainian executive of oligarch-owned Burisma. And the hundreds of billions of U.S. taxpayer funds kicked back to Ukraine to make good on the favor. And it's no accident that the farcical Hunter Biden 'plea deal' comes right after the Trump indictment. Don't buy the deflection; it's just a smokescreen, Fellow American. | This is the perfect fig leaf to pretend that 'no one is above the law,' while still putting certain people above it. It's the media's perfect level of cover they need to feign objectivity, but I am not going to accept it. If you agree that we cannot thrive in a country where the same laws apply to all equality - whether you're the president's son or not - It's amazing how Washington insiders play this game. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. I’ve known Marlene for years, and I’ve seen her passion for serving our community firsthand. As a longtime broadcast journalist in our region, she fought for the truth and held the powerful accountable, and it didn’t end when she left the newsroom.

Last year, when Arizona became ground zero in the fight against disinformation and attacks on our democracy, Marlene stepped up and led a group of former journalists in calling out extremists like Kari Lake for spreading lies. _And her efforts worked._

Now, Marlene’s taking on Rep. David Schweikert, who is best known for abusing his position and using tax dollars for personal gain. Schweikert is a MAGA-Republican -- replacing him in the U.S. Congress with Marlene would be a huge win for Arizona’s 1st District.

**Election experts are already calling this one of the most consequential House races in the country. There’s no doubt in my mind that Marlene is our _best chance_ at defeating Schweikert, but she can’t do it without your support.**

clean_body: | = Friend, I'm thrilled to share the news that I have endorsed Marlene Galán-Woods in the race for Arizona's 1st Congressional District. I want to share more about why I’ve made this endorsement, but first, Marlene is coming up on a critical FEC fundraising deadline and could really use a boost to show that she has the strength to unseat her Republican opponent, David Schweikert. = | **= I’ve known Marlene for years, and I’ve seen her passion for serving our community firsthand. As a longtime broadcast journalist in our region, she fought for the truth and held the powerful accountable, and it didn’t end when she left the newsroom. Last year, when Arizona became ground zero in the fight against disinformation and attacks on our democracy, Marlene stepped up and led a group of former journalists in calling out extremists like Kari Lake for spreading lies. And her efforts worked. Now, Marlene’s taking on Rep. David Schweikert, who is best known for abusing his position and using tax dollars for personal gain. Schweikert is a MAGA-Republican -- replacing him in the U.S. Congress with Marlene would be a huge win for Arizona’s 1st District. Election experts are already calling this one of the most consequential House races in the country. There’s no doubt in my mind that Marlene is our best chance at defeating Schweikert, but she can’t do it without your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Onward together, Kris Mayes | Marlene's campaign to flip AZ-01 is being built from the ground up with grassroots support! = To learn more about Marlene and how she's fighting for Arizona families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d90080f9be540aab82008f97f53455d&_e=2Py6V9yRh69Z2z_up1NqVXl3XD8XDdh_x2lA8Jx26va5UHdBDBy1MxXuFaLSoSpfzLWL7W1XK-ZYE_zlekLJlcQCtPQhCLruVLF3_wBS6CDQ9ORADUXczJifva6J26KC9Td0LWLi1CRC_xDL9j1WYXf4fd9p2pVv_P_FiwJrsn1FxyriGqOGxFS6FntYX7LEl9Omadi_nLKjFhqFZPp06T7HgHxKkFfDlfWHMMdNcmZJ9XrTDPHifpQIopk1lAxaHbVdl2CnSZiq6xFxDbPUxrafIvGtNaYOIL0FOcg289I%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d90080f9be540aab82008f97f53455d&_e=2Py6V9yRh69Z2z_up1NqVXl3XD8XDdh_x2lA8Jx26va5UHdBDBy1MxXuFaLSoSpfzLWL7W1XK-ZYE_zlekLJlcQCtPQhCLruVLF3_wBS6CDQ9ORADUXczJifva6J26KC9Td0LWLi1CRC_xDL9j1WYYCUIHvKnJOGOTzqkCW84RaTGTeDC8lJy5Y6a4wsBWPZp5mmsmlHcTCOql1RvgMBiq3nnEQ10vhMB6c_oxUSa_0vf57ld99yBnepracJ-Hi18wbDF7cOEL72rlRgaCyxWhTeHY3wh_EBYwkcYqET2_A%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d90080f9be540aab82008f97f53455d&_e=2Py6V9yRh69Z2z_up1NqVXl3XD8XDdh_x2lA8Jx26va5UHdBDBy1MxXuFaLSoSpfzLWL7W1XK-ZYE_zlekLJlcQCtPQhCLruVLF3_wBS6CDQ9ORADUXczJifva6J26KC9Td0LWLi1CRC_xDL9j1WYYeTRprezAyTohQftGuU6IgfO2KNioef4q8hvQmSQp-W4RgDoy35uTOeR4N9M4cWUZkaLknUVu5_nfvcn-CKMPw2Fgi-epoGmxpCTLi1Ad8rw8MJ_JYtPDbzQCupA8dG_Ez0ZhS87kFvnnjRt-YbE6E%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d90080f9be540aab82008f97f53455d&_e=2Py6V9yRh69Z2z_up1NqVXl3XD8XDdh_x2lA8Jx26va5UHdBDBy1MxXuFaLSoSpfzLWL7W1XK-ZYE_zlekLJlcQCtPQhCLruVLF3_wBS6CDQ9ORADUXczJifva6J26KC9Td0LWLi1CRC_xDL9j1WYb3xY-fVooWLk6r0nek5T-BHJgY1jjdwiLZBAZKvjYY2amFZ84eiF6xfBK-8Jk32fcoJjAmMePusOSNdtlI7zMDxLezTJsY3MKOS9T0TriX8dUPoTyLbXBmPNruNm31fir0GW5RI9F9NPEwRr4E_zng%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d90080f9be540aab82008f97f53455d&_e=2Py6V9yRh69Z2z_up1NqVXl3XD8XDdh_x2lA8Jx26va5UHdBDBy1MxXuFaLSoSpfzLWL7W1XK-ZYE_zlekLJlcQCtPQhCLruVLF3_wBS6CDQ9ORADUXczJifva6J26KC9Td0LWLi1CRC_xDL9j1WYVYIEWgqje_HpZXsCbQyrLgIYjrjFiMF2d0nnIzwk0cntRmfsI9IwHYMEAsrTVQ7-M1cwvzrzRLCQlKmMbUbnVajOBUlybZ__mubjZg_GoQorCDvwiDNeM69RJD9HrPv6kPPyjkDK5_VpNqX69feRfE%3D)

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Over the last month, we've reached out to you about what’s at stake in today's primary. Following recent abortion bans in the Carolinas last month, **Virginia has become the _only_ southern state with access to abortion beyond 12 weeks**.

Democrats are defending a two-seat majority in the state Senate and need three more seats in the House of Delegates to stop Republican legislators and Gov. Youngkin's anti-choice agenda. The stakes couldn't be higher, Peter — **this primary election _will_ determine the future of abortion access for _millions_.**

The good news? EMILYs List has endorsed 22 Democratic pro-choice candidates in key legislative races — one of whom,**Lashrecse Aird (SD-13)** , can unseat the _last anti-choice Democrat_ in the state Senate.
**This is a flashpoint for abortion access in the South, Peter, and candidates are _on the ballot TODAY!_ So don't wait, donate now to help make a difference in must-win primaries:**

clean_body: | | | Your last chance to make a difference in this primary Peter, it's Election Day in Virginia! Over the last month, we've reached out to you about what’s at stake in today's primary. Following recent abortion bans in the Carolinas last month, Virginia has become the only southern state with access to abortion beyond 12 weeks. Democrats are defending a two-seat majority in the state Senate and need three more seats in the House of Delegates to stop Republican legislators and Gov. Youngkin's anti-choice agenda. The stakes couldn't be higher, Peter — this primary election will determine the future of abortion access for millions. The good news? EMILYs List has endorsed 22 Democratic pro-choice candidates in key legislative races — one of whom,Lashrecse Aird (SD-13) , can unseat the last anti-choice Democrat in the state Senate. This is a flashpoint for abortion access in the South, Peter, and candidates are on the ballot TODAY! So don't wait, donate now to help make a difference in must-win primaries: Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns team ** ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

None of this would have been possible without YOU, team.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65122763/412413589/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWZhZGNlYi1hOTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZNr-ozaju8ZxVFfvElA30p5paOT0jQttmObuGdR0oI=) | We have some exciting news, team:

We've _officially_ turned in petition signatures to put a reproductive rights initiative on the ballot! This achievement would not have been possible without the dedication and hard work of each and every one of our volunteers and supporters.

**Thank you for your unwavering dedication to this fight for our rights! [Will you contribute $5 or more to fuel our work to restore and protect reproductive rights in Ohio?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65122764/412413590/1045760925?refcode=em23_230617_turnin_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230617_turnin_fndd_gq_act___ODP_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=49fadceb-a90f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWZhZGNlYi1hOTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CZNr-ozaju8ZxVFfvElA30p5paOT0jQttmObuGdR0oI=)**

By gathering signatures from voters in every county in Ohio, we're showing Ohioans are READY to enshrine reproductive rights into our state constitution. Together, we are paving the way for progress and ensuring that the voices of Ohioans are heard.

But our work's not over yet. Anti-choice politicians forced "Issue 1" on the August 8 ballot to make it nearly impossible for Ohioans to pass citizen-led ballot initiatives.

Look, we need your continued support to maintain our momentum and fight back against these attacks on our rights. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Reminder: Watch RFK's historic peace speech livestream this evening
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Join us for RFK's address on peace and diplomacy tonight at 7pm Eastern

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=1)
---
Peter, This evening, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will make a historic speech on the subject of **peace and diplomacy** , heralding a new day in American foreign policy. **Join our** **[livestream](https://www.kennedy24.com/peace-and-diplomacy?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=2)** at 7pm Eastern and bear witness to this important event. If you like what you hear, please signal your commitment to America's peaceful leadership in the world by **[making a donation](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=3) **of any amount today. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/peace-and-diplomacy?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=4) Team Kennedy
[](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=5)[http://www.kennedy24.com/](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_speech_reminder&n=6)

Just in the past few months, we've seen what Republicans have done with their power in the states:
* **In Tennessee,** Republicans expelled two Black representatives for peacefully protesting gun violence, **and in Montana,** a trans lawmaker was silenced.
* **In North Carolina and South Carolina,** Republicans jammed through some of the most restrictive abortion bans in the country.
* **In Florida,** Ron DeSantis and Republicans have passed legislation attacking LGBTQ+ rights.

Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights and proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy a tax break.
If the GOP flips the state Senate and defends its control of the state House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. _Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it’s terrible._
**With so much at stake this year, we can’t lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to power our mission, so we know you’ll come through this year, too.**
[Chip in $7 to heed President Obama’s call and help Democrats win in states like Virginia. Any amount will make an incredible difference. We mean it →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURt3B-Jxc4nNvF-EVj5ZQXoufTY1XZgI55ezSiYCTpf7ZOTtxzTVjK40pDgn_-PLyUSUPji_U59iVBSYJNfnId3GeSa3bthEJH_M2dcYiLvp8MraTK41nxEtrk_nr6bf8LIGhF8x1XNiyNVRuMVp_dS1ZSWb3jnwRtUhnkRDmEolx3JAY6xPwjrhSPNHP6k9DQfCWMisrhwRLj_noPCQyZN5x-fiHPYh1PxRcfmc-AW9akI8YAtcRLKLhZkhnEhnOfNeYyPXqugnivsormJn0DPYsPKJzT4UUx2ndciBWRxRtBmrZnIRSWZXH1xcwlWzVYxekG_D5yJIjxkF038Z5hiDSgsLzbHb0tNnp0YovTREetBGHfnXv_BfB907tYpDLEMvonQEGsotZCsWgXAtOBB4oNkyiW21N-ZqiLKkwMY6YsqGVNwy7UtgPWLVpkfu3ZEgw8jucg6ZBpT2dJQZamJDw/3x7/BVePvcHGRkCLlIIsBMxAzg/h6/sgmy2Pr59edAtG5yyZdmfkOaflKrQnCtfVp3f5ZQAMA)
For two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has blocked much of Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda, but we could lose a crucial check on the GOP’s power if we are defeated this November.
That’s why it means so much to know we have the support of this grassroots team. Thank you for everything.
Team DLCC

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Humbly asking you to contribute $3 before I take a bit of time off from the campaign. Pls read.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The response to the message I sent early today letting supporters know I'll be taking some time off soon as my wife and I expect our first child together has been overwhelming.
#

Peter -
The response to the message I sent earlier today letting supporters know I'll be taking some time off soon as my wife and I expect our first child together has been overwhelming.
That a bunch of people I've never met would help before this FEC deadline ends as I take some time off to spend with my family has warmed my heart more than you could possibly imagine.
But I need your help, as well.
We are probably not going to name our child Peter if you can contribute before our FEC deadline ends, but I can promise it will go a long way toward helping us hit our critical goals and winning this race. Hopefully that’s enough.
What do you say?
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona before our FEC fundraising deadline ends this week? I am taking time off to spend with my family and really need your help.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230620-2-f&t=1&akid=728%2E734936%2EiA3qaM)

clean_body: The response to the message I sent early today letting supporters know I'll be taking some time off soon as my wife and I expect our first child together has been overwhelming. Peter - The response to the message I sent earlier today letting supporters know I'll be taking some time off soon as my wife and I expect our first child together has been overwhelming. That a bunch of people I've never met would help before this FEC deadline ends as I take some time off to spend with my family has warmed my heart more than you could possibly imagine. But I need your help, as well. We are probably not going to name our child Peter if you can contribute before our FEC deadline ends, but I can promise it will go a long way toward helping us hit our critical goals and winning this race. Hopefully that’s enough. What do you say? If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you, Ruben Gallego Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act]
Look, friend, we’re sure you’re getting flooded with emails asking for donations. So, here’s our promise: if you chip in now to this email, we won’t ask you for money again until this quarter is over.* [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act]
We have a big fundraising deadline coming up, and we need to hit our goal so Michael can keep fighting for Colorado in the Senate.
From reintroducing the Child Tax Credit to defending our public lands, regulating emerging tech like AI, and protecting basic freedoms like abortion rights — Michael is tackling the most pressing issues we face.
But he can’t do this work alone.
In 2024, we need to protect our slim Senate majority and take back control of the House. Michael is working to elect great people in key swing seats across the country, but hitting our quarterly fundraising goal by the end of June will be crucial.
We know you don’t want to another fundraising request. But this deadline is too important to ignore.
Donating to this email (even $1!) means we won’t ask you again for money until this quarter is over.
Your contribution will go to defending the most vulnerable Democratic seats in the country. Whether it’s $1, $10, or $100, it makes a difference — and we won’t ask for any more donations after. Can we count on you to chip in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_062023_EOQ_A_act]
Let’s elect people who will actually work for our best interests.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Michael Bennet will go through immediately:

name: Hilary Franz
subject: Keeping Washington a beacon of reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) **[https://hilaryfranz
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123338/412415065/1504078835?refcode=EM_FR_230620Choice_N_HF_Actives_6_NG_N_Logo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=)
---
Peter,

**As a mom of three, I know that nothing is more fundamental than the right to choose when to start or grow a family.** This decision is a critical component of one’s right to autonomy, self-determination, and privacy – human rights we all have.

Our mothers, sisters, and daughters have grown up believing we were always going to have these freedoms protected. But in the past year, the Supreme Court has stripped millions of these rights by overturning Roe v. Wade and thereby opening up the floodgates for anti-abortion laws to sweep across the country.

**As the only woman running for governor, I am better positioned than anyone to understand this issue, and I’m committed to keeping Washington a beacon of reproductive freedom – not just for women in our state, but also for women across the country.** Check out our new video on my commitment to upholding and strengthening women's right to choose in Washington: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123339/412415066/1627887702?refcode=EM_FR_230620Choice_N_HF_Actives_6_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=) That includes enforcing stronger regulations for predatory “crisis pregnancy centers” and passing the Keep Our Care Act, which would prevent unregulated hospital mergers that reduce access to reproductive services and gender-affirming care in rural areas – **which will be one of my top priorities if elected governor. **

**As governor, I’m committed to fighting for women’s – and human – rights in our state and nationwide.**[So please, Peter, will you support my campaign for governor so I can continue to fight for these freedoms?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123340/412415067/1627887702?refcode=EM_FR_230620Choice_N_HF_Actives_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=)**** **[PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123341/412415068/1627887702?refcode=EM_FR_230620Choice_N_HF_Actives_6_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=)** Thank you,

Hilary ** **
---
| | As commissioner of public lands, Hilary took bold action to defend our lands and bring people together to solve statewide issues, like increasing funding for our schools, investing in economic development, and tackling our wildfire crisis. Now, she’s ready to continue this work as governor to ensure that we enact meaningful change that will last for generations to come. **Can we count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you're able to elect Hilary as our next governor?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123342/412415069/1504078835?refcode=EM_FR_230620Choice_N_HF_Actives_6_NG_N_Biobox&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=)
---

Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) **[https://hilaryfranz.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123343/412415070/-1036536034?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGYwYWM5YmItYWIwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8Ncz3SxZRHF1KV9GSD4bK6OMlg1kdlj62QjJ7-4tLc=&emci=25425db8-ae0b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4f0ac9bb-ab0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=11003312)** Friends of Hilary Franz (D)

clean_body: | | = Peter, As a mom of three, I know that nothing is more fundamental than the right to choose when to start or grow a family. This decision is a critical component of one’s right to autonomy, self-determination, and privacy – human rights we all have. Our mothers, sisters, and daughters have grown up believing we were always going to have these freedoms protected. But in the past year, the Supreme Court has stripped millions of these rights by overturning Roe v. Wade and thereby opening up the floodgates for anti-abortion laws to sweep across the country. As the only woman running for governor, I am better positioned than anyone to understand this issue, and I’m committed to keeping Washington a beacon of reproductive freedom – not just for women in our state, but also for women across the country. Check out our new video on my commitment to upholding and strengthening women's right to choose in Washington: = That includes enforcing stronger regulations for predatory “crisis pregnancy centers” and passing the Keep Our Care Act, which would prevent unregulated hospital mergers that reduce access to reproductive services and gender-affirming care in rural areas – which will be one of my top priorities if elected governor. As governor, I’m committed to fighting for women’s – and human – rights in our state and nationwide.=** = Thank you, Hilary | | As commissioner of public lands, Hilary took bold action to defend our lands and bring people together to solve statewide issues, like increasing funding for our schools, investing in economic development, and tackling our wildfire crisis. Now, she’s ready to continue this work as governor to ensure that we enact meaningful change that will last for generations to come. Can we count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you're able to elect Hilary as our next governor? = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) ** Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. body:
[ https://act.katieporter.com/go/14559?t=1001&akid=25154%2E3422442%2E_YpNqS ]Katie Porter for Senate

My three teenagers and CEOs can agree, I’m not one for BS answers. So here
are some of the quick, no BS reasons why I’m asking for you to [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230620-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAI20_2_EXP_20230620_V1_F&refcode2=25154_3422442__YpNqS&akid=25154%2E3422442%2E_YpNqS ]make a
donation of $5, or whatever makes sense for you, ahead of
our June 30th end of quarter deadline.

What happens after June 30th?

We publicly report how much money we’ve raised these past three months to
the Federal Election Commission.

Who cares about those numbers?

The strength of our fundraising is seen as a sign of our campaign’s
promise. If our opponents, and the outside groups that plan to back them,
see our momentum waning—it could inspire them to spend even more heavily
against us.

Didn’t we just have an election?

Trust me, I know November 2022 wasn’t too long ago. But California’s
primary is just over eight months away. I’m already on the campaign trail
meeting with voters, and donations given right now will help us plan out
critical ad buys closer to Election Day.

Why does my $5 or $50 matter?

I’m one of less than a dozen Members of Congress who doesn’t take money
from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs. Our campaign truly is
people-powered.

grateful to have your support before the end of the fundraising quarter.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Organic farm animals could be in DANGER
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833111?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Demand that Big Ag is held accountable for inhumane treatment of innocent farm animals NOW!** It’s imperative that we keep the organic label strong to provide a necessary alternative to factory farms that **deprive** helpless animals of outdoor access to fresh air, **cramming** them into tight spaces without enough room to move around, and even sometimes _**performing cruel and unnecessary physical alterations!**_ But for far too long, Big Ag has evaded accountability for its attempts to weaken high-quality organic animal welfare standards. And in 2017, the Trump administration succeeded in **OVERTURNING** a **critical animal welfare rule** that would ensure _**HUMANE**_ treatment for organic livestock. [**Now, we have the chance to DEMAND that the USDA enact this rule immediately, so we need to act quickly. Will you take action right away and sign our petition?**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833112?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Big Ag doesn’t want the Organic Livestock and Poultry Standards rule to go into effect because it doesn’t want to compete with true organic farmers for profits -- most of whom already meet these high-quality regulations.
Corporations like Bayer have even shelled out _**MILLIONS OF DOLLARS**_ **attacking** the organic industry and covering up the _**dangers of the toxic pesticides**_ used in Big Ag farming.
Organic farmers, consumers, and animal activists overwhelmingly support the OLPS rule, and we’re standing with them in the fight against giant meat and dairy companies that are threatening the integrity of the organic label. [**We can’t let that happen, Friend. So please, add your name right now to protect organic farming from Big Ag! >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833114?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1833113?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

Peter,

This month’s FEC fundraising deadline is a valuable reminder that we are one month closer to Election Day.

In a district as competitive as Abigail’s – where prominent national Republicans and top political experts alike have their eyes trained on us – it’s essential we continue to build momentum as the election cycle progresses. [_**Before our FEC fundraising deadline, will you rush a contribution to our campaign and support our work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123555/412415747/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230620-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVlZTI3NDYtYWQwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UZ3AqGGraGBcseZmtJC_xje-Vz65veN3ZmWN2kCOdcE=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123556/412415748/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230620-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVlZTI3NDYtYWQwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UZ3AqGGraGBcseZmtJC_xje-Vz65veN3ZmWN2kCOdcE=)
---
We will report our fundraising totals from the quarter to the FEC next month. This could be a watershed moment for our campaign, and I know with your support, we’ll send a resounding message to the adversaries and operatives keen on defeating Abigail.

We’ve been overwhelmed by the support this year, and we are as energized today to enact lasting change in our community as we were when Abigail was first elected.

We look forward to Abigail continuing her work for Virginians, but we need your support to power our campaign. [_**Will you contribute to our campaign before this month’s FEC fundraising deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65123557/412415749/1394223873?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230620-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTVlZTI3NDYtYWQwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UZ3AqGGraGBcseZmtJC_xje-Vz65veN3ZmWN2kCOdcE=)

clean_body: This month’s FEC fundraising deadline is a valuable reminder that we are one month closer to Election Day. | = | | | IN 10 DAYS: FEC FUNDRAISING DEADLINE = | = Peter, This month’s FEC fundraising deadline is a valuable reminder that we are one month closer to Election Day. In a district as competitive as Abigail’s – where prominent national Republicans and top political experts alike have their eyes trained on us – it’s essential we continue to build momentum as the election cycle progresses. = | = We will report our fundraising totals from the quarter to the FEC next month. This could be a watershed moment for our campaign, and I know with your support, we’ll send a resounding message to the adversaries and operatives keen on defeating Abigail. We’ve been overwhelmed by the support this year, and we are as energized today to enact lasting change in our community as we were when Abigail was first elected. We look forward to Abigail continuing her work for Virginians, but we need your support to power our campaign. = | = Thank you sincerely, Team Spanberger * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Corporate greed at its worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
In the last year top insurance CEOs took home over $335,000,000 at the expense of people and families in desperate need of support.
#
Peter,
It is no surprise to learn that the United States health care system is the worst of any advanced economy in the world.
It's responsible for the highest death rates for treatable conditions, the highest infant and maternal mortality rates, and the lowest life expectancy at birth.
**Meanwhile, in the last year, top insurance CEOs of CVS Health, UnitedHealth Group, Cigna, Elevance Health, Humana, and Molina Healthcare took home over $335,000,000 at the expense of people and families in desperate need of support. 1**
Our health care system cannot help but to fail patients while enriching CEOs -- it was created to do just that.
[**If you stand with Pramila in the fight to end corporate greed, bring Medicare for All to our country, and finally ensure that every person is guaranteed quality health care, regardless of their ability to pay, please add your name to our petition today.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon?source=em20230620-2621&t=1&akid=2621%2E420207%2EYiTKcA)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon?source=em20230620-2621&t=2&akid=2621%2E420207%2EYiTKcA)**
**By passing the Medicare for All Act of 2023, we will ensure that:**
* Everyone will have health care, including dental, vision, hearing, and long term care.
* Expensive premiums, deductibles, co-pays, and other out of pocket costs will be eliminated completely.
* Roughly 95% of all U.S. households would save money on health care costs.
* The U.S. would save over $450 billion on health expenses annually.

**It's time to put people over profits and care over corporations.** Our country's lack of universal health care is not just a gender justice or racial justice issue, it's also an economic justice issue.
**Medicare for All cannot and will not be ignored.** With your support, we've been able to bring this legislation to the forefront of Congress and now it's time to build up our momentum. [**Will you add your name today and join our fight to finally put an end to corporate greed in our health care system and cement universal health care in our democracy once and for all?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/support-medicare-for-all-signon?source=em20230620-2621&t=3&akid=2621%2E420207%2EYiTKcA)
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
* * *
1 - [Top Insurance CEOs Took Home $335 Million Last Year, Fueled by Stock Buybacks](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/42480?t=4&akid=2621%2E420207%2EYiTKcA)

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230620-2621-footer&t=5&refcode2=2621_420207_YiTKcA&akid=2621%2E420207%2EYiTKcA)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold on to our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**
**[_That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124244/412418217/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4216-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzE4ODAxYS1hZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lZvA1e9lDyRVQ7G5cQqBY0xn_3zJkc48rUP6usRCsMc=)**

Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. Analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American. But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. | | The Virginia primaries are **today,** Derek. That means the fate of the Commonwealth’s GOP anti-choice agenda is about to be decided. Virginia Republicans are already united around a 15-week ban as a starting point. But they’re not going to stop there. More extreme Republicans throughout the Commonwealth are pushing for a **full ban on abortion.** This fight is about so much more than one election. It’s about women’s right to make their own decisions about their health and family, without getting politicians’ permission. It’s about the lives and wellbeing of women with serious pregnancy complications who could be denied life-saving healthcare if an abortion ban goes into effect. **_[So, Derek, we’re asking if you can chip in just $5 right now to help Mark Warner elect staunch defenders of reproductive freedom to the General Assembly in November>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124628/412419316/-278856575?refcode=mw_em_230620_2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA4ZWQ4MS1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8CgloTzocWSJfULHFbwxymF7dmquiin49FLOUMd51o=)_** While we’re fighting to expand our majority in Washington next year to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law and take these private medical decisions out of the hands of courts and politicians, we need to make sure we’re doing everything in our power here at home to protect reproductive freedom. That means coming out swinging after the primaries to elect Democrats to the General Assembly. **_[Can you support Mark’s work to get out the vote for candidates who will protect and expand access to reproductive health care by donating anything you can today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124629/412419317/-278856575?refcode=mw_em_230620_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA4ZWQ4MS1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8CgloTzocWSJfULHFbwxymF7dmquiin49FLOUMd51o=)_** Thank you, Team Warner ******[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124630/412419318/-278856575?refcode=mw_em_230620_2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjA4ZWQ4MS1hZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M8CgloTzocWSJfULHFbwxymF7dmquiin49FLOUMd51o=)******

name: HER Time
subject: three quick things!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124816/412419770/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2OWUyMDAtYjAwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pSeaD5kUu5w1_aAbPNNVI1LcDIZ9WICIFxN05BusSQQ=)
---
Peter, our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is coming up next week. We’re about to give you three quick reasons to explain why you should chip in $3 to HER Time right now, [_**but you can skip to the chase by making a donation right here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65124817/412419771/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230620_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI2OWUyMDAtYjAwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pSeaD5kUu5w1_aAbPNNVI1LcDIZ9WICIFxN05BusSQQ=)
1. **Abortion rights are under attack all over the country.** From state houses to court rooms to pharmacies, extremists are trying to limit safe access to reproductive care everywhere they can. We have to stand up and fight back before it’s too late.
2. **We need to flip the House in 2024.** Kevin McCarthy, Marjorie Taylor Greene, George Santos, and the rest of the Republican party have turned the House of Representatives into a circus. We need to get the body back into Democratic control by electing more women and young people who will get to work creating necessary change.
3. **We might miss this end-of-quarter fundraising goal.** Our fundraising deadlines keep us on track with raising the resources needed to power our work. When we miss them, we have to work from behind to catch up, or risk cutting essential initiatives we won’t be able to afford.

name: Colin Allred
subject: Friend, this race is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
| Friend, I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me. I'd love to take a moment to explain why.

I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125080/412420403/1172110187?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.20_b1_ca_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVlMDcwZS1iMTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5c38UX38DTUHDz5U6mOSgPqUk5pzFSGKf-NSDSlTRM=)
Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125081/412420404/1172110187?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.20_b1_ca_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVlMDcwZS1iMTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5c38UX38DTUHDz5U6mOSgPqUk5pzFSGKf-NSDSlTRM=)**
After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125082/412420405/1172110187?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.20_b1_ca_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVlMDcwZS1iMTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5c38UX38DTUHDz5U6mOSgPqUk5pzFSGKf-NSDSlTRM=)
**It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House. Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help.[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Greg Landsman today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125083/412420406/1172110187?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.20_b1_ca_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVlMDcwZS1iMTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5c38UX38DTUHDz5U6mOSgPqUk5pzFSGKf-NSDSlTRM=)**

We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate.

**Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me.

[**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Greg Landsman to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125084/412420407/1172110187?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.20_b1_ca_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTVlMDcwZS1iMTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n5c38UX38DTUHDz5U6mOSgPqUk5pzFSGKf-NSDSlTRM=)**

Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning.

Colin Allred

I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. = Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. = After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. Fellow Conservative, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--_**it was about demonstrating true leadership. **_

Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--**bucking Fauci,** **bucking the establishment,** and **bucking the media. **
---
| [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6482598a9b9a4c2ca98010262e442dc3&_e=yeTakJ8BkoedTSR79t97pEfr8KGH9vC5i8PDrnFKsQ9dOwMxZmPPmFs_2jznicBatgjLzh7uXlUWlslqB4g-QeZII4zXc3o1zrzCMwNRqR09OR4DmJpYnbV5hS_9PZW7swl5ZoGZSNeyGx3kbGFX2E7LK-_gCSjRlmgJv7mo4iCyZ85dCvZZwrAYLUnWKyXcPdjassK1xW9IVeH_b0rdbLy40TXRL2z-Dr2w3yvt7pjX7VJxpaXnsYs-nUY0fcHmSZMl_PAoG7en5jh7gt8U472oFMDOG22dlKMVHBG5WGSVoXXn1gGo9juW_0RLegMr0GpVE84-y-HqEpWsr8eHyG0LSnAusb7p94SmjE6z-YFZqIH1hYtFyIYf2vEFTzDnSd7b5Pzy9FxdNRf7mrqN0xIjt8Zix10v0IZX4ZWiavaL731XXEPm7ZSaPptzSPdm)
---

Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics.

But, Fellow Conservative, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. _**Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve.**_ To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation.

This starts with:
* Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border

* Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation

* Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them

In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it.

Fellow Conservative, you can take that to the bank.

As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve.

I pledge to you, Fellow Conservative, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. _**And we are going to start on DAY ONE. **_

As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. **[Will you join me, Fellow Conservative?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6482598a9b9a4c2ca98010262e442dc3&_e=yeTakJ8BkoedTSR79t97pEfr8KGH9vC5i8PDrnFKsQ9dOwMxZmPPmFs_2jznicBatgjLzh7uXlUWlslqB4g-QeZII4zXc3o1zrzCMwNRqR09OR4DmJpYnbV5hS_9PZW7swl5ZoGZSNeyGx3kbGFX2E7LK-_gCSjRlmgJv7mo4iCyZ85dCvZZwrAYLUnWKyXcPdjassK1xW9IVeH_b0rdbLy40TXRL2z-Dr2w3yvt7pjX7VJxpaXnsYs-nUY0fcHmSZMl_PAoG7en5jh7gt8U472oFMDOG22dlKMVHBG5WGRmtxN_H5kt7PVifIpgcsT0xmJLyXyM7w7S-JNen0FHlObQ8YD9HpZ3UkxeOTFUq6nLKYZm9-ouevYc_CJmP7eCxFh4X8PzYmQXKcjIKjSn-2c-IZ3rkE9Gs2NiMI2df3VyeQtv1zogeLf8S0kOMZ9A "Will you join me, Fellow Conservative?") **

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
