clean_body: This is more convincing than anything I could say to you. | | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Conservative, During my time serving as Florida's 46th governor, we went through one of the most pivotal moments in our nation's history: the Covid crisis. It fell upon the shoulders of our nation and tested every one of our elected leaders. And that test was about more than just getting the policy right--it was about demonstrating true leadership. Before, during, and after the pandemic, I've led Florida my own way--bucking Fauci, bucking the establishment, and bucking the media. | Unsurprisingly, this refusal to back down, my unwillingness to waiver, has brought on incoming daily assaults and smears like no governor has ever faced while many supporters have warned me to change course so I can remain in politics. But, Fellow Conservative, a leader does not put his own short-term political calculation ahead of the greater good. Leadership is not about entertainment. It's not about building a brand. It's not about virtue signaling. Leadership is ultimately about producing results for the people that you represent --the people that you serve. To produce these results, we must defeat Biden, restore energy to the executive, and reinstate common sense as a common virtue across our nation. This starts with: Swiftly and completely securing our Southern border Rebuilding the post-Covid economy in a way that supports our working families and our seniors hardest hit by inflation Ensuring our school systems are designed to focus on educating our kids--NOT indoctrinating them In Florida, even my most significant political adversaries have acknowledged that when the governor says he's going to do something, he is going to do it. Fellow Conservative, you can take that to the bank. As I lay out my vision for America, you can rest assured that I WILL follow through. I do not make campaign promises that I do not mean or cannot achieve. I pledge to you, Fellow Conservative, that as President, I will be an energetic executive who will go on offense to take the big issues head-on. I will never shy away from a fight because the media or the Left doesn't like it. We are going to reverse Biden's disastrous policies. And we are going to start on DAY ONE. As the campaign heats up and the Left begins to pour even more money into attack tactics to cripple our Great American Comeback, I'm going to need your support to stand up and stand strong. They created this problem, and now they want YOU to suffer the consequences. Let’s not forget how we got here. FIRST , Democrats started flaunting federal law by turning their cities into "sanctuary cities." THEN , Joe Biden opened the floodgates allowing for mass illegal immigration, and completely tied the hands of Border Patrol. NOW , the Left wants you to house illegal aliens in your home to solve the problem they created. But here's the good n ews:House Republicans have already passed the Secure the Border Act, which will... Finish the Wall Bolster our Border Patrol End “Catch-and-Release” And much more.... Now, we must turn our attention to the Senate and keep the pressure on Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats to do something about the border. But if that fails, we need the American people to step up and help us finish the fight. name: Brandon Williams
subject: ICYMI: Submarine Lost with Tourists Onboard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brandon for Congress NY 22** ](https://d2z3Y104
body:
|
---
Peter, As you may have already read, a submersible with five tourists on board disappeared Sunday and has yet to be recovered. Yesterday, I called on the United States Navy to dedicate their complete resources in a committed search effort for the lost tourist vessel. Drawing upon my personal experience of 500 days at sea on a submarine, I know firsthand that we have the finest sonar operators on the globe, alongside the most advanced sonar technology. However, time is our greatest adversary in this situation. This is why I'm staying fully engaged to help channel resources to aid in their recovery. Below, you'll find me on some of today's press coverage:

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

Well, now is your chance. Today I’m announcing that Some of you reading this right now might be asking yourselves, “Why are you giving away a beautiful tan rifle with a 16” barrel and A2 flash hider?” It’s simple: this American-made AR-15 will help my U.S. Senate campaign become bullet-proof come Election Day 2024. As the top law-enforcement official in Arizona’s third largest county and candidate for U.S. Senate, I believe it’s my responsibility to show the Left that most gun owners are responsible, law-abiding citizens. Responsible gun owners pay our taxes on time. Responsible gun owners use our Second Amendment right to protect ourselves and those we love from those who would wish harm upon us. Responsible gun owners obey the law. Giving away my AR-15 through this contest allows me to connect with other gun enthusiasts like you and opens another avenue to Like my campaign, this contest will likely get so hot that it’ll break my thermal scope. Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate P.S. name: Committed to America
subject: He faced down the mob. He’ll do it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committed to America PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

It may feel like the 2022 elections were just days ago; it feels that way for me too. Unfortunately, modern campaign fundraising in a swing state like Michigan leaves no time for an off-season. _Republicans have already begun spending big in their efforts to unseat me._

My team and I are ready to do what it takes to hold this seat in 2024. We know how important it is to be prepared early and how important West Michigan will be in 2024. [_**That’s why I have to ask - will you join this team and give $10 before tomorrow?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125950/412423205/-43077042?refcode=BLU-HSC-20230620-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZjVmZGM4My1iNDBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I_g87WZ0VqhHGG1ZsEFF1N-0MiyGKG_1L86wyk4RvGY=)

| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkU_rnDAQQD9NvCnJRKMePCy1Qg9blrLQY4hxdAP5I0ls2W9fbHcLv9vvOvPmwWN-XuVVGWv89l05HHLMMibplVTalBGt2Uw4UmnNLIECL6kogUpeLEPdwsJFgQMTXcsZbaArHsPa1X0za7UypCtlggtAWCn2SgnFRF-Y4fRQARRYAxyqZmHN3Na67hbGO9qTmiqLMacqPzDifszWaOUzKlfp4Ao7PHLeE-EXAhOBKawrxlQph_HkdIgeY8rBYxXiRmD6UIExP8t0xF_4PM_5dGQntXK7MpsnfPwPv9g3Kk4uhSNqJHzcY0g76mz89lo5XMzhCB_RKWNfQx18Rp8JH2-X8v7jXr7TCYh_LqnDcgovX74Bp_XXG6WsiMOy_zbWmiRaUtPtNP5Nz5_-z58AAAD__6-Fm08) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkU_rnDAQQD9NvCnJRKMePCy1Qg9blrLQY4hxdAP5I0ls2W9fbHcLv9vvOvPmwWN-XuVVGWv89l05HHLMMibplVTalBGt2Uw4UmnNLIECL6kogUpeLEPdwsJFgQMTXcsZbaArHsPa1X0za7UypCtlggtAWCn2SgnFRF-Y4fRQARRYAxyqZmHN3Na67hbGO9qTmiqLMacqPzDifszWaOUzKlfp4Ao7PHLeE-EXAhOBKawrxlQph_HkdIgeY8rBYxXiRmD6UIExP8t0xF_4PM_5dGQntXK7MpsnfPwPv9g3Kk4uhSNqJHzcY0g76mz89lo5XMzhCB_RKWNfQx18Rp8JH2-X8v7jXr7TCYh_LqnDcgovX74Bp_XXG6WsiMOy_zbWmiRaUtPtNP5Nz5_-z58AAAD__6-Fm08)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkU_rnDAQQD9NvCnJRKMePCy1Qg9blrLQY4hxdAP5I0ls2W9fbHcLv9vvOvPmwWN-XuVVGWv89l05HHLMMibplVTalBGt2Uw4UmnNLIECL6kogUpeLEPdwsJFgQMTXcsZbaArHsPa1X0za7UypCtlggtAWCn2SgnFRF-Y4fRQARRYAxyqZmHN3Na67hbGO9qTmiqLMacqPzDifszWaOUzKlfp4Ao7PHLeE-EXAhOBKawrxlQph_HkdIgeY8rBYxXiRmD6UIExP8t0xF_4PM_5dGQntXK7MpsnfPwPv9g3Kk4uhSNqJHzcY0g76mz89lo5XMzhCB_RKWNfQx18Rp8JH2-X8v7jXr7TCYh_LqnDcgovX74Bp_XXG6WsiMOy_zbWmiRaUtPtNP5Nz5_-z58AAAD__6-Fm08)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Team,
Earlier this month, Jahana stood with advocates announced her sponsorship of the Social Security 2100 Act which will bolster this essential insurance for seniors. This act will help extend the resources within the Social Security program by:
1. Requiring those making $400,000 or more to begin paying their fair share into the trust fund.
2. Repealing provisions such as the Windfall Elimination Provision and the Government Pension Offset that penalize retired government employees.
3. Increasing social security benefits for all recipients.

Social Security is a vital program that our nation’s seniors rely on in retirement. And once again Republicans threaten harmful changes to these programs — leaving millions of seniors behind.
**Jahana will not stand for it, and that’s why she is leading the charge to strengthen these important services for all Americans.** [**Will you join her in taking action by adding your name in support of her work for our seniors today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65125995/412423354/-602071878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWJlMzhkZC1iNDBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vTM3VQ67lMj6vj1ckNEIH3mMCPBorsfHIEjx4vMl64o=&emci=be991f37-d80a-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=95be38dd-b40f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135)

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: First, then, now…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
**FIRST** : MAGA extremists across the country incited bigotry, attacked our democracy, and rolled back our progress. So Gretchen Whitmer and this grassroots movement started to fight back. **THEN** : Gretchen Whitmer launched Fight Like Hell PAC to help elect leaders nationwide who will defend our rights. **NOW** : We’re gearing up for the 2024 election cycle. We’re all-in to help re-elect Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, flip the House, and defend the Senate — but planning our election strategy will require tough decisions about how we spend our money. name: GA House Democrats
subject: It’s Gun Violence Awareness Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC
body:
Here are five ways to fight against preventable gun violence.

---

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65126120/412423840/-1481949400?refcode=062023-GunViolenceMonthA-banner&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI0MGU4YS1iNTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D59SKs1Fl0Rld9zX12UgpmeFPZB1bmceHwRkVNyOfo=) Peter, In 2021, Georgia ranked #15 in per-capita gun deaths in the US, according to the CDC. And since then, Governor Brian Kemp signed a shameful permitless carry law in 2022. Georgia House Democrats are committed to our fight to end the epidemic of gun violence in our state. So, for Gun Violence Awareness Month, we wanted to provide a few ways to help bring attention to the need for Georgia to reform its weak gun laws and enact sensible gun ownership. 1) EDUCATE yourself on the issues.[ Organizations like Everytown for Gun Safety](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65126121/412423841/2103499033?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI0MGU4YS1iNTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D59SKs1Fl0Rld9zX12UgpmeFPZB1bmceHwRkVNyOfo=&emci=70aa1184-b50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb40e8a-b50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16273785), [Sandy Hook Promise](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65126122/412423842/-168457725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI0MGU4YS1iNTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6D59SKs1Fl0Rld9zX12UgpmeFPZB1bmceHwRkVNyOfo=&emci=70aa1184-b50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=5bb40e8a-b50f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=16273785), and the[ Giffords Law clean_body: Here are five ways to fight against preventable gun violence. = Peter, In 2021, Georgia ranked #15 in per-capita gun deaths in the US, according to the CDC. And since then, Governor Brian Kemp signed a shameful permitless carry law in 2022. Georgia House Democrats are committed to our fight to end the epidemic of gun violence in our state. So, for Gun Violence Awareness Month, we wanted to provide a few ways to help bring attention to the need for Georgia to reform its weak gun laws and enact sensible gun ownership. 1) EDUCATE yourself on the issues., , and the provide clear facts about gun violence and studies on the effectiveness of violence prevention policy. 2) PARTICIPATE in “” on June 21 to promote safe gun storage in your neighborhood. 3) CALL your Representatives. your Georgia House Representatives and Senators, and call them to let them know that you support sensible gun ownership laws. 4) VOTE for elected officials at every level of government who champion common sense gun violence prevention measures. 5) DONATE to help us support sensible gun ownership, so we can make it a reality in Georgia. Gun violence is taking away our cherished freedoms. It’s time to stand up and take them back. **Friends -** There are so many voices from various communities across this great country. People like me have put their lives on the line and lost them in the knowledge that those voices will be heard, and they are worth the fight. But now, as we’ve seen in the last few years, the modern-day Republican party and the extremist right would like to see that we are silenced. From attacking voting rights to women’s reproductive freedoms and LGBTQ+ individuals existing and expressing themselves - the GOP is out to silence millions of voices. Our voices. I’m running to ensure that we have a voice in Congress. In running so that all of those that feel silenced and attacked by the extremists know that I will bring their voices to Washington. **[Friends, if you are tired of seeing the attacks from the right against all of us, then please chip in today and support me in the fight to bring these voices, and this important representation, to the halls of Congress.](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=34891.430.1.30120ccb2933cb00bfbabb273ea8cfbd&p=eyIlN0IlN0JtaW1pLXNpZ25hdHVyZSU3RCU3RCI6IjE3NDE2OTM2NC0xMjg2MDE5MjU1My1iZWJiZTg2ZGQ3MzQxZWVjYmQwNTkyYTYxY2ZiYTc3ZDRhMDNhMWMyIiwiJTdCJTdCZW1haWxJZCU3RCU3RCI6IjM0ODkxIn0=)**

name: CaucusRoom
subject: It's Always Our Fault
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-abjyz-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Tuesday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-j/) **Wishy Washy on Taiwan** Secretary of State Antony Blinken said **[the U.S. does not"support Taiwan independence"](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-t/)** during his trip to Beijing this week, clarifying U.S. policy toward Taiwan that Biden himself has been unclear on. **Lost At Sea** A rescue mission is underway after**[a vessel used to take tourists to see the underwater wreck of the Titanic went missing](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-i/) **in the Atlantic Ocean. **Why?** Biden bragged last week about his administration's plans to **[build the largest solar farm in Africa](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-d/)** that U.S. taxpayers are funding a $900 million loan.

**Expose it All** A top Republican says that**[there will be additional key witnesses called](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-h/) **in the House Oversight Committee's sweeping inquiry into alleged influence peddling by the Biden family. **It's Always Our Fault** The**[Army's top civilian leader pushed back amid Republican criticisms](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-k/) **that the military is going too "woke," arguing such critiques are deepening an already troubling recruiting crisis. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* No such thing as a **[free lunch](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-o/)**.
* I don't **[want to know](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* [**True story**.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-m/)

[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-c/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-q/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-a/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-abjyz-trhiujldw-f/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
1100 Johnson Rd #18546Golden, CO 80402 You are receiving this email because you are a valued member of CaucusRoom [Preferences](https://caucusroom.updatemyprofile.com/i-abjyz-6F882DBF-trhiujldw-v) | [Unsubscribe](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-u-abjyz-trhiujldw-e/)
---

After today’s primary in Virginia, our team will be meeting over the next few days to make some consequential decisions regarding our next steps for the general election in Virginia and other key races across the country.

clean_body: It’s important now more than ever to elect leaders who will take on the fossil fuel industry, and hitting our end of month goal is essential. | | | | IN 10 DAYS: OUR JUNE FUNDRAISING DEADLINE = | = Today is Election Day in Virginia, and while we’re waiting to see how our climate champions do, we wanted to reach out with an important request. Our crucial June fundraising deadline is just 10 days away, and we need all hands on deck to hit our $10,000 goal. = | = It’s up to us to eliminate the decades-long influence of the fossil fuel industry on our political system and elect climate champions at every level of government. But we cannot do this alone. After today’s primary in Virginia, our team will be meeting over the next few days to make some consequential decisions regarding our next steps for the general election in Virginia and other key races across the country. It’s important now more than ever to elect leaders who will take on the fossil fuel industry, and hitting our end of month goal is essential if we want to provide the level of support we need to make an impact in November. = | | | = | = | = | = | = With Gratitude, Jane Fonda Climate PAC P.S. body:
| Hi there,

I’m Isa, and I just joined the Kildee Team as Finance Director. I’m excited to introduce myself to this community and tell you more about my role and why I stand with Dan.

Right now, it is my responsibility to make sure we hit every benchmark this year, so we can hit the ground running to win next year.

Dan is a top target for 2024 and _already_ facing misleading attack ads from extremist organizations looking to flip this seat red. Dan winning or losing this race could determine who has control over the House. We at Team Kildee have _no room for error._

**That’s why hitting our quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) goal this month is so crucial. At the end of this month, we have to make all our numbers public, which is why a strong showing matters at this key point in the election cycle.

_[Can you chip in $15 before Friday so we can raise another $5,000 this week and appear undeterred in our public FEC report?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128030/412429623/-630748219?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230620_FR_1.1_0_1MO_T_fd_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU0NDAxNi1iYzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NfLR2gTLmXBq6rUdoxUstR0jyK_CvmKEGfIP2C4am_w=)_**

I started working for Dan because he is a leader for Michigan families.

Dan is dedicated to protecting and supporting his home community, writing and passing legislation that brings good-paying, union jobs and resources back to mid-Michigan.

He is fighting to make life-saving prescriptions—including insulin—and health care affordable and to make clean drinking water, free from PFAS chemicals and lead, accessible to all.

And while Dan is fighting for Michiganders, I need you to join me in fighting to keep Dan in Congress.

**_[Can you give $15 to Dan’s campaign before Friday to ensure Michigan is represented well in Congress and to take back the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128037/412429630/-630748219?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230620_FR_1.1_0_1MO_T_fd_NA_NA_mmfr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU0NDAxNi1iYzBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NfLR2gTLmXBq6rUdoxUstR0jyK_CvmKEGfIP2C4am_w=)_**

Thank you,

Isa Djerassi
_Finance Director, Kildee For Congress_

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. clean_body: | Hi there, I’m Isa, and I just joined the Kildee Team as Finance Director. I’m excited to introduce myself to this community and tell you more about my role and why I stand with Dan. Right now, it is my responsibility to make sure we hit every benchmark this year, so we can hit the ground running to win next year. Dan is a top target for 2024 and already facing misleading attack ads from extremist organizations looking to flip this seat red. Dan winning or losing this race could determine who has control over the House. We at Team Kildee have no room for error. That’s why hitting our quarterly Federal Election Commission (FEC) goal this month is so crucial. At the end of this month, we have to make all our numbers public, which is why a strong showing matters at this key point in the election cycle. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = I started working for Dan because he is a leader for Michigan families. Dan is dedicated to protecting and supporting his home community, writing and passing legislation that brings good-paying, union jobs and resources back to mid-Michigan. He is fighting to make life-saving prescriptions—including insulin—and health care affordable and to make clean drinking water, free from PFAS chemicals and lead, accessible to all. And while Dan is fighting for Michiganders, I need you to join me in fighting to keep Dan in Congress. = Thank you, Isa Djerassi Finance Director, Kildee For Congress Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States **

\- June 20, 2023 -
**Ron DeSanctimonious Spent 15 Million Dollars Only To Tank in the Polls**
_One thing is clear: the more people get to know Ron DeSantis, the more they dislike him._
**Bedminster, NJ** — Since Ron DeSanctimonious announced his candidacy, he has wasted over $15 million just so he can drop into nearly single digits.
|
---
In Iowa, DeSantis Super PACs have spent over $4.1 million on cable and broadcast television ads since January.
In April, DeSantis [trailed President Trump by 7 points](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kMGOmzAQhp9muC2yx2CTA4fNWkRVpN3e2p6Qsc3i1gYLjNzN01dESa_f_2vmm1Ehejd-tSDOgDg5swEisFdAvFbnn-_8-uMqXz5U_vUieV3lI8U3QExf0f6vPqaUNijnDypkYVrUDWpd2JbyRjBC-YkWU6vpeBpRiWZESgZeC1IPuh4IUjEYOpwK1yJBRjgSxLqqaDlSQhRpiLFiEKRBqEh2c2mWWXnzO617iKVeQuHbKaW43ZU6wC7nXK5Wee2tWuPiXXJ6O5qAnVn0BtgdmwC7b0tW_eXje_-mdr1vZTQjsG5PoQ_WuD0Ak4_T-AG3ZV-1BSa169WDaRWicp8zMPnUfybLnOycgMlTRSkg72fvDDB5qS43-Tr85eIO789nUt5omP7c3s_F2pqYnfdu4wIq8nkYHPr_AgAA___YuoUG)—with 30% support in Iowa. Now, [DeSantis has tumbled to 19% in Iowa](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kU-PmzAQxT_NcHNkj8GGA4emFj1E2h775xJ5bRNmawMFU7T76SvSpNffPP30nsamOVL_3oI-A-JAfgVEkJ8A8VKev7-oy7eLYV_t_oMZVZX7ccXPgJjf5_A_-rCcQrIUD6pN4Vt0NTpXhFaoWksuVCOKobW6fA1V3Uul-0bXtgpNpbEUEtEqDE1BLXKUXCFHrMpSnHrBueU190G_al4jlHyn8eSn0Ub_lpctzSc3pSK2Q87zeq_UAXZ9nBbydp4iZXLrkQHs7OIG-hNWwE6JWlWC_ROxu4j5KdFoM403RtNumbOb29awMmfTbOk2shTSxFy0lFaQ3ZbTNQVPWwJpHvvVAddpW1wAaRxd7YM9HSDNc-PzMo05jBmkaUohANV1jORBmrcGf8ufty-zv8P7h6QxHyINvz5ezsXS-nmnGGlVGkp-OxocS_8GAAD__2tuk7w), according to recent polling data.
|

In New Hampshire, DeSantis Super PACs have doled out over $1.3 million on cable and broadcast television ads since January.

Peter,
Did you hear about the recent Oregon tolling proposal?

_The truth is, I strongly oppose this rushed and careless tolling plan.
_
We deserve better, Peter!

_**We deserve a fair and thorough assessment of the tolling impacts on hardworking Oregonians like you and me.
**_
I recently wrote a letter to the United States Department of Transportation's Federal Highway Administration, expressing my concerns about this proposal.

But here's the thing...my letter alone won't stop this.

It is crucial that we demand a thorough Environmental Impact Statement to shed light on the far-reaching effects this proposal may have. So far, only a less comprehensive Environmental Assessment has been conducted, __leaving us with more unanswered questions.__

I need your help.

clean_body: | | | | he process has been rushed and careless... | Peter, Did you hear about the recent Oregon tolling proposal? The truth is, I strongly oppose this rushed and careless tolling plan. We deserve better, Peter! We deserve a fair and thorough assessment of the tolling impacts on hardworking Oregonians like you and me. I recently wrote a letter to the United States Department of Transportation's Federal Highway Administration, expressing my concerns about this proposal. But here's the thing...my letter alone won't stop this. It is crucial that we demand a thorough Environmental Impact Statement to shed light on the far-reaching effects this proposal may have. So far, only a less comprehensive Environmental Assessment has been conducted, leaving us with more unanswered questions. I need your help. | | Together, we can stand against the bureaucrats who are pushing for these careless changes. Time is of the essence, Peter, contribute today! Thank you, Lori Chavez-DeRemer Congresswoman OR-05 | | | | | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Lori Chavez-DeRemer 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 \- =

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I first came out in college
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
| [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65128451/412430964/-1905489798?sourceid=1050266&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0YTIyZi1iZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5vGvdGJtONvHhpumSiBJTwIW4H9hnqE8rFS0ktp3J8=&emci=eeac0d04-ae0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=11f4a22f-be0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)
---

| | Asking for your support this Pride month and beyond Peter, can I share something with you?

When I came out in college, I knew I was interested in a career in public service, but I feared that I would have to face a serious choice between pursuing the field of my dreams or living my authentic life openly. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65128452/412430965/2025882553?sourceid=1050266&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0YTIyZi1iZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5vGvdGJtONvHhpumSiBJTwIW4H9hnqE8rFS0ktp3J8=&emci=eeac0d04-ae0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=11f4a22f-be0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Seeing others in the LGBTQ+ community demonstrate acts of courage by coming out, being themselves, and being public about who they are and who they love, I came to realize that I could do both. **I could run for office and be honest about who I am. And that's exactly what I did.**

When I became the first openly gay senator in our nation's history, I understood that I needed to use this extraordinary opportunity to make a difference in people's lives. And from lowering prescription drug prices to protecting same-sex marriage through the Respect for Marriage Act, I've worked hard every day since to do just that. I'm proud of the work I've done, and I'm _also_ proud to see LGBTQ+ representation grow in Congress, with Democratic pro-choice champions like **Reps. Sharice Davids (KS-03)** and **Angie Craig (MN-02)**.

Now, Reps. Davids, Craig and I are all running for reelection, and we're proud to have EMILYs List's endorsement again. I know we can continue making a difference for the American people — but first, we need your support to win.

[**That's why I'm asking: Will you split a donation between our reelection campaigns today? Every dollar you contribute will help Rep. Davids, Rep. Craig and me continue to fight for LGBTQ+ equality, this Pride month and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65128453/412430966/2025882553?sourceid=1050266&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0YTIyZi1iZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5vGvdGJtONvHhpumSiBJTwIW4H9hnqE8rFS0ktp3J8=&emci=eeac0d04-ae0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=11f4a22f-be0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

Over the years, we have made incredible progress in the fight for LGBTQ+ equality. But,Peter, we cannot mistake that progress for a total victory.

Republican-led state legislatures across the country continue to pass harmful legislation, especially targeting the transgender community and LGBTQ+ youth. And when the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Justice Clarence Thomas called for _Obergefell v. Hodges_ — the case that established nationwide marriage equality — to be "reconsidered." **For all of the progress we have made, there is still a LOT more to be done. I'm hoping EMILYs List supporters like you will join me and my colleagues in fighting for LGBTQ+ progress this Pride month and every day of the year. Can we count on you? Donate now to directly support Reps. Sharice Davids, Angie Craig, and me. 100% of your donation goes directly to our campaigns:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Support-LGBTQ-Candidates](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65128454/412430994/2025882553?sourceid=1050266&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0YTIyZi1iZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5vGvdGJtONvHhpumSiBJTwIW4H9hnqE8rFS0ktp3J8=&emci=eeac0d04-ae0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=11f4a22f-be0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you for your ongoing support. Let's recommit ourselves to work toward the day when all LGBTQ+ Americans can live in a world where they feel safe, accepted, and loved.

— Tammy

Sen. Tammy Baldwin (WI) **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65128455/412430995/2025882553?sourceid=1050266&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0YTIyZi1iZTBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b5vGvdGJtONvHhpumSiBJTwIW4H9hnqE8rFS0ktp3J8=&emci=eeac0d04-ae0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=11f4a22f-be0f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

subject: a dubious start to parenting
body:
Happy Tuesday! Mark and Krysty Ronchetti here.

The latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast has just launched and you won't want to miss it!

→ WATCH HERE: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=576b8aba9e&e=567664f14c

We are releasing brand new episodes every Tuesday and Thursday. You can download the show on your favorite podcasting platform or even subscribe and stream it on YouTube.

→ YouTube: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2a52f96095&e=567664f14c

→ Apple Podcasts: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=197b3f71e3&e=567664f14c

→ Spotify: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2bece55b96&e=567664f14c

Thank you for your time and unwavering support. We truly appreciate each and every one of you. We hope you thoroughly enjoy this episode and that it sparks meaningful conversations among your circles. Stay tuned for more exciting content in the near future!

- Mark and Krysty

P.S. Check out our website to see ALL the places you can watch or listen and subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast: https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=66fe6fc0e7&e=567664f14c

→ Forward this email to a friend:
https://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e0c1257c15&e=567664f14c

==============================================

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=e0c1257c15

Our mailing address is:
Choose Adventure Media
8908 N Oakland Ct NE
Albuquerque, NM 87122
USA

Our telephone:
5056814159

Update your profile:
https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bfca9dc257&e=567664f14c&c=e0c1257c15

name: Laura Friedman HQ
subject: A little about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128941/412432718/62647395?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=) Friend,

**[My name is Laura Friedman, and I’m running for Congress in CA-30 the critical Democratic seat Rep. Adam Schiff is vacating. I want to tell you more about why I’m running, but first, will you click here to chip in a $3 donation to boost our campaign for CA-30?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128942/412432719/62647395?refcode=em-6.20.23-intro-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=)**

I’m a lifelong public servant, but my favorite title is “mom” to my daughter Rachel.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128943/412432720/62647395?refcode=em-6.20.23-intro-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=) **When I think about why I’m running to become the first woman to ever represent California’s 30th district in Congress, I think about my daughter.**

It’s because of her that I fight the big fights: To address climate change, protect reproductive freedoms, reform our health care system, defend civil & voting rights, keep our communities safe, and so much more.

**We have a lot of work ahead to secure our future, team. But I know together, we can make real change. It’s what I’ve done as a California Assemblymember, as well as the Mayor of Glendale.**

During my time as a legislator, I’ve gotten results: From championing healthcare access, to banning toxic chemicals in our environment, to increasing funding for mass transit, to fighting to improve tenant protections in California, I’m proud of my progressive track record. I know that our community deserves a leader who can build upon Rep. Schiff’s legacy and fight for our values in Washington.

This is a critical seat for the future of Los Angeles. I’m committed to winning this fight so we can have a brighter future for our children free of extremism, hatred, and intolerance.

**[So please, will you join our campaign for CA-30 today with a $3 donation? I’d be so grateful for your support at this crucial moment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128944/412432721/62647395?refcode=em-6.20.23-intro-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=)** __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:__ | ****[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128945/412432722/62647395?refcode=em-6.20.23-intro-1&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=)**** | ****[$35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128946/412432723/62647395?refcode=em-6.20.23-intro-1&express_lane=true&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjY0OTdlOTQtYmYwZi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0pfA6Rr9u_nATX1MQRrSwOxVITigAzVcL0xaZ99-No0=)****

clean_body: | = Friend, = I’m a lifelong public servant, but my favorite title is “mom” to my daughter Rachel. = When I think about why I’m running to become the first woman to ever represent California’s 30th district in Congress, I think about my daughter. It’s because of her that I fight the big fights: To address climate change, protect reproductive freedoms, reform our health care system, defend civil & voting rights, keep our communities safe, and so much more. We have a lot of work ahead to secure our future, team. But I know together, we can make real change. It’s what I’ve done as a California Assemblymember, as well as the Mayor of Glendale. During my time as a legislator, I’ve gotten results: From championing healthcare access, to banning toxic chemicals in our environment, to increasing funding for mass transit, to fighting to improve tenant protections in California, I’m proud of my progressive track record. I know that our community deserves a leader who can build upon Rep. Schiff’s legacy and fight for our values in Washington. This is a critical seat for the future of Los Angeles. I’m committed to winning this fight so we can have a brighter future for our children free of extremism, hatred, and intolerance. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Bob Casey
subject: One thing you might not know about me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
"All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”

_**"All public service is a trust, given in faith and accepted in honor.”**_ Derek, those are the words inscribed over the front door of the Finance Building in Harrisburg, where I began my public service as PA’s Auditor General.

But they’re so much more than words to me.

One thing you might not know about me is that my wife, Terese, and I raised our four daughters in the same community where I grew up — my hometown of Scranton, PA.

Pennsylvania has been and always will be my home. If there is anything I've learned from serving my home state, it’s that PA’s hardworking people need an actual champion in Washington — which brings me back to those words.

**All public service is a trust, given in faith.** As your Senator, I am reminded every day that you have put your trust in me to fight for what’s right.

**And accepted in honor.** I work to earn that trust by standing up for you and your families: against Republican attacks on Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid; against tax cuts for the ultra-rich; against countries like China that threaten our jobs with unfair trade practices; and against big health care companies raising costs for the middle class.

Derek, my record as Senator makes it clear who I’m fighting for in Washington. But there’s still more work to cut through the gridlock, stand up to powerful special interests, and make the lives of hardworking Pennsylvanians a little bit easier. And the stakes are too high to sit out this election.

That’s why I am once again asking for the honor of your trust:

**[I’m running for re-election because I want to continue to fight for you and your family in the Senate. Our 2024 re-election fight promises to be among the most expensive and competitive Senate races in the country. I will do whatever it takes to defend this seat and our Democratic Majority — and I’m asking you to split a donation between our Governor Josh Shapiro and my campaign to fuel the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65128999/412432865/-1645383944?refcode=email_062023_jds-casey-split&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ5N2U5NC1iZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kChGpec798jYFsQ0EGjyTSaSHrrxABZ5zKWXQCpFIw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65129000/412432866/-1645383944?refcode=email_062023_jds-casey-split&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDQ5N2U5NC1iZjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7kChGpec798jYFsQ0EGjyTSaSHrrxABZ5zKWXQCpFIw=)

name: Al Franken
subject: I got a favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Peter,

I got a favor to ask you.

[**My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just over a week away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Upset the Setup?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129100/412433191/2120520668?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230620_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2MjcwOTQ1LWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wqs8H1Ab0T4BuajNxmM2c1i_SA7ro_cokPb9h0XQaj8=) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129101/412433192/2120520668?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230620_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2MjcwOTQ1LWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wqs8H1Ab0T4BuajNxmM2c1i_SA7ro_cokPb9h0XQaj8=) I can’t say enough good things about Josh.

Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. **Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!** | **[DONATE »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129102/412433193/2120520668?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230620_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2MjcwOTQ1LWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Wqs8H1Ab0T4BuajNxmM2c1i_SA7ro_cokPb9h0XQaj8=)**
---
If that isn’t enough to convince you, **NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House.** _Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball,_ and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help!

**So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win.**

[**Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too! | = If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! name: NDRC News Update
subject: You HAVE to see what A.G. Holder said in the Huffington Post >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, we wanted to give you the latest update about our fight for fair maps – there’s good news and bad news.

**The good news** is that, ahead of last November’s elections, our movement helped achieve the fairest congressional maps in a generation.

**But the bad news** is that Republicans are ALREADY working across the country to roll back our progress and manipulate maps _before 2024_.

Here’s how A.G. Holder described it: | **“As a result of our work, Americans have the fairest congressional map in decades, and more fair state legislative maps than before. That is real progress in the fight for a representative democracy.

But Republicans are attempting right now to reverse that progress as a central part of their political strategy going into next year’s election and will continue to do so in the years that follow.”

– Attorney General Eric Holder**
---
**There’s more good news, team: The NDRC has a plan to fight back, and we want you to be a part of it.**
**_Huffington Post:_
“Top Democratic Redistricting Group Gears Up For Era Of ‘Perpetual’ Combat”

_“The National Democratic Redistricting Committee announced plans . . . to train its resources on 13 states in the 2024 election cycle . . . legal battles persist and elections for positions with influence over redistricting loom on the horizon.”_**
| [Help the NDRC keep fighting
for fairness nationwide](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129116/412433209/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230620_FR_6X_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MjcwOTQ1LWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaXmaZKXXVA1AodWonnk9gWFd16icn9w-Dp23jNIrkI=)
---
The truth is that redistricting is no longer a once-in-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening _every day_ across the country, and whether we prevail will have huge consequences for the 2024 election.
**We know that our strategy of protecting our fair maps victories, preventing unfair gerrymandering, and propelling fair redistricting works – we have the track record to prove it.

So our only question is this: Are you still with us in the next stage of our fight?**
[Yes, I’m donating to support the NDRC!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129117/412433210/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230620_FR_6X_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM1MjcwOTQ1LWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oaXmaZKXXVA1AodWonnk9gWFd16icn9w-Dp23jNIrkI=)
---
We couldn’t have made it this far without you, team, so we hope you’ll chip in today.
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Team, we wanted to give you the latest update about our fight for fair maps – there’s good news and bad news. The good news is that, ahead of last November’s elections, our movement helped achieve the fairest congressional maps in a generation. But the bad news is that Republicans are ALREADY working across the country to roll back our progress and manipulate maps before 2024. Here’s how A.G. Holder described it: | “As a result of our work, Americans have the fairest congressional map in decades, and more fair state legislative maps than before. That is real progress in the fight for a representative democracy. But Republicans are attempting right now to reverse that progress as a central part of their political strategy going into next year’s election and will continue to do so in the years that follow.” – Attorney General Eric Holder There’s more good news, team: The NDRC has a plan to fight back, and we want you to be a part of it. Huffington Post: “Top Democratic Redistricting Group Gears Up For Era Of ‘Perpetual’ Combat” “The National Democratic Redistricting Committee announced plans . . . to train its resources on 13 states in the 2024 election cycle . . . legal battles persist and elections for positions with influence over redistricting loom on the horizon.” | = The truth is that redistricting is no longer a once-in-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening every day across the country, and whether we prevail will have huge consequences for the 2024 election. We know that our strategy of protecting our fair maps victories, preventing unfair gerrymandering, and propelling fair redistricting works – we have the track record to prove it. So our only question is this: Are you still with us in the next stage of our fight? = We couldn’t have made it this far without you, team, so we hope you’ll chip in today. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. subject: NEW POLL: Senate race in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
This will be our toughest fight yet.

| Peter —

We’ve always known that an open Senate seat in a swing state would be close. But today, a new poll just proved that out.

_New EPIC/MRA poll of Michigan shows a potential Republican candidate in a dead heat with Elissa:_ 2024 Senate
**Elissa Slotkin (D) 40%
James Craig (R) 39%
Undecided: 21%**
---
| [Donate Now >> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129168/412433334/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230620-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxM2NiZjlmLWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uu4feV7wacheZ_qSN8GlXC4JzAD5fsyO_d7mJZK8FJ4=)
---
Despite the great success Michigan Democrats have had recently, all Michiganders know it’s not at all permanent: Michigan is a swingy state that can go back and forth from Democrat to Republican if we don’t stay sharp and organized.

**While it’s clear this race will be our toughest fight yet, Elissa is no stranger to tough races, and we know exactly what it will take to win.** She’s won three tough elections in five years, and she has a serious, data-informed plan to win.

That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate.

This poll shows that right now, 21% of Michigan voters are undecided, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are.

**But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan.** We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas.

This news couldn’t have come at a more important time. In just a few days, we’ll be facing our second public FEC deadline. And if we don’t put up a strong number, it’ll send a signal to National Republicans that this seat is possible to flip.

[_**Our FEC deadline is June 30th. Will you split a donation between Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate in Michigan and Fight for Progress today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65129169/412433335/1285278003?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230620-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQxM2NiZjlmLWMwMGYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uu4feV7wacheZ_qSN8GlXC4JzAD5fsyO_d7mJZK8FJ4=)

clean_body: This will be our toughest fight yet. | Peter — We’ve always known that an open Senate seat in a swing state would be close. But today, a new poll just proved that out. New EPIC/MRA poll of Michigan shows a potential Republican candidate in a dead heat with Elissa: 2024 Senate Elissa Slotkin (D) 40% James Craig (R) 39% Undecided: 21% | = Despite the great success Michigan Democrats have had recently, all Michiganders know it’s not at all permanent: Michigan is a swingy state that can go back and forth from Democrat to Republican if we don’t stay sharp and organized. While it’s clear this race will be our toughest fight yet, Elissa is no stranger to tough races, and we know exactly what it will take to win. She’s won three tough elections in five years, and she has a serious, data-informed plan to win. That’s why we’ve started building a foundation early to reach voters in every corner of Michigan and educate them on Elissa’s background, and why she’s the best person to represent our state in the U.S. Senate. This poll shows that right now, 21% of Michigan voters are undecided, so there’s still a lot of work we have to do to win. We need to get to these folks through TV ads, digital outreach, and by expanding our ground game to meet people where they are. But the stakes are high – this poll proves that Democrats’ majority in the Senate will come down to what happens right here in Michigan. We can’t take anything for granted, and we can’t take our foot off the gas. This news couldn’t have come at a more important time. In just a few days, we’ll be facing our second public FEC deadline. And if we don’t put up a strong number, it’ll send a signal to National Republicans that this seat is possible to flip. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you. We couldn’t do any of this without you, Team Slotkin * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: BREAKING: HUNTER BIDEN PLEADS GUILTY
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR PRESIDENT 24
body:
It’s a “get out of jail free card” for the president’s son.
| | |
---
| | | [ ](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=3ee0ab3dbd&e=0be619cbaa)
---
|
# BREAKING: HUNTER BIDEN PLEADS GUILTY
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friend, This morning, it was announced that, despite overwhelming evidence for a laundry list of crimes he’s committed, Hunter Biden will only receive a “slap on the wrist” when he pleads guilty to federal tax charges. It seems Hunter has scored his very own “get out of jail free card,” an apparent perk of being the son of a Democratic president. Even as President Biden is credibly accused of benefiting from Hunter’s activities, his administration is pursuing a partisan persecution of a political opponent, Donald Trump, to undermine the electoral process. In doing so, the White House promotes an unequal application of justice – one set of rules for politically-connected Democrats and another for Republicans who challenge the status quo. **Make no mistake: the next President of the United States is going to need to clean house, ridding agencies like the Justice Department of bureaucrats more concerned with advancing a radical leftwing agenda than preserving equality under the law.** As the next president, this would be one of my top priorities. I would also push the Enforce the Law Act, model legislation to allow states to remove Soros-funded district attorneys who are putting the public in danger by refusing to do their jobs. **Our next president needs the courage to get things done. I’ll stand for America First principles and take on the Washington establishment who don’t live by the rules they make for the rest of us. Can I count on your support?**
---
Sincerely, **Larry Elder
**GOP Candidate for President [**P.S. All the candidates in the GOP presidential primary are career politicians or billionaires. I’m counting on the support of patriots like YOU to propel our campaign to the debate stage. Can you donate today to bring us one step closer?**](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=3c6d859e1e&e=0be619cbaa)

subject: This will be the most competitive race this year.

body:
The Kentucky governor's race will take center stage this year. All eyes will be on Kentucky.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65129357/412433928/823540626?refcode=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I5NTM3MS1jMjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SeEBl82XOxq7xWJAnH1lw-Gjw0a8y4fuzD9b1KP8l6A=&emci=530ec648-c70b-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear here. It's official — the general election has begun! I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protege and outside money is already flooding our state, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. I need your support to win this tough race and continue moving Kentucky forward. I ran for office in 2019 on the promise to do right by Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Since being elected, my team and I have helped produce the highest revenue surplus in the state’s history, created more and better-paying jobs for Kentuckians, funded our schools, and expanded health care for folks. Now I'm running for re-election to protect this progress and continue delivering results for Kentuckians, but I have a tough fight ahead of me. **As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country.** **[Please, if you can, split a contribution between my campaign and Roy Cooper to help me win this governor's race and protect Kentucky's progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65129358/412433929/-593332730?refcode=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I5NTM3MS1jMjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SeEBl82XOxq7xWJAnH1lw-Gjw0a8y4fuzD9b1KP8l6A=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65129359/412433930/-593332730?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.43b95371-c20f-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2I5NTM3MS1jMjBmLWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SeEBl82XOxq7xWJAnH1lw-Gjw0a8y4fuzD9b1KP8l6A=)

clean_body: The Kentucky governor's race will take center stage this year. All eyes will be on Kentucky. | Peter — Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear here. It's official — the general election has begun! I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protege and outside money is already flooding our state, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. I need your support to win this tough race and continue moving Kentucky forward. I ran for office in 2019 on the promise to do right by Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Since being elected, my team and I have helped produce the highest revenue surplus in the state’s history, created more and better-paying jobs for Kentuckians, funded our schools, and expanded health care for folks. Now I'm running for re-election to protect this progress and continue delivering results for Kentuckians, but I have a tough fight ahead of me. As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = As the only Democratic incumbent governor running for re-election this year, I have a target on my back. But I'm not going to allow that to dissuade us from running an honest, transparent, and people-powered campaign. I won the governor's office by just 5,136 votes last time around. I know this will be another tough race, and I'm counting on your support to ensure my team and I have the resources to take on my opponent and outside spending. = Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Andy = = = Send donations via check to: Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Thank you! mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: =?utf-8?Q?Supervisor=20David=20Canepa?=
subject: Broadmoor Town Hall Meeting (Thursday) AND San Francisco Pride Parade (Sunday)
body:
Join me for the Broadmoor Town Hall Meeting on Thursday AND the SF Pride Parade on Sunday! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c0babbc643&u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e034b9d95d)
---
| |
---
| | Dear friends,

June 22nd @ 7:00 PM I'll be hosting a very important Town Hall Meeting at the Broadmoor Community Center to discuss the future of the Broadmoor Police Department. We will have Chief Connolly from the BPD and a representative from LAFCo speaking on this crucial neighborhood safety issue. Please forward this upcoming event to friends and family who may live in Broadmoor:

If you can attend please RSVP with Mike Richardson on my staff: 650-363-4572 or [mrichardson@smcgov.org](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Broadmoor%20Town%20Hall%20Meeting%20\(6%2F22%20%40%207%3A00%20PM\))

_**[PRIDE PARADE - SAN FRANCISCO](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=7c38b1ec32&e=c0babbc643)**_

Join me at the SF Pride Parade this year! The Pride Parade will be on June 25th, going down Market Street from Embarcadero to the Celebration at Civic Center.

My staff will send you a confirmation and provide you with the meeting time and location for the day of the parade! Complete this form to join me: [https://forms.gle/rATQoRfbmSMZGPeJ6](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=a32fe257b5&e=c0babbc643)

[](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=4c3b8e5061&e=c0babbc643)
In Friendship,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor, District 5

---
|
---
|

You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=e034b9d95d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=e034b9d95d).

Fellow Conservative:

Earlier this month, **a poll was released showing me as the clear favorite in the 2024 U.S. Senate race in West Virginia. Head-to-head, I beat Democrat Joe Manchin – no questions asked**.

However, the same poll found **my Republican primary opponent and Sen. Joe Manchin TIED in a 1:1 matchup**. You read that right. Should I become the nominee, Republicans win. If my Republican primary opponent becomes the nominee, **Democrats have a better than 50% shot at keeping this Senate seat.**

_First, the Democrat Senatorial Campaign Committee sued my office, seeking access to my records._

_**Biden’s Department of Justice is now SUING my family-owned businesses to tarnish my standing in West Virginia**_.

**None of this is a coincidence.**

**[I need YOUR help to fight back.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmMkE8e0baxWEqF3C0A2nuax-jPscvVH9c2jjnM0RB2rp5YRhoMJUZ0iDB_EYxcP0ThZBZf_mXcKtU_vRez7mc9T6ikfILp_zmPVrHBCzZFqkk0FcJk-hrdsbbJJmv8QHmh2wCdzWnWYyZ-H77uc0AEX_gSi1BKMz3-8x-iLfL1KPrMfABqFC_5tGo_JLU4jJKJfdHWQ-KjoG0NSDY1px28MgLap9pXYONKtjDcOvKPLDc5FZ_w8rXIJzbMm4BIs9vuXETisdKsmZsfeukRXPTUO2uU1TDcC_oXfFI0LPl6q4M0cHwVjc2YjSY_T-mrmMJhACsoTz_njdLsWiDP6-BUFDPwXxpq2J_BxEIwdj-Rjw%3D)** If Democrats in D.C. are allowed to get away with this stunt, the chances of Republicans flipping this critical Senate seat _**evaporate**_.

[** chip in $5 **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmi2LHowqEQiMY1teuybwJz7njBMpccDAx7krBcdeqKAauerjUW_CrOasOhkfiYSh_u6497jO-qXx0vTLDo1rz2DCGN6fLgH57rbEk-5MKhcJzGWATKlxlOyyIugoYKiWd3hG-KN6bZeAqc3X5vUalaffI8rD2Bzi3_TYIPcu09jdLgKDW7MUkAvwhWdomdMvA_zvJYX9Rm8yyDukNFVgCM0J7P9xgUiwqxKX7fnZZ-xFmL33S2nEcOFUO_YihbQgQzbHFZUFLHQ_zXrINoCW5J_gh2fGwgyR1O9F2U9o4n81CXhA7PqbTu415P_0m4oTmr6IZ6i-tlNIVxymzcarc5g%3D%3D)

The poll released eariler this month proves that. Democrats know that I am the only Republican who can beat Joe Manchin, so they’re going to extreme lengths to ruin my good name and prop up my opponent at the same time.

**Less than 24 hours after the poll's release showing that I’m the only Republican in West Virginia who can beat Joe Manchin, Merrick Garland decides to sue me.**

**WILD STUFF.**

This lawsuit is politically motivated and intended to promote my primary opponent at the expense of my reputation because Democrats think they can beat him in a 1:1 matchup.

**[Will you make a gift of $5, $10, or even $50 right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmMkE8e0baxWEqF3C0A2nuax-jPscvVH9c2jjnM0RB2rp5YRhoMJUZ0iDB_EYxcP0ThZBZf_mXcKtU_vRez7mc9T6ikfILp_zmPVrHBCzZFqkk0FcJk-hrdsbbJJmv8QHmh2wCdzWnWYyZ-H77uc0AEX_gSi1BKMz3-8x-iLfL1KPrMfABqFC_5tGo_JLU4jJKJfdHWQ-KjoG0NSDY1px28JMNz3jiNWkQLxTTMtFfsnxSuVMb7FD8uUqI2a9M0TqUXr49VNYIN2qzfXrhsPUrAqN4TRs0tacl-hq7RHWRvymJkXSuAyLu2GnaPYlfEjMq0a5TuxetAwhErsQdSGliir4ahl-KV8C3w6BzfYDGGtI%3D) **to help us fight this frivolous, politically motivated attack?

[** chip in $10 **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmi2LHowqEQiMY1teuybwJz7njBMpccDAx7krBcdeqKAauerjUW_CrOasOhkfiYSh_u6497jO-qXx0vTLDo1rz2DCGN6fLgH57rbEk-5MKhcJzGWATKlxlOyyIugoYKiWd3hG-KN6bZeAqc3X5vUalaffI8rD2Bzi3_TYIPcu09jdLgKDW7MUkAvwhWdomdMvAbJUeX9IUAlCzvtzJFxCN65PcTBI871IYFTPza7rF1vHAjk_oRNnonHH66gL1i-8yTJ8iUy3igIdhvkWAJIrQ0JaJBOViHNRF_w4g9YIZdeCrw6_YpCw2Ec5oz-38ahPkXjJluUDPOQkcxb3eIUyCGA%3D%3D)

[** chip in $50 **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmi2LHowqEQiMY1teuybwJz7njBMpccDAx7krBcdeqKAauerjUW_CrOasOhkfiYSh_u6497jO-qXx0vTLDo1rz2DCGN6fLgH57rbEk-5MKhcJzGWATKlxlOyyIugoYKiWd3hG-KN6bZeAqc3X5vUalaffI8rD2Bzi3_TYIPcu09jdLgKDW7MUkAvwhWdomdMvAaZ6S0QWrciRJKKhzi9sRmtSAzdYZpkxZpGxEut5DTEJ2xV8-2T-dzWOM7YreQmNLgp5uxVntIfFHWTAvPrFfrfR5xXIXifYcddrOaD4Wug8Ypzt-xqIev_wdnn6JdYnC0K2BfLPONs31hNgw8Muutw%3D%3D)

Republicans around the country see this attack for what it is: **a weaponization of the DOJ to target the President's political opponents**.

**Donald Trump Jr.** was one of the first to comment on the pending lawsuit, writing, “ _**Did anyone really think that Biden’s weaponization of the DOJ to target his political opponents was going to stop with Trump?**_ ”

And **Ted Cruz** followed suit soon thereafter, writing, “ _**Utterly brazen. When I said the Biden DOJ is the most political and partisan DOJ in history, I wasn’t kidding ...**_ ”

We can’t let Biden, Chuck Schumer, and Senate Democrats get away with this.

I need your help. **[Will you answer the call?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1217091e30c4d4fafd43fb1de184ad7&_e=UvMUUSYkmI39VTlaurz9CH_doQYuDFz6_9OQ-ehXwhTn5OfrjwDJKI4aqkvpkrgmMkE8e0baxWEqF3C0A2nuax-jPscvVH9c2jjnM0RB2rp5YRhoMJUZ0iDB_EYxcP0ThZBZf_mXcKtU_vRez7mc9T6ikfILp_zmPVrHBCzZFqkk0FcJk-hrdsbbJJmv8QHmh2wCdzWnWYyZ-H77uc0AEX_gSi1BKMz3-8x-iLfL1KPrMfABqFC_5tGo_JLU4jJKJfdHWQ-KjoG0NSDY1px28LngvgmOGvsXK9kPDjfL9TJ9eavb8W-NWN2A97TbN6lZqDfAiDTLBl20X1hYtH6FJ8omXYqxUyN_yxeo9WbxX9fBQhOvevOm0m9cpiBkszlbz8aw2h3kIEmzsJJl0c_3o0vckEq4wiUvXjNt21OYqHo%3D)**

Sincerely,
Gov. Jim Justice
Republican for U.S. Senate

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for Senate
